weekHeadline.en: Your pregnancy journey has officially begun. Your baby is tiny, but incredible development is already underway.
weekHeadline.hi: Aapki pregnancy journey officially shuru ho gayi hai. Aapka baby abhi bahut chhota hai, lekin amazing development ab se hi shuru ho chuki hai.

reveal.en: Maa, I may be tiny, but my journey has already begun.
reveal.hi: Maa, main bhale hi chhota hoon, par mera safar ab shuru ho chuka hai.

whatImDoing.en: The foundations of my brain, spinal cord and nervous system are beginning to form. My cells are multiplying rapidly and every day brings major developmental progress.
whatImDoing.hi: Mere brain, spinal cord aur nervous system ki neenv banna shuru ho gayi hai. Mere cells tezi se badh rahe hain aur har din ek bada developmental progress laata hai.

physicalChanges.en: Your body has begun producing large amounts of pregnancy hormones even though outward changes are not visible yet.
physicalChanges.hi: Aapki body ne pregnancy hormones bade amount mein banana shuru kar diya hai, bhale hi bahar se abhi koi changes na dikhe.

emotionalState.en: Excitement, disbelief and anxiety often arrive together as you process this life-changing news.
emotionalState.hi: Excitement, yakeen na hona aur thodi anxiety aksar ek saath aate hain jab aap is life-changing news ko samajhti hain.

selfCareTip.en: Focus on rest, hydration and taking your prenatal vitamins consistently.
selfCareTip.hi: Rest, hydration aur apni prenatal vitamins regular lene par dhyaan dein.

reassurance.en: Many women don't feel very pregnant at this stage. That is completely normal.
reassurance.hi: Bahut si women ko is stage par zyada pregnant feel nahi hota. Yeh bilkul normal hai.

whyNow.en: The neural tube that becomes your baby's brain and spinal cord is forming.
whyNow.hi: Neural tube, jo aage chal kar aapke baby ka brain aur spinal cord banta hai, ab ban raha hai.

benefit.en: Rich in folate, iron and protein that support early development.
benefit.hi: Folate, iron aur protein se bharpoor, jo early development mein madad karte hain.

howToConsume.en: Soak overnight and eat as a morning snack or chaat.
howToConsume.hi: Raat bhar bhigo kar subah snack ya chaat ki tarah khayein.

mealIdea.en: Palak dal with roti and orange slices.
mealIdea.hi: Palak dal, roti ke saath aur santare ke tukde.

tip.en: Take folic acid supplements exactly as prescribed.
tip.hi: Folic acid supplements bilkul waise hi lein jaise prescribe kiya gaya hai.

doThisWeek.en: Start prenatal vitamins, book your first doctor appointment and begin tracking symptoms.
doThisWeek.hi: Prenatal vitamins shuru karein, apni pehli doctor appointment book karein aur symptoms track karna shuru karein.

skipThisWeek.en: Skipping folic acid supplementation or spending hours comparing your pregnancy to others online.
skipThisWeek.hi: Folic acid supplement chhodna ya ghanton apni pregnancy ko online doosron se compare karte rehna.

redFlags.en: Call your doctor if you experience heavy bleeding, severe abdominal pain, fainting, or one-sided pelvic pain.
redFlags.hi: Apne doctor ko call karein agar heavy bleeding, severe pet dard, behoshi, ya ek taraf pelvic pain ho.

myth.en: You need to eat for two immediately.
myth.hi: Aapko turant do logon ke liye khaana hai.

truth.en: Nutrient quality matters far more than quantity during early pregnancy.
truth.hi: Early pregnancy mein quantity se kahin zyada nutrient quality maayne rakhti hai.

affirmation.en: My body knows how to nurture this new life.
affirmation.hi: Meri body jaanti hai is nayi zindagi ko kaise nurture karna hai.

reflectionPrompt.en: What does becoming a mother mean to you today?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Aaj aapke liye maa banne ka kya matlab hai?

spokenLine.hi: Maa, main aa gaya hoon.
spokenLine.en: Maa, I have arrived.

reflectionPrompt.en: How did you feel when you first learned you were pregnant?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Jab aapko pehli baar pata chala ki aap pregnant hain, tab aapko kaisa laga?

journalPrompt.en: Write or record the story of the day you discovered your pregnancy.
journalPrompt.hi: Jis din aapko apni pregnancy ka pata chala, us din ki kahani likhein ya record karein.

photoPrompt.en: Capture a photo of your positive pregnancy test, first doctor visit notes, or something that represents this new beginning.
photoPrompt.hi: Apne positive pregnancy test, pehli doctor visit ke notes, ya kisi aisi cheez ki photo lein jo is nayi shuruaat ko darshati ho.

whatSheMayFeel.en: Excited, overwhelmed, nervous and still processing the reality of pregnancy.
whatSheMayFeel.hi: Excited, thoda overwhelmed, nervous aur abhi bhi pregnancy ki reality ko samajh rahi hoon.

whatYouCanDo.en: Celebrate the news with her and reassure her that you are in this together.
whatYouCanDo.hi: Iss news ko uske saath celebrate karein aur use yakeen dilayein ki aap dono is mein saath hain.

oneMission.en: Ask her what excited her most when she saw the positive test.
oneMission.hi: Usse poochein ki positive test dekh kar use sabse zyada kis baat ki khushi hui.

shareMessage.en: A tiny new chapter has begun ❤
shareMessage.hi: Ek chhota sa naya adhyaay shuru ho gaya hai ❤

milestone.hi: Ungliyan, Pairon ki Ungliyan aur Nanhe Naakhun

weekHeadline.en: This week your baby's fingers and toes separate completely, and tiny nails begin to grow.
weekHeadline.hi: Is hafte tumhare baby ki ungliyan aur pairon ki ungliyan poori tarah alag ho jaati hain, aur nanhe naakhun ugna shuru hote hain.

reveal.en: Maa, my fingers and toes are finally free, and tiny nails are starting to grow.
reveal.hi: Maa, meri ungliyan aur pairon ki ungliyan aakhirkaar aazaad hain, aur nanhe naakhun ugna shuru ho rahe hain.

whatImDoing.en: My fingers and toes have completely separated this week, with no more webbing, and tiny nails are just beginning to grow. My skeleton keeps turning from soft cartilage into bone, and my ears are taking their outer shape. I'm swallowing tiny sips of fluid and kicking my legs, simply practising movements I'll need later.
whatImDoing.hi: Is hafte meri ungliyan aur pairon ki ungliyan poori tarah alag ho gayi hain, beech ki jaali ab nahi rahi, aur nanhe naakhun abhi ugna shuru hue hain. Mera skeleton naram cartilage se haddi mein badalta ja raha hai, aur mere kaan apna bahri aakaar le rahe hain. Main fluid ke nanhe ghoont nigal raha hoon aur apni taangein chala raha hoon, bas woh harkatein practice karta hua jo aage mujhe chahiye hongi.

physicalChanges.en: Your waist may look a little rounder, though for many women this is still mostly bloating and a uterus still within the pelvis. Veins on your breasts and tummy may look more visible as your blood volume keeps rising, and your skin might feel drier or spottier than usual.
physicalChanges.hi: Tumhari kamar thodi gol lag sakti hai, halaanki bahut si mahilaon ke liye yeh abhi zyadatar bloating aur pelvis ke andar hi rehte uterus ki wajah se hai. Tumhare breasts aur pet par nasein zyada dikh sakti hain kyunki blood volume badhta ja raha hai, aur skin aam se zyada rookhi ya daane waali lag sakti hai.

emotionalState.en: Week 10 often marks a turning point. Nausea, fatigue and headaches may still be strong, while some women already feel their symptoms beginning to lift. Whichever way it goes for you, it's completely normal.
emotionalState.hi: Week 10 aksar ek mod hota hai. Matli, thakaan aur sar dard abhi bhi tez ho sakte hain, jabki kuch mahilaayein apne symptoms pehle se halke hote mehsoos karti hain. Tumhare saath jo bhi ho, woh bilkul normal hai.

selfCareTip.en: If your first prenatal visit hasn't happened yet, it's likely coming up very soon. Keep taking your prenatal vitamin, stay hydrated, and treat yourself gently.
selfCareTip.hi: Agar tumhari pehli prenatal visit abhi tak nahi hui, to woh shayad bahut jald aane waali hai. Apna prenatal vitamin lete raho, paani peete raho, aur khud ke saath naram raho.

reassurance.en: You're almost through the trickiest stretch, and many women start to feel more like themselves again very soon.
reassurance.hi: Tum sabse mushkil hisse se lagbhag nikal chuki ho, aur bahut si mahilaayein jald hi dobara khud jaisa mehsoos karne lagti hain.

nutritionTheme.hi: Badhti Haddiyon ke liye Calcium aur Protein

whyNow.en: Your baby's skeleton keeps turning from soft cartilage into bone this week, so calcium and steady protein matter more than ever.
whyNow.hi: Is hafte tumhare baby ka skeleton naram cartilage se haddi mein badalta ja raha hai, isliye calcium aur lagataar protein pehle se kahin zyada mayne rakhte hain.

benefit.en: Rich in calcium and complete protein, supporting your baby's bones and your own health.
benefit.hi: Calcium aur poore protein se bharpoor, jo tumhare baby ki haddiyon aur tumhari apni sehat ko support karta hai.

howToConsume.en: Try it as palak paneer or grilled paneer cubes.
howToConsume.hi: Ise palak paneer ya grilled paneer cubes ki tarah try karo.

mealIdea.en: Palak paneer with a whole-wheat roti, and a slice of orange or sweet lime after.
mealIdea.hi: Palak paneer ke saath gehun ki roti, aur baad mein santre ya mosambi ka ek tukda.

tip.en: Choose paneer made from pasteurised milk, and cook it well, especially if you're unsure how it was made.
tip.hi: Pasteurised doodh se bana paneer chuno, aur use acche se pakao, khaaskar agar tumhein pata na ho ki woh kaise bana hai.

doThisWeek.en: Organize your medical reports, maintain healthy routines and continue taking prenatal vitamins.
doThisWeek.hi: Apne medical reports organize karein, healthy routine banaye rakhein aur prenatal vitamins lete rahein.

skipThisWeek.en: Skipping supplements because symptoms have improved.
skipThisWeek.hi: Symptoms theek ho gaye isliye supplements chhod dena.

redFlags.en: Contact your doctor if you have heavy bleeding, severe abdominal pain, fever, persistent vomiting that stops you keeping fluids down, or anything that doesn't feel right.
redFlags.hi: Apne doctor se sampark karo agar zyada bleeding, pet mein tez dard, bukhaar, lagataar ulti jisse paani bhi andar na ruke, ya kuch bhi jo theek na lage.

myth.en: Exercise during pregnancy is dangerous.
myth.hi: Pregnancy mein exercise karna khatarnaak hai.

truth.en: Most healthy pregnancies benefit from doctor-approved physical activity.
truth.hi: Zyadatar healthy pregnancies ko doctor-approved physical activity se fayda hota hai.

affirmation.en: I am creating a safe and loving home for my baby.
affirmation.hi: Main apne baby ke liye ek safe aur pyaar bhara ghar bana rahi hoon.

reflectionPrompt.en: What family value would you most like to pass on to your child?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Apne bachche ko aap sabse zyada kaun si family value dena chahengi?

spokenLine.hi: Maa, meri chhoti ungliyan ban rahi hain.
spokenLine.en: Maa, my tiny fingers are forming.

reflectionPrompt.en: What family value would you most like to pass on?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Aap sabse zyada kaun si family value aage pahunchana chahengi?

journalPrompt.en: Write about one lesson from your childhood that shaped who you are today.
journalPrompt.hi: Apne bachpan ki ek aisi seekh ke baare mein likhein jisne aapko aaj banaya hai.

photoPrompt.en: Capture something meaningful from your childhood that you hope to share with your baby someday.
photoPrompt.hi: Apne bachpan ki koi aisi meaningful cheez capture karein jise aap kabhi apne baby ke saath share karna chahti hain.

whatSheMayFeel.en: For many women this is when the toughest symptoms start easing, though everyone's timeline differs. She may still be dealing with tiredness, headaches or nausea, alongside newer things like visible veins or sharp twinges.
whatSheMayFeel.hi: Bahut si mahilaon ke liye yahi woh waqt hai jab sabse mushkil symptoms halke padne lagte hain, halaanki har kisi ka timeline alag hota hai. Woh abhi bhi thakaan, sar dard ya matli se jujh rahi ho sakti hai, saath hi nayi cheezein jaise dikhti nasein ya tez chubhan.

whatYouCanDo.en: Take on more of the cooking and chores, be patient with any lingering symptoms, help her move slowly if twinges strike, and keep comfortable clothing handy.
whatYouCanDo.hi: Khaana aur ghar ke kaam ka zyada hissa lo, jo symptoms abhi bhi hain unke saath sabr rakho, agar chubhan ho to use dheere chalne mein madad karo, aur comfortable kapde paas rakho.

oneMission.en: Ask about the upcoming NT scan together — and celebrate how close you are to trimester two.
oneMission.hi: Aane waale NT scan ke baare mein saath mein poocho — aur khushi manao ki tum trimester do ke kitne kareeb ho.

shareMessage.en: This week my fingers and toes have fully separated, and tiny nails are just beginning to grow. I'm about the size of a strawberry now, and all my major organs have formed and are starting to work together as a team.
shareMessage.hi: Is hafte meri ungliyan aur pairon ki ungliyan poori tarah alag ho gayi hain, aur nanhe naakhun abhi ugna shuru hue hain. Ab main lagbhag ek strawberry jitna hoon, aur mere sabhi bade organs ban chuke hain aur ek team ki tarah saath kaam karna shuru kar rahe hain.

weekHeadline.en: Your baby's heart is now beating rhythmically, and major organs are beginning to take shape.
weekHeadline.hi: Tumhare baby ka dil ab rhythm mein dhadak raha hai, aur major organs ban-na shuru ho gaye hain.

reveal.en: Maa, my little heart is beating steadily and helping me grow stronger every day.
reveal.hi: Maa, mera nanha dil aaram se dhadak raha hai aur har din mujhe aur strong banne mein madad kar raha hai.

whatImDoing.en: My heart is beating regularly, my brain is developing rapidly, and the foundations of my eyes, ears and limbs are beginning to form. Although I'm tiny, many important systems are already under construction.
whatImDoing.hi: Mera dil regularly dhadak raha hai, mera brain tezi se develop ho raha hai, aur meri aankhein, kaan aur haath-pair ki neev ban-ne lagi hai. Bhale hi main bahut chhota hoon, par bahut saare important systems pehle se ban rahe hain.

physicalChanges.en: Pregnancy hormones are increasing rapidly and your body is working hard behind the scenes to support your growing baby.
physicalChanges.hi: Pregnancy hormones tezi se badh rahe hain aur tumhara body andar hi andar tumhare badhte baby ke liye mehnat kar raha hai.

emotionalState.en: You may feel excited one moment and exhausted the next. Emotional ups and downs are common this week.
emotionalState.hi: Kabhi tum bahut excited feel karogi, to agle hi pal thaki hui. Is hafte emotional ups and downs aana normal hai.

selfCareTip.en: Focus on getting through one day at a time. Rest is productive work during pregnancy.
selfCareTip.hi: Bas ek-ek din nikalne par dhyaan do. Pregnancy mein aaram karna bhi zaroori kaam hai.

reassurance.en: The intensity of your symptoms does not predict how healthy your pregnancy is.
reassurance.hi: Tumhare symptoms kitne tez hain, isse yeh tay nahi hota ki tumhari pregnancy kitni healthy hai.

whyNow.en: Nausea often peaks around this stage while your baby's organs continue developing rapidly.
whyNow.hi: Is stage par aksar nausea sabse zyada hoti hai, jabki tumhare baby ke organs tezi se develop hote rehte hain.

benefit.en: Provides protein, iron and steady energy when appetite is low.
benefit.hi: Jab bhookh kam ho tab protein, iron aur steady energy deta hai.

howToConsume.en: Mix with water, lemon and roasted jeera for a refreshing drink.
howToConsume.hi: Paani, nimbu aur bhune jeere ke saath milakar ek refreshing drink banao.

mealIdea.en: Banana oatmeal bowl with a glass of sattu drink.
mealIdea.hi: Kele wale oatmeal bowl ke saath ek glass sattu drink.

tip.en: Eat before you feel hungry. An empty stomach often makes nausea worse.
tip.hi: Bhookh lagne se pehle hi kha lo. Khaali pet aksar nausea ko aur badha deta hai.

doThisWeek.en: Keep dry snacks nearby, eat small frequent meals and prioritize hydration.
doThisWeek.hi: Dry snacks paas rakho, thode-thode karke baar-baar khao aur hydration ko priority do.

skipThisWeek.en: Forcing large meals or ignoring signs of dehydration.
skipThisWeek.hi: Zabardasti bada meal khaana ya dehydration ke signs ko ignore karna.

redFlags.en: Call your doctor if you cannot keep fluids down for more than 24 hours, experience severe vomiting, heavy bleeding, severe abdominal pain or fainting.
redFlags.hi: Agar 24 ghante se zyada tak tum kuch bhi liquid pet mein nahi rakh paa rahi, ya bahut zyada ulti, heavy bleeding, tez pet dard ya behoshi ho to apne doctor ko call karo.

myth.en: More nausea means a healthier baby.
myth.hi: Zyada nausea matlab healthier baby.

truth.en: Pregnancy symptoms vary widely and do not reliably predict pregnancy outcomes.
truth.hi: Pregnancy symptoms har kisi mein alag hote hain aur inse pregnancy ka result tay nahi hota.

affirmation.en: I trust the wisdom of my body.
affirmation.hi: Mujhe apne body ki samajh par bharosa hai.

reflectionPrompt.en: What strength have you discovered in yourself recently?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Haal hi mein tumne apne andar kaunsi taakat dekhi hai?

spokenLine.hi: Maa, mera dil dhadak raha hai.
spokenLine.en: Maa, my heart is beating.

reflectionPrompt.en: What strength have you discovered in yourself this week?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Is hafte tumne apne andar kaunsi taakat dekhi hai?

journalPrompt.en: Describe one challenge you faced this week and how you handled it.
journalPrompt.hi: Is hafte aapne jo ek challenge face kiya aur use kaise handle kiya, woh batao.

photoPrompt.en: Capture a simple moment that reminds you how strong you are becoming.
photoPrompt.hi: Ek simple pal capture karo jo yaad dilata hai ki tum kitni strong ban rahi ho.

whatSheMayFeel.en: Exhausted, nauseous and frustrated that everyday activities suddenly feel difficult.
whatSheMayFeel.hi: Thaki hui, nausea wali aur frustrated ki rozmarra ke kaam achaanak mushkil lagne lage hain.

whatYouCanDo.en: Take over small daily tasks and make sure she always has access to water and snacks.
whatYouCanDo.hi: Chhote-chhote rozana ke kaam apne haath mein lo aur dhyaan rakho ki uske paas hamesha paani aur snacks ho.

oneMission.en: Handle one household responsibility completely this week without being asked.
oneMission.hi: Is hafte ek ghar ki zimmedari poori tarah khud sambhalo, bina kahe.

shareMessage.en: Every difficult day is helping our little one grow stronger ❤
shareMessage.hi: Har mushkil din hamare nanhe ko aur strong banne mein madad kar raha hai ❤

weekHeadline.en: Your baby's face is beginning to take shape and tiny arms and legs continue developing.
weekHeadline.hi: Tumhare baby ka chehra ab shape lene laga hai aur chhote haath-pair bhi develop ho rahe hain.

reveal.en: Maa, I'm starting to look a little more like a baby every day.
reveal.hi: Maa, main har din thoda aur baby jaisa dikhne laga hoon.

whatImDoing.en: My brain is growing rapidly. Tiny arm buds and leg buds are developing, and the foundations of my eyes, ears and nose are becoming more defined. My heart continues beating strongly.
whatImDoing.hi: Mera brain tezi se badh raha hai. Chhote haath aur pair ke buds ban rahe hain, aur meri aankhein, kaan aur naak ki neev bhi saaf hoti ja rahi hai. Mera dil ab bhi mazboooti se dhadak raha hai.

physicalChanges.en: Your uterus is growing, although it may not be visible yet. Hormonal changes continue affecting your energy, digestion and appetite.
physicalChanges.hi: Tumhara uterus badh raha hai, bhale hi abhi dikhe na. Hormonal badlaav tumhari energy, digestion aur bhookh par asar daalte rahenge.

emotionalState.en: You may feel excited one moment and worried the next. Emotional ups and downs are a normal part of early pregnancy.
emotionalState.hi: Kabhi tum bahut excited feel karogi to agle pal thodi pareshaan. Emotions ka yeh upar-neeche hona early pregnancy mein bilkul normal hai.

commonSymptoms.hi: Khaane ki cravings ya kuch cheezon se chidh

selfCareTip.en: Focus on hydration and don't feel guilty about needing extra rest.
selfCareTip.hi: Hydration par dhyaan do aur extra rest ki zaroorat ho to guilty mat feel karo.

reassurance.en: Every pregnancy is different. Some women have many symptoms while others have very few.
reassurance.hi: Har pregnancy alag hoti hai. Kuch women mein bahut symptoms hote hain to kuch mein bahut kam.

whyNow.en: Vomiting and nausea can increase fluid loss, making hydration especially important.
whyNow.hi: Ulti aur nausea se body ka paani jyada nikal jaata hai, isliye hydration aur bhi zaroori ho jaata hai.

benefit.en: Provides hydration and natural electrolytes while being easy on the stomach.
benefit.hi: Hydration aur natural electrolytes deta hai aur pet par bhi halka rehta hai.

howToConsume.en: One fresh glass during mid-morning.
howToConsume.hi: Mid-morning mein ek fresh glass.

mealIdea.en: Cucumber salad with coconut water and fresh fruit.
mealIdea.hi: Kheere ka salad nariyal pani aur fresh fruit ke saath.

tip.en: Take small sips throughout the day instead of drinking large amounts at once.
tip.hi: Ek saath jyada peene ke bajaye din bhar thode-thode ghoont lete raho.

doThisWeek.en: Stay hydrated, continue prenatal supplements and take short walks if you feel comfortable.
doThisWeek.hi: Hydrated raho, prenatal supplements lete raho aur comfortable lago to chhoti walks par jao.

skipThisWeek.en: Comparing your symptoms or pregnancy journey with others.
skipThisWeek.hi: Apne symptoms ya pregnancy journey ko doosron se compare karna.

redFlags.en: Contact your doctor if you experience heavy bleeding, severe abdominal pain, persistent vomiting, fever, or signs of dehydration.
redFlags.hi: Agar zyada bleeding, tez pet dard, lagataar ulti, bukhaar ya dehydration ke signs ho to apne doctor se sampark karo.

myth.en: Every pregnant woman should feel the same symptoms.
myth.hi: Har pregnant woman ko ek jaise symptoms feel hone chahiye.

truth.en: Healthy pregnancies can have very different symptom patterns.
truth.hi: Healthy pregnancies mein symptoms bilkul alag-alag ho sakte hain.

affirmation.en: I welcome this journey with love and patience.
affirmation.hi: Main is safar ko pyaar aur sabr ke saath apna rahi hoon.

reflectionPrompt.en: What kind of childhood would you like to create for your baby?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Apne baby ke liye aap kaisa bachpan banana chahengi?

spokenLine.hi: Maa, main dheere dheere tum jaisa lagne laga hoon.
spokenLine.en: Maa, I am slowly beginning to look like you.

reflectionPrompt.en: What kind of childhood would you like to create for your baby?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Apne baby ke liye aap kaisa bachpan banana chahengi?

journalPrompt.en: Describe your dream day with your future child.
journalPrompt.hi: Apne hone wale bachche ke saath apne sapno wale din ko describe karein.

photoPrompt.en: Take a photo of a place where you feel peaceful and would love to spend time with your child one day.
photoPrompt.hi: Aisi koi jagah ki photo lein jahan aapko sukoon milta hai aur jahan aap ek din apne bachche ke saath time bitana chahengi.

whatSheMayFeel.en: Anxious about whether everything is progressing normally while also feeling excited about the journey ahead.
whatSheMayFeel.hi: Sab kuch normal chal raha hai ya nahi, is baare mein thodi anxiety ke saath aage ke safar ko lekar excitement bhi.

whatYouCanDo.en: Listen carefully without immediately trying to solve every concern.
whatYouCanDo.hi: Har baat ko turant solve karne ki koshish kiye bina dhyaan se suno.

oneMission.en: Ask her what is worrying her most right now and simply listen.
oneMission.hi: Usse poochho ki abhi sabse jyada kya cheez usko pareshaan kar rahi hai, aur bas suno.

shareMessage.en: We are learning and growing together every day ❤
shareMessage.hi: Hum har din saath mein seekh rahe hain aur badh rahe hain ❤

weekHeadline.en: Your baby has completed the embryonic stage and is now officially considered a fetus.
weekHeadline.hi: Tumhara baby embryonic stage complete kar chuka hai aur ab officially ek fetus mana jaata hai.

reveal.en: Maa, I am no longer an embryo. I am officially your baby now.
reveal.hi: Maa, main ab embryo nahi raha. Ab main officially tumhara baby hoon.

whatImDoing.en: My fingers and toes are beginning to form, my facial features are becoming more recognizable, and all of my major organs have started developing. The foundations are now in place for the next stage of growth.
whatImDoing.hi: Mere haath-pair ki ungliyaan banna shuru ho rahi hain, mere chehre ke features ab thode aur saaf dikh rahe hain, aur mere saare major organs develop hone lage hain. Ab agle stage ki growth ke liye neev tayyar ho chuki hai.

physicalChanges.en: Your uterus has grown to about the size of an orange. Hormonal changes continue affecting digestion, energy levels and appetite.
physicalChanges.hi: Tumhara uterus ab lagbhag ek santare jitna bada ho gaya hai. Hormonal changes ab bhi digestion, energy levels aur appetite par asar daal rahe hain.

emotionalState.en: Many mothers feel a mixture of excitement and uncertainty as they approach their first major scan.
emotionalState.hi: Apne pehle bade scan ke kareeb aate hue, bahut si mothers ko excitement aur thodi uncertainty dono saath mehsoos hoti hai.

selfCareTip.en: Focus on nourishing yourself rather than trying to eat perfectly. Small healthy choices add up.
selfCareTip.hi: Perfect khaane ki koshish karne ke bajaye apne aap ko poshan dene par dhyan do. Chhoti-chhoti healthy choices mil ke bada farak laati hain.

reassurance.en: The first trimester can feel long and uncomfortable, but your baby is making incredible progress every day.
reassurance.hi: Pehla trimester lamba aur thoda asahaj lag sakta hai, par tumhara baby har din kamaal ki progress kar raha hai.

whyNow.en: Your baby's major organs are forming and need a steady supply of nutrients for healthy development.
whyNow.hi: Tumhare baby ke major organs ban rahe hain aur unhe healthy development ke liye lagatar nutrients ki zaroorat hai.

benefit.en: Provides protein, folate and easy-to-digest nutrition during early pregnancy.
benefit.hi: Pregnancy ke shuruaati dino mein protein, folate aur aasaani se hazam hone wala poshan deti hai.

howToConsume.en: Moong dal khichdi or moong dal soup.
howToConsume.hi: Moong dal khichdi ya moong dal soup.

mealIdea.en: Moong dal khichdi with curd and vegetables.
mealIdea.hi: Dahi aur sabziyon ke saath moong dal khichdi.

tip.en: Try to include a protein source in every meal and snack.
tip.hi: Har meal aur snack mein ek protein source shaamil karne ki koshish karo.

doThisWeek.en: Prepare questions for your next appointment, continue healthy eating habits and prioritize rest.
doThisWeek.hi: Apni agli appointment ke liye sawaal tayyar karo, healthy khaane ki aadat jaari rakho aur aaram ko priority do.

skipThisWeek.en: Assuming every symptom or lack of symptoms means something is wrong.
skipThisWeek.hi: Yeh maan lena ki har symptom ya symptom na hona kuchh galat hone ka matlab hai.

redFlags.en: Call your doctor if you experience heavy bleeding, severe abdominal pain, persistent vomiting with dehydration, fever, or severe dizziness.
redFlags.hi: Apne doctor ko call karo agar tumhe heavy bleeding, tez pet dard, lagatar ulti ke saath dehydration, bukhaar ya tez chakkar aaye.

myth.en: No symptoms means something is wrong with the pregnancy.
myth.hi: Symptoms na hone ka matlab pregnancy mein kuchh galat hai.

truth.en: Healthy pregnancies can have very different symptom patterns, including very mild symptoms.
truth.hi: Healthy pregnancies mein symptoms ke alag-alag pattern ho sakte hain, jisme bahut halke symptoms bhi shaamil hain.

affirmation.en: My baby and I are growing together every day.
affirmation.hi: Mera baby aur main har din saath mein badh rahe hain.

reflectionPrompt.en: What are three things you are grateful for this week?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Is hafte aap kin teen cheezon ke liye grateful hain?

spokenLine.hi: Maa, ab main ek chhota sa baby hoon.
spokenLine.en: Maa, I am now officially a little baby.

reflectionPrompt.en: What are three things you are grateful for today?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Aaj aap kin teen cheezon ke liye grateful hain?

journalPrompt.en: Write a gratitude letter to your growing baby.
journalPrompt.hi: Apne badhte baby ke liye ek gratitude letter likho.

photoPrompt.en: Capture a moment of self-care, gratitude or joy from this week.
photoPrompt.hi: Is hafte ki self-care, gratitude ya khushi ka koi pal capture karo.

whatSheMayFeel.en: Excited about upcoming scans but also nervous about whether everything is progressing normally.
whatSheMayFeel.hi: Aane wale scans ke liye excited, par saath hi thoda nervous ki sab kuchh normally aage badh raha hai ya nahi.

whatYouCanDo.en: Attend appointments when possible and reassure her that it's normal to feel anxious.
whatYouCanDo.hi: Ho sake to appointments par saath jaayein aur unhe yakeen dilaayein ki anxious feel karna normal hai.

oneMission.en: Ask her if there is anything she would like to discuss with the doctor and help her write it down.
oneMission.hi: Unse poochho ki kya kuchh aisa hai jo woh doctor se discuss karna chahti hain, aur use likhne mein unki madad karo.

shareMessage.en: Our little baby is growing stronger every day ❤
shareMessage.hi: Hamara nanha baby har din aur mazboot ho raha hai ❤

weekHeadline.en: Your baby is starting to move, stretch and wiggle, even though you cannot feel it yet.
weekHeadline.hi: Aapka baby ab hilna, stretch karna aur wiggle karna shuru kar raha hai, bhale hi aapko abhi feel na ho.

reveal.en: Maa, I am beginning to move around in my tiny world.
reveal.hi: Maa, main apni nanhi si duniya mein ghoomna shuru kar raha hoon.

whatImDoing.en: My arms and legs are growing longer, my joints are forming, and I am starting to make small movements. My heart has now developed four chambers and is working hard every day.
whatImDoing.hi: Mere haath aur pair lambe ho rahe hain, mere joints ban rahe hain, aur main choti choti harkatein karne laga hoon. Mera dil ab chaar chambers mein develop ho chuka hai aur har din mehnat se kaam kar raha hai.

physicalChanges.en: Your body is increasing blood production to support your growing baby. Hormonal changes continue affecting energy levels and digestion.
physicalChanges.hi: Aapka badhte baby ko support karne ke liye aapka body zyada blood bana raha hai. Hormonal changes abhi bhi aapki energy aur digestion ko affect kar rahe hain.

emotionalState.en: You may feel more connected to the pregnancy while still wondering what lies ahead.
emotionalState.hi: Aapko pregnancy se zyada juda hua mehsoos ho sakta hai, lekin saath hi aage kya hoga yeh bhi soch sakti hain.

selfCareTip.en: Listen to your body. Rest when you need rest and don't feel guilty about slowing down.
selfCareTip.hi: Apne body ki sunein. Jab aaram chahiye tab aaram karein aur dheere chalne par guilty mat feel karein.

reassurance.en: Many mothers worry because they cannot feel the baby yet. At this stage, movements are still too tiny to notice.
reassurance.hi: Bahut si maaein pareshaan hoti hain kyunki unhe baby abhi feel nahi hota. Is stage par movements itni choti hoti hain ki mehsoos nahi hoti.

whyNow.en: Your baby's brain is developing rapidly and requires a constant supply of nutrients.
whyNow.hi: Aapke baby ka brain tezi se develop ho raha hai aur use lagatar nutrients ki zaroorat hai.

benefit.en: Provide protein, healthy fats and choline that support early brain development.
benefit.hi: Protein, healthy fats aur choline dete hain jo early brain development mein madad karte hain.

howToConsume.en: Roasted peanuts as a snack or mixed into chaat.
howToConsume.hi: Snack ke roop mein roasted moongphali ya chaat mein milakar.

mealIdea.en: Soybean pulao with curd and salad.
mealIdea.hi: Soybean pulao, dahi aur salad ke saath.

tip.en: Include a protein source with every meal to support your baby's rapidly developing brain.
tip.hi: Apne baby ke tezi se develop hote brain ke liye har meal mein ek protein source zaroor shamil karein.

doThisWeek.en: Continue prenatal vitamins, stay hydrated and build a consistent sleep routine.
doThisWeek.hi: Prenatal vitamins lete rahein, hydrated rahein aur ek consistent sleep routine banayein.

skipThisWeek.en: Panicking if pregnancy symptoms change from day to day.
skipThisWeek.hi: Pregnancy symptoms din-pratidin badalne par ghabra jaana.

redFlags.en: Contact your doctor if you experience heavy bleeding, severe abdominal pain, fainting, fever, or persistent vomiting causing dehydration.
redFlags.hi: Agar aapko zyada bleeding, tez pet dard, behoshi, bukhar, ya lagatar ulti se dehydration ho to apne doctor se contact karein.

myth.en: If symptoms reduce, something is wrong.
myth.hi: Agar symptoms kam ho jaayein to kuch gadbad hai.

truth.en: Pregnancy symptoms naturally fluctuate and often change throughout the first trimester.
truth.hi: Pregnancy symptoms naturally upar-neeche hote rehte hain aur pehle trimester mein aksar badalte rehte hain.

affirmation.en: I choose calm over fear and trust over worry.
affirmation.hi: Main dar par sukoon ko aur chinta par bharose ko chunta hoon.

reflectionPrompt.en: What helps you feel peaceful during uncertain moments?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Anishchit (uncertain) palon mein aapko kya shaanti deta hai?

spokenLine.hi: Maa, main hilna shuru kar raha hoon.
spokenLine.en: Maa, I am beginning to move.

reflectionPrompt.en: What does becoming a parent mean to you?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Parent banna aapke liye kya maayne rakhta hai?

journalPrompt.en: Describe how your life may change after your baby arrives.
journalPrompt.hi: Baby ke aane ke baad aapki life kaise badal sakti hai, ise likhein.

photoPrompt.en: Take a photo of something that represents your future family.
photoPrompt.hi: Kisi aisi cheez ki photo lein jo aapki aane wali family ko darshati ho.

whatSheMayFeel.en: Emotionally up and down as hormones, anticipation and uncertainty continue to mix together.
whatSheMayFeel.hi: Emotionally upar-neeche, kyunki hormones, intezaar aur uncertainty ab bhi aapas mein mix ho rahe hain.

whatYouCanDo.en: Offer reassurance rather than trying to solve every concern.
whatYouCanDo.hi: Har chinta ko solve karne ki koshish karne ke bajaye use bharosa dilayein.

oneMission.en: Tell her one thing you admire about how she is handling pregnancy.
oneMission.hi: Use ek baat batayein jo aapko pasand hai ki woh pregnancy ko kaise handle kar rahi hai.

shareMessage.en: Every week brings us closer to meeting our little one ❤
shareMessage.hi: Har hafta humein hamare nanhe se milne ke aur kareeb le aata hai ❤

weekHeadline.en: Your baby's fingers, toes and tiny facial features are becoming more distinct every day.
weekHeadline.hi: Aapke baby ki ungliyaan, pair aur nanhe facial features har din zyada saaf hote ja rahe hain.

reveal.en: Maa, my tiny fingers and toes are now forming, and I'm starting to look more like the baby you'll meet one day.
reveal.hi: Maa, meri nanhi ungliyaan aur pair ab ban rahe hain, aur main thoda thoda waise dikhne laga hoon jaise tum ek din mujhe miloge.

whatImDoing.en: My fingers and toes are separating, my jaw and facial features are developing, and my brain continues building millions of new connections. I can even make tiny movements, although you cannot feel them yet.
whatImDoing.hi: Meri ungliyaan aur pair alag ho rahe hain, mera jaw aur facial features develop ho rahe hain, aur mera brain laakhon nayi connections banata ja raha hai. Main nanhi nanhi movements bhi kar sakta hoon, bhale hi tum abhi mehsoos na kar pao.

physicalChanges.en: Your blood volume continues increasing and your body is working hard to support your baby's rapid growth. Some mothers notice their clothes fitting differently.
physicalChanges.hi: Aapka blood volume badhta ja raha hai aur aapki body baby ki tezi se growth ke liye mehnat kar rahi hai. Kuch mothers ko apne kapde alag tarah se fit hote mehsoos hote hain.

emotionalState.en: You may feel more connected to the pregnancy while still experiencing uncertainty about the future.
emotionalState.hi: Aap pregnancy se zyada juda mehsoos kar sakti hain, lekin saath hi future ko le kar thodi uncertainty bhi reh sakti hai.

selfCareTip.en: Focus on small healthy habits rather than trying to do everything perfectly.
selfCareTip.hi: Sab kuch perfect karne ki koshish ke bajaye chhoti chhoti healthy habits par dhyaan dein.

reassurance.en: Every pregnancy looks different. Comparing your journey to someone else's rarely provides useful information.
reassurance.hi: Har pregnancy alag dikhti hai. Apni journey ko kisi aur se compare karna shayad hi koi kaam ki baat batata hai.

whyNow.en: Your baby is rapidly building tissues, muscles and organs that depend on a steady supply of protein and iron.
whyNow.hi: Aapka baby tezi se tissues, muscles aur organs bana raha hai, jinke liye protein aur iron ki steady supply zaroori hai.

benefit.en: Provides high-quality protein and calcium to support your baby's rapid growth.
benefit.hi: High-quality protein aur calcium deta hai, jo aapke baby ki tezi se growth mein madad karta hai.

howToConsume.en: Paneer bhurji, paneer tikka or mixed into vegetable dishes.
howToConsume.hi: Paneer bhurji, paneer tikka ya sabzi mein mila kar.

mealIdea.en: Paneer bhurji with roti and cucumber salad.
mealIdea.hi: Paneer bhurji, roti aur kheere ke salad ke saath.

tip.en: Try including protein at breakfast to help maintain steady energy levels.
tip.hi: Breakfast mein protein shaamil karne ki koshish karein, isse energy steady rehti hai.

doThisWeek.en: Organize your medical reports, maintain healthy routines and continue taking prenatal vitamins.
doThisWeek.hi: Apne medical reports organize karein, healthy routine banaye rakhein aur prenatal vitamins lete rahein.

skipThisWeek.en: Skipping supplements because symptoms have improved.
skipThisWeek.hi: Symptoms theek ho gaye isliye supplements chhod dena.

redFlags.en: Contact your doctor if you experience heavy bleeding, severe abdominal pain, persistent vomiting with dehydration, fever, or fainting.
redFlags.hi: Apne doctor se sampark karein agar heavy bleeding, severe pet dard, lagataar ulti ke saath dehydration, bukhaar, ya behoshi ho.

myth.en: Exercise during pregnancy is dangerous.
myth.hi: Pregnancy mein exercise karna khatarnaak hai.

truth.en: Most healthy pregnancies benefit from doctor-approved physical activity.
truth.hi: Zyadatar healthy pregnancies ko doctor-approved physical activity se fayda hota hai.

affirmation.en: I am creating a safe and loving home for my baby.
affirmation.hi: Main apne baby ke liye ek safe aur pyaar bhara ghar bana rahi hoon.

reflectionPrompt.en: What family value would you most like to pass on to your child?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Apne bachche ko aap sabse zyada kaun si family value dena chahengi?

spokenLine.hi: Maa, meri chhoti ungliyan ban rahi hain.
spokenLine.en: Maa, my tiny fingers are forming.

reflectionPrompt.en: What family value would you most like to pass on?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Aap sabse zyada kaun si family value aage pahunchana chahengi?

journalPrompt.en: Write about one lesson from your childhood that shaped who you are today.
journalPrompt.hi: Apne bachpan ki ek aisi seekh ke baare mein likhein jisne aapko aaj banaya hai.

photoPrompt.en: Capture something meaningful from your childhood that you hope to share with your baby someday.
photoPrompt.hi: Apne bachpan ki koi aisi meaningful cheez capture karein jise aap kabhi apne baby ke saath share karna chahti hain.

whatSheMayFeel.en: Tired but hopeful as she moves closer to the end of the first trimester.
whatSheMayFeel.hi: Thaki hui par umeed se bhari, kyunki woh first trimester ke ant ke kareeb pahunch rahi hai.

whatYouCanDo.en: Help organize appointments, reports and upcoming pregnancy milestones.
whatYouCanDo.hi: Appointments, reports aur aane wale pregnancy milestones organize karne mein madad karein.

oneMission.en: Create a folder for all pregnancy records and scan reports.
oneMission.hi: Saari pregnancy records aur scan reports ke liye ek folder banayein.

shareMessage.en: Ten weeks of love, growth and anticipation already ❤
shareMessage.hi: Das hafton ka pyaar, growth aur intezaar pehle se hi ❤

weekHeadline.en: Your baby is becoming more active, and many important body systems are now functioning together.
weekHeadline.hi: Tumhara baby ab zyada active ho raha hai, aur kai important body systems ab saath mil kar kaam kar rahe hain.

reveal.en: Maa, I'm stretching, kicking and growing stronger every day, even if you can't feel me yet.
reveal.hi: Maa, main har din stretch kar raha hoon, kick maar raha hoon aur mazboot ho raha hoon, bhale tum mujhe abhi mehsoos na kar pao.

whatImDoing.en: My fingers and toes are fully separated, my bones are beginning to harden, and I can stretch, kick and move inside my tiny world. My facial features are becoming more recognizable every day.
whatImDoing.hi: Meri ungliyaan aur paer ki ungliyaan poori tarah alag ho gayi hain, meri haddiyan mazboot honi shuru ho rahi hain, aur main apni chhoti si duniya mein stretch, kick aur move kar sakta hoon. Mere chehre ke features har din zyada saaf nazar aane lage hain.

physicalChanges.en: Your uterus continues expanding, and your body is producing more blood to nourish your growing baby.
physicalChanges.hi: Tumhara uterus phailta ja raha hai, aur tumhara body apne badhte baby ko nourish karne ke liye zyada blood bana raha hai.

emotionalState.en: You may feel more confident than a few weeks ago, but occasional worries and uncertainty are still completely normal.
emotionalState.hi: Kuch hafte pehle ke mukable tum zyada confident mehsoos kar sakti ho, par kabhi-kabhi fikr aur uljhan hona bilkul normal hai.

selfCareTip.en: Focus on sleep, hydration and gentle movement. Small habits create a strong foundation for the months ahead.
selfCareTip.hi: Neend, paani aur halki movement par dhyan do. Chhoti aadtein aane wale mahino ke liye mazboot neenv banati hain.

reassurance.en: Every mother experiences pregnancy differently. There is no 'correct' way to feel.
reassurance.hi: Har maa pregnancy ko alag tarah se mehsoos karti hai. Mehsoos karne ka koi 'sahi' tareeka nahi hota.

whyNow.en: Pregnancy hormones can slow digestion and increase the likelihood of constipation.
whyNow.hi: Pregnancy hormones digestion ko slow kar sakte hain aur kabz ki sambhavna badha sakte hain.

benefit.en: Rich in fiber and Vitamin C, helping support digestion and immunity.
benefit.hi: Fiber aur Vitamin C se bharpoor, jo digestion aur immunity ko support karta hai.

howToConsume.en: Fresh slices as a snack or added to fruit chaat.
howToConsume.hi: Taaze tukdon ko snack ki tarah khao ya fruit chaat mein daal lo.

mealIdea.en: Vegetable oats upma with a side of guava.
mealIdea.hi: Vegetable oats upma amrood ke saath.

tip.en: Increase water intake whenever you increase fiber intake.
tip.hi: Jab bhi fiber badhao, paani ka intake bhi badha do.

doThisWeek.en: Prioritize sleep, continue healthy routines and celebrate how far you've already come.
doThisWeek.hi: Neend ko priority do, healthy routines jaari rakho aur jashn manao ki tum yahan tak pahunch gayi ho.

skipThisWeek.en: Comparing your bump size, symptoms or weight gain with others.
skipThisWeek.hi: Apne bump ka size, symptoms ya weight gain dusron se compare karna.

redFlags.en: Contact your doctor if you experience heavy bleeding, severe abdominal pain, persistent vomiting, fever, fainting or severe dehydration.
redFlags.hi: Apne doctor se sampark karo agar zyada bleeding, pet mein tez dard, lagataar ulti, bukhar, behoshi ya tez dehydration ho.

myth.en: Every pregnancy bump should look the same.
myth.hi: Har pregnancy bump ek jaisa dikhna chahiye.

truth.en: Bump shape and size vary significantly between women and pregnancies.
truth.hi: Bump ka shape aur size har aurat aur har pregnancy mein kaafi alag hota hai.

affirmation.en: I celebrate every small milestone on this journey.
affirmation.hi: Main is safar ke har chhote milestone ka jashn manati hoon.

reflectionPrompt.en: What has surprised you most about pregnancy so far?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Ab tak pregnancy ki kaunsi baat ne tumhe sabse zyada hairaan kiya?

spokenLine.hi: Maa, ek din main tumhara haath pakadunga.
spokenLine.en: Maa, one day I will hold your hand.

reflectionPrompt.en: What has surprised you most about pregnancy so far?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Ab tak pregnancy ki kaunsi baat ne tumhe sabse zyada hairaan kiya?

journalPrompt.en: Record the most unexpected thing you have experienced since becoming pregnant.
journalPrompt.hi: Pregnant hone ke baad jo sabse anokhi cheez tumne anubhav ki, use likho.

photoPrompt.en: Take a candid photo that captures this stage of your pregnancy journey.
photoPrompt.hi: Ek candid photo lo jo tumhari pregnancy ke is stage ko capture kare.

whatSheMayFeel.en: More confident than before, but still looking for reassurance from time to time.
whatSheMayFeel.hi: Pehle se zyada confident, par kabhi-kabhi thoda reassurance bhi dhoondhti hui.

whatYouCanDo.en: Celebrate progress instead of focusing only on future milestones.
whatYouCanDo.hi: Sirf future milestones par dhyan dene ke bajaye progress ka jashn manao.

oneMission.en: Plan a simple treat, outing or surprise that helps her feel appreciated.
oneMission.hi: Ek simple treat, outing ya surprise plan karo jisse use khaas mehsoos ho.

shareMessage.en: Look how far we've already come together ❤
shareMessage.hi: Dekho, ab tak hum dono saath mein kitni door aa gaye hain ❤

weekHeadline.en: You've reached a major milestone. Your baby's organs are formed and the first trimester is coming to an end.
weekHeadline.hi: Tum ek bade milestone tak pahunch gayi ho. Tumhare baby ke organs ban chuke hain aur pehla trimester khatam hone ko hai.

reveal.en: Maa, we did it. We've completed our first big chapter together.
reveal.hi: Maa, humne kar dikhaya. Humne saath mein apna pehla bada chapter poora kar liya.

whatImDoing.en: Most of my major organs have formed and are beginning to function. I can move my arms and legs, open and close my tiny fingers, and my reflexes are developing every day.
whatImDoing.hi: Mere zyadatar major organs ban chuke hain aur kaam karna shuru kar rahe hain. Main apne haath-pair hila sakta hoon, apni nanhi ungliyaan khol-band kar sakta hoon, aur mere reflexes har din develop ho rahe hain.

physicalChanges.en: Your uterus is now much larger than before and your body has adapted significantly to support your growing baby.
physicalChanges.hi: Tumhara uterus ab pehle se kaafi bada ho gaya hai aur tumhara body apne badhte baby ko support karne ke liye kaafi adjust ho chuka hai.

emotionalState.en: Many mothers feel relief, gratitude and renewed confidence as they reach the end of the first trimester.
emotionalState.hi: Pehle trimester ke ant tak pahunchte hue kayi maaon ko rahat, kritagyata aur naya confidence mehsoos hota hai.

selfCareTip.en: Take a moment to celebrate how much your body has accomplished during the past three months.
selfCareTip.hi: Ek pal rukkar celebrate karo ki tumhare body ne in teen mahino mein kitna kuch achieve kiya hai.

reassurance.en: The first trimester can feel long and exhausting. Reaching this milestone is worth celebrating.
reassurance.hi: Pehla trimester lamba aur thaka dene wala lag sakta hai. Is milestone tak pahunchna celebrate karne layak hai.

whyNow.en: Your blood volume is increasing rapidly to support your growing baby and placenta.
whyNow.hi: Tumhara blood volume tumhare badhte baby aur placenta ko support karne ke liye tezi se badh raha hai.

benefit.en: Rich in Vitamin C, which helps improve iron absorption and supports immunity.
benefit.hi: Vitamin C se bharpoor, jo iron absorption behtar karne aur immunity support karne mein madad karta hai.

howToConsume.en: Fresh, as juice, or mixed into chutneys.
howToConsume.hi: Fresh, juice ke roop mein, ya chutney mein milakar.

mealIdea.en: Rajma rice with salad and fresh amla.
mealIdea.hi: Rajma chawal salad aur fresh amla ke saath.

tip.en: Pair iron-rich foods with Vitamin C-rich foods to improve absorption.
tip.hi: Iron-rich foods ko Vitamin C-rich foods ke saath khao taaki absorption behtar ho.

doThisWeek.en: Celebrate completing the first trimester, review upcoming appointments and continue healthy habits.
doThisWeek.hi: Pehla trimester poora hone ka celebrate karo, aane wale appointments dekho aur healthy habits jaari rakho.

skipThisWeek.en: Stopping healthy routines simply because some symptoms may start improving.
skipThisWeek.hi: Sirf isliye healthy routines band karna kyunki kuch symptoms behtar hone lage hain.

redFlags.en: Contact your doctor if you experience heavy bleeding, severe abdominal pain, persistent vomiting with dehydration, fever, severe headache or fainting.
redFlags.hi: Agar heavy bleeding, tez pet dard, dehydration ke saath lagatar ulti, bukhaar, tez sar dard ya behoshi ho to apne doctor se contact karo.

myth.en: The difficult part is over now.
myth.hi: Mushkil hissa ab khatam ho gaya hai.

truth.en: Each trimester brings new experiences, milestones and challenges.
truth.hi: Har trimester naye experiences, milestones aur challenges laata hai.

affirmation.en: We have completed our first beautiful milestone together.
affirmation.hi: Humne saath mein apna pehla khoobsurat milestone poora kar liya hai.

reflectionPrompt.en: How would you describe your first trimester journey?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Tum apne pehle trimester ke safar ko kaise describe karogi?

spokenLine.hi: Maa, humne pehla padaav paar kar liya.
spokenLine.en: Maa, we have crossed our first milestone.

reflectionPrompt.en: How has the first trimester changed you?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Pehle trimester ne tumhe kaise badla hai?

journalPrompt.en: Write a letter to your future self describing this moment and everything you've learned so far.
journalPrompt.hi: Apne future self ko ek letter likho jisme is pal aur ab tak jo kuch tumne seekha hai woh sab ho.

photoPrompt.en: Capture a special photo celebrating the completion of your first trimester.
photoPrompt.hi: Apne pehle trimester ke poore hone ka jashn manate hue ek special photo lo.

whatSheMayFeel.en: Relieved, proud, emotional and grateful to have completed the first trimester.
whatSheMayFeel.hi: Rahat, garv, emotional aur kritagya ki pehla trimester poora ho gaya.

whatYouCanDo.en: Acknowledge everything she has been through and celebrate this important milestone.
whatYouCanDo.hi: Woh jo kuch sehkar aayi hai use samjho aur is important milestone ko celebrate karo.

oneMission.en: Tell her what you are most proud of from the first trimester journey.
oneMission.hi: Use batao ki pehle trimester ke safar se tumhe sabse zyada garv kis baat par hai.

shareMessage.en: First trimester complete ❤ Look how far we've already come together.
shareMessage.hi: Pehla trimester poora ❤ Dekho hum saath mein kitni door aa chuke hain.

weekHeadline.en: Welcome to the second trimester. Your baby is growing rapidly and many mothers begin feeling more energetic.
weekHeadline.hi: Second trimester mein swagat hai. Tumhara baby tezi se badh raha hai aur kai mothers ab jyada energetic feel karne lagti hain.

reveal.en: Maa, we've entered a brand new chapter together.
reveal.hi: Maa, hum dono ne saath mein ek naya chapter shuru kiya hai.

whatImDoing.en: My vocal cords are forming, my fingerprints are beginning to develop, and my bones continue getting stronger. I can move around freely inside my tiny world.
whatImDoing.hi: Mere vocal cords ban rahe hain, fingerprints develop hone lage hain, aur meri haddiyan aur mazboot ho rahi hain. Main apni chhoti si duniya mein aaraam se ghoom sakta hoon.

physicalChanges.en: For many mothers, nausea begins improving and energy levels slowly return. Your uterus continues expanding upward from the pelvis.
physicalChanges.hi: Kai mothers ke liye nausea ab kam hone lagta hai aur energy dheere-dheere wapas aati hai. Tumhara uterus pelvis se upar ki taraf badhta rehta hai.

emotionalState.en: Relief and excitement often replace some of the uncertainty of the first trimester.
emotionalState.hi: First trimester ki kai uljhanon ki jagah ab raahat aur excitement le leti hai.

selfCareTip.en: Use your returning energy to establish healthy habits that can support you throughout the second trimester.
selfCareTip.hi: Apni wapas aati energy ka istemaal aise healthy habits banane mein karo jo poore second trimester mein tumhara saath denge.

reassurance.en: Every pregnancy progresses differently. It's normal if your symptoms haven't changed dramatically yet.
reassurance.hi: Har pregnancy alag tarah se aage badhti hai. Agar tumhare symptoms abhi tak jyada nahi badle to yeh normal hai.

whyNow.en: Your baby's growth rate is increasing and your body is producing more blood than ever before.
whyNow.hi: Tumhare baby ki growth tez ho rahi hai aur tumhari body pehle se kahin jyada blood bana rahi hai.

benefit.en: Provides iron, folate and antioxidants that support healthy growth.
benefit.hi: Iron, Folate aur antioxidants deta hai jo healthy growth mein madad karte hain.

howToConsume.en: Palak dal, palak paneer or blended into soups.
howToConsume.hi: Palak dal, palak paneer ya soup mein blend karke.

mealIdea.en: Palak paneer with roti and cucumber salad.
mealIdea.hi: Palak paneer roti aur kheere ke salad ke saath.

tip.en: Continue focusing on nutrient quality rather than simply eating more food.
tip.hi: Sirf jyada khaane ke bajaye nutrient quality par dhyaan dete raho.

doThisWeek.en: Take your first bump photo, begin a pregnancy journal and celebrate entering the second trimester.
doThisWeek.hi: Apni pehli bump photo lo, ek pregnancy journal shuru karo aur second trimester mein aane ka jashn manao.

skipThisWeek.en: Feeling guilty if pregnancy doesn't always feel magical or exciting.
skipThisWeek.hi: Agar pregnancy hamesha magical ya exciting na lage to guilty feel karna.

redFlags.en: Contact your doctor if you experience heavy bleeding, severe abdominal pain, fever, severe headaches, or sudden swelling.
redFlags.hi: Agar zyada bleeding, tez pet dard, bukhaar, tez sir dard ya achanak soojan ho to apne doctor se sampark karo.

myth.en: Good mothers instantly feel bonded to their baby.
myth.hi: Achhi mothers turant apne baby se bond feel kar leti hain.

truth.en: Bonding develops differently for everyone and often grows gradually over time.
truth.hi: Bonding har kisi ke liye alag tarah se develop hoti hai aur aksar samay ke saath dheere-dheere badhti hai.

affirmation.en: I welcome this new chapter with confidence and gratitude.
affirmation.hi: Main is naye chapter ko confidence aur shukrana ke saath apna rahi hoon.

reflectionPrompt.en: What excites you most about becoming a parent?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Parent banne ke baare mein aapko sabse jyada kya excite karta hai?

spokenLine.hi: Maa, meri pehchaan ban rahi hai.
spokenLine.en: Maa, my unique identity is beginning to form.

reflectionPrompt.en: What excites you most about becoming a parent?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Parent banne ke baare mein aapko sabse jyada kya excite karta hai?

journalPrompt.en: Describe your first image of life with your baby.
journalPrompt.hi: Apne baby ke saath zindagi ki apni pehli image ko describe karein.

photoPrompt.en: Take your first dedicated bump photo and save it as the beginning of your second-trimester journey.
photoPrompt.hi: Apni pehli khaas bump photo lein aur use apne second-trimester safar ki shuruaat ke roop mein save karein.

whatSheMayFeel.en: More energetic, optimistic and excited about the months ahead.
whatSheMayFeel.hi: Jyada energetic, optimistic aur aane wale mahino ko lekar excited.

whatYouCanDo.en: Encourage enjoyable activities she may have missed during the first trimester.
whatYouCanDo.hi: Aisi maze ki activities ko encourage karo jo woh first trimester mein miss kar gayi ho.

oneMission.en: Take your first official bump photo together and celebrate entering the second trimester.
oneMission.hi: Saath mein apni pehli official bump photo lo aur second trimester mein aane ka jashn manao.

shareMessage.en: A new chapter begins today ❤ Our little one is growing beautifully.
shareMessage.hi: Aaj ek naya chapter shuru hota hai ❤ Hamara nanha bahut khoobsurati se badh raha hai.

weekHeadline.en: Your baby's face is becoming more expressive, and tiny movements happen throughout the day.
weekHeadline.hi: Tumhare baby ka chehra ab zyada expressive ho raha hai, aur din bhar nanhi-nanhi movements hoti rehti hain.

reveal.en: Maa, I'm starting to make tiny expressions and becoming more uniquely me every day.
reveal.hi: Maa, main ab nanhe expressions banane laga hoon aur har din aur thoda apne jaisa unique banta ja raha hoon.

whatImDoing.en: My facial muscles are developing, allowing me to make tiny expressions. My neck is becoming stronger, and my body is growing faster than my head for the first time.
whatImDoing.hi: Mere chehre ki muscles develop ho rahi hain, jisse main nanhe expressions bana paata hoon. Meri gardan mazboot ho rahi hai, aur pehli baar mera body mere sar se zyada tezi se badh raha hai.

physicalChanges.en: Your uterus is growing steadily and your bump may begin becoming more noticeable. Many mothers experience improved energy levels.
physicalChanges.hi: Tumhara uterus lagatar badh raha hai aur tumhara bump ab thoda zyada dikhne lag sakta hai. Bahut si mothers ko energy levels behtar mehsoos hote hain.

emotionalState.en: You may feel more connected to your baby as pregnancy starts becoming visible to the outside world.
emotionalState.hi: Jab pregnancy bahar ki duniya ko dikhne lagti hai, tab tum apne baby se aur zyada juda hua mehsoos kar sakti ho.

selfCareTip.en: Pay attention to posture as your center of gravity slowly begins shifting.
selfCareTip.hi: Apne posture par dhyan do kyunki tumhara center of gravity dheere-dheere shift hone laga hai.

reassurance.en: Not having a visible bump yet is completely normal. Every body shows pregnancy differently.
reassurance.hi: Abhi tak bump na dikhna bilkul normal hai. Har body pregnancy ko alag tareeke se dikhati hai.

whyNow.en: Your baby's bones are becoming stronger and need a steady supply of calcium and protein.
whyNow.hi: Tumhare baby ki haddiyaan mazboot ho rahi hain aur unhe lagatar calcium aur protein ki zaroorat hai.

benefit.en: One of India's richest natural sources of calcium and also provides fiber and iron.
benefit.hi: Calcium ke India ke sabse richest natural sources mein se ek, aur saath hi fiber aur iron bhi deti hai.

howToConsume.en: Ragi dosa, ragi porridge or ragi roti.
howToConsume.hi: Ragi dosa, ragi porridge ya ragi roti.

mealIdea.en: Ragi dosa with curd and vegetable chutney.
mealIdea.hi: Dahi aur sabzi chutney ke saath ragi dosa.

tip.en: Spread calcium-rich foods across the day for better absorption.
tip.hi: Behtar absorption ke liye calcium-rich foods ko din bhar mein bantkar khao.

doThisWeek.en: Take weekly bump photos, continue gentle exercise and focus on maintaining healthy routines.
doThisWeek.hi: Har hafte bump ki photo lo, halki exercise jaari rakho aur healthy routine banaye rakhne par dhyan do.

skipThisWeek.en: Buying every baby product you see online.
skipThisWeek.hi: Online dikhne wala har baby product khareed lena.

redFlags.en: Contact your doctor if you experience heavy bleeding, severe abdominal pain, persistent headaches, fever or fluid leakage.
redFlags.hi: Apne doctor se sampark karo agar tumhe heavy bleeding, tez pet dard, lagatar sar dard, bukhaar ya fluid leakage ho.

myth.en: A bigger bump means a bigger baby.
myth.hi: Bada bump matlab bada baby.

truth.en: Bump size depends on many factors and does not reliably predict baby size.
truth.hi: Bump ka size kai cheezon par depend karta hai aur isse baby ke size ka theek andaza nahi lagta.

affirmation.en: My baby feels my love every day.
affirmation.hi: Mera baby har din mera pyaar mehsoos karta hai.

reflectionPrompt.en: What do you hope your baby learns from you?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Aap chahti hain ki aapka baby aapse kya seekhe?

spokenLine.hi: Maa, main chhoti chhoti expressions bana raha hoon.
spokenLine.en: Maa, I am making tiny facial expressions.

reflectionPrompt.en: What do you hope your baby learns from you?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Aap chahti hain ki aapka baby aapse kya seekhe?

journalPrompt.en: Write about the qualities you admire most in others and hope to pass on.
journalPrompt.hi: Doosron mein jo qualities aapko sabse zyada pasand hain aur jo aap aage pohanchana chahti hain, unke baare mein likho.

photoPrompt.en: Capture your growing bump and save a memory from this week.
photoPrompt.hi: Apne badhte bump ko capture karo aur is hafte ki ek yaad sambhal lo.

whatSheMayFeel.en: Excited as pregnancy becomes more visible and real.
whatSheMayFeel.hi: Khush, kyunki pregnancy ab zyada dikhne aur real lagne lagi hai.

whatYouCanDo.en: Notice and appreciate her changing body with kindness and encouragement.
whatYouCanDo.hi: Unke badalte body ko pyaar aur hosla dete hue notice aur appreciate karein.

oneMission.en: Give her a genuine compliment about something beyond appearance today.
oneMission.hi: Aaj unhe unke roop se hatkar kisi cheez ke liye ek sachcha compliment do.

shareMessage.en: Our little family is growing in every way ❤
shareMessage.hi: Hamara nanha parivar har tarah se badh raha hai ❤

weekHeadline.en: Your baby's body is growing quickly, and tiny movements are becoming more coordinated every day.
weekHeadline.hi: Aapke baby ka body tezi se badh raha hai, aur choti harkatein har din aur coordinated ho rahi hain.

reveal.en: Maa, I am stretching, moving and growing stronger with each passing day.
reveal.hi: Maa, main har guzarte din ke saath stretch kar raha hoon, hil raha hoon aur mazboot ho raha hoon.

whatImDoing.en: My muscles and bones are becoming stronger. I can move my arms, legs and joints more smoothly now. My ears are developing, and I am preparing to hear the world around me in the weeks ahead.
whatImDoing.hi: Meri muscles aur haddiyaan mazboot ho rahi hain. Main apne haath, pair aur joints ko ab zyada smoothly hila sakta hoon. Mere kaan develop ho rahe hain, aur main aane wale hafton mein aaspaas ki duniya sunne ki taiyaari kar raha hoon.

physicalChanges.en: Your bump may become more noticeable now. Increased blood flow can give your skin a healthy glow, while your growing uterus may cause occasional stretching sensations.
physicalChanges.hi: Aapka bump ab zyada dikhne lag sakta hai. Badha hua blood flow aapki skin ko healthy glow de sakta hai, jabki aapka badhta uterus kabhi-kabhi stretching feel de sakta hai.

emotionalState.en: Many mothers feel more settled and optimistic during this stage, while also beginning to imagine life after birth.
emotionalState.hi: Is stage par bahut si maaein zyada settled aur umeed se bhari mehsoos karti hain, saath hi birth ke baad ki life imagine karne lagti hain.

selfCareTip.en: Stay active with gentle movement and focus on maintaining good posture as your body changes.
selfCareTip.hi: Halke movement ke saath active rahein aur jaise jaise body badalti hai, achhi posture banaye rakhne par dhyan dein.

reassurance.en: Mild stretching and pulling sensations are common as your uterus expands to make room for your growing baby.
reassurance.hi: Halki stretching aur khinchav jaisi feeling aam hai kyunki aapka uterus badhte baby ke liye jagah banane ke liye phailta hai.

whyNow.en: Your baby's bones and future teeth are developing rapidly and need calcium and Vitamin D.
whyNow.hi: Aapke baby ki haddiyaan aur future daant tezi se develop ho rahe hain aur unhe calcium aur Vitamin D chahiye.

benefit.en: Provides calcium, healthy fats and important minerals that support bone development.
benefit.hi: Calcium, healthy fats aur zaroori minerals deta hai jo bone development mein madad karte hain.

howToConsume.en: Til laddoo, sprinkled over salads or mixed into chutneys.
howToConsume.hi: Til laddoo, salad par chhidak kar ya chutney mein milakar.

mealIdea.en: Ragi porridge with nuts and a bowl of curd.
mealIdea.hi: Ragi porridge nuts ke saath aur ek bowl dahi.

tip.en: Spend a little time in morning sunlight if advised by your doctor and continue any prescribed Vitamin D supplements.
tip.hi: Agar doctor salaah dein to subah ki dhoop mein thoda samay bitayein aur koi bhi prescribed Vitamin D supplement lete rahein.

doThisWeek.en: Talk to your baby every day, continue healthy routines and make time for relaxation.
doThisWeek.hi: Roz apne baby se baat karein, healthy routines jaari rakhein aur relaxation ke liye samay nikalein.

skipThisWeek.en: Ignoring stress or pushing yourself to maintain your pre-pregnancy pace.
skipThisWeek.hi: Stress ko nazarandaaz karna ya khud ko pre-pregnancy wali pace par chalne ke liye push karna.

redFlags.en: Contact your doctor if you experience bleeding, severe abdominal pain, fluid leakage, persistent severe headaches or fever.
redFlags.hi: Agar aapko bleeding, tez pet dard, fluid leakage, lagatar tez sir dard ya bukhar ho to apne doctor se contact karein.

myth.en: Babies cannot benefit from hearing your voice before birth.
myth.hi: Babies birth se pehle aapki awaaz sunne ka faayda nahi le sakte.

truth.en: Your baby is already developing the structures needed for hearing and will soon begin recognizing familiar sounds.
truth.hi: Aapka baby pehle se hi sunne ke liye zaroori structures develop kar raha hai aur jald hi jaane-pehchaane sounds pehchanne lagega.

affirmation.en: I am building a bond that will last a lifetime.
affirmation.hi: Main ek aisa bond bana rahi hoon jo zindagi bhar rahega.

reflectionPrompt.en: When do you feel closest to your baby?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Aap apne baby ke sabse kareeb kab mehsoos karti hain?

spokenLine.hi: Maa, meri duniya badh rahi hai.
spokenLine.en: Maa, my world is expanding.

reflectionPrompt.en: When do you feel closest to your baby?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Aap apne baby ke sabse kareeb kab mehsoos karti hain?

journalPrompt.en: Describe the moments when pregnancy feels most real to you.
journalPrompt.hi: Woh pal likhein jab pregnancy aapko sabse zyada real lagti hai.

photoPrompt.en: Capture your favorite pregnancy moment from this week.
photoPrompt.hi: Is hafte ka apna favourite pregnancy moment capture karein.

whatSheMayFeel.en: Increasingly connected to the baby and excited about the journey ahead.
whatSheMayFeel.hi: Baby se aur juda hua aur aage ke safar ke liye excited.

whatYouCanDo.en: Join her in bonding activities like talking, reading or singing to the baby.
whatYouCanDo.hi: Bonding activities mein uske saath judein jaise baby se baat karna, padhna ya gaana gaana.

oneMission.en: Read a short story or share a favorite childhood memory with the baby together.
oneMission.hi: Saath milkar baby ke liye ek choti kahani padhein ya koi favourite bachpan ki yaad share karein.

shareMessage.en: Our little one is growing stronger every day and so is our bond ❤
shareMessage.hi: Hamara nanha har din aur mazboot ho raha hai aur hamara bond bhi ❤

weekHeadline.en: Your baby is growing stronger, and the tiny structures needed for hearing are becoming more developed.
weekHeadline.hi: Aapka baby aur mazboot ho raha hai, aur sunne ke liye zaroori nanhe structures ab zyada develop ho rahe hain.

reveal.en: Maa, I am growing stronger every day and getting ready to hear your voice.
reveal.hi: Maa, main har din aur mazboot ho raha hoon aur tumhari awaaz sunne ke liye taiyaar ho raha hoon.

whatImDoing.en: My bones are hardening, my muscles are becoming stronger and my ears are developing rapidly. Soon I will begin responding to sounds from the outside world.
whatImDoing.hi: Meri haddiyan mazboot ho rahi hain, mere muscles strong ho rahe hain aur mere kaan tezi se develop ho rahe hain. Jald hi main bahar ki duniya ki aawaazon par react karna shuru karunga.

physicalChanges.en: Your uterus is continuing to expand, and your bump may now be clearly visible. Some mothers notice increased energy and a healthy pregnancy glow.
physicalChanges.hi: Aapka uterus phailta ja raha hai, aur aapka bump ab saaf dikhne lag sakta hai. Kuch mothers ko zyada energy aur ek healthy pregnancy glow mehsoos hota hai.

emotionalState.en: Many mothers feel more confident and emotionally settled during this phase of pregnancy.
emotionalState.hi: Bahut si mothers pregnancy ke is phase mein zyada confident aur emotionally settled mehsoos karti hain.

selfCareTip.en: Focus on posture and wear supportive footwear as your center of gravity gradually shifts.
selfCareTip.hi: Posture par dhyaan dein aur supportive footwear pehnein, kyunki aapka center of gravity dheere dheere shift ho raha hai.

reassurance.en: Mild aches and stretching sensations are often a normal sign of your body adapting to pregnancy.
reassurance.hi: Halke dard aur khinchaav ka mehsoos hona aksar normal hai, yeh aapki body ke pregnancy ke saath adjust hone ka sign hai.

whyNow.en: Your baby's skeleton is strengthening rapidly as bones continue replacing soft cartilage.
whyNow.hi: Aapke baby ka skeleton tezi se mazboot ho raha hai kyunki haddiyan soft cartilage ki jagah lengi.

benefit.en: Provides calcium, iron and fiber that support healthy bone development.
benefit.hi: Calcium, iron aur fiber deta hai, jo healthy bone development mein madad karte hain.

howToConsume.en: Ragi dosa, ragi porridge or ragi roti.
howToConsume.hi: Ragi dosa, ragi porridge ya ragi roti.

mealIdea.en: Ragi cheela with curd and mint chutney.
mealIdea.hi: Ragi cheela, dahi aur pudine ki chutney ke saath.

tip.en: Bone-building nutrients work best when consumed consistently throughout the week.
tip.hi: Haddiyan banane wale nutrients tab sabse achha kaam karte hain jab unhe poore hafte regular liya jaye.

doThisWeek.en: Spend time outdoors, continue daily movement and begin speaking to your baby regularly.
doThisWeek.hi: Bahar samay bitayein, daily movement jaari rakhein aur apne baby se regular baat karna shuru karein.

skipThisWeek.en: Standing for very long periods without breaks.
skipThisWeek.hi: Bina break ke bahut der tak khade rehna.

redFlags.en: Contact your doctor if you experience bleeding, severe abdominal pain, fluid leakage, severe headaches or sudden swelling.
redFlags.hi: Apne doctor se sampark karein agar bleeding, severe pet dard, fluid leakage, severe sir dard ya achanak sujan ho.

myth.en: If you feel good, you don't need extra rest.
myth.hi: Agar aap achha mehsoos kar rahi hain, to aapko extra rest ki zaroorat nahi hai.

truth.en: Your body is still doing tremendous work even when symptoms improve.
truth.hi: Aapki body abhi bhi bahut mehnat kar rahi hai, bhale hi symptoms theek ho jaayein.

affirmation.en: Every day strengthens the connection between my baby and me.
affirmation.hi: Har din mere aur mere baby ke beech ka connection mazboot karta hai.

reflectionPrompt.en: What would you like your baby to know about you?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Aap apne baby ko apne baare mein kya batana chahengi?

spokenLine.hi: Maa, jaldi hi main tumhari awaaz sununga.
spokenLine.en: Maa, soon I will hear your voice.

reflectionPrompt.en: What would you like your baby to know about you?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Aap apne baby ko apne baare mein kya batana chahengi?

journalPrompt.en: Tell your baby about who you are today, your dreams, your strengths and what matters most to you.
journalPrompt.hi: Apne baby ko bataayein ki aaj aap kaun hain, aapke sapne, aapki strengths aur jo aapke liye sabse zyada maayne rakhta hai.

photoPrompt.en: Take a relaxed outdoor photo that captures this stage of your journey.
photoPrompt.hi: Ek relaxed outdoor photo lein jo aapki journey ke is stage ko capture kare.

whatSheMayFeel.en: More confident, settled and excited as pregnancy becomes increasingly visible.
whatSheMayFeel.hi: Zyada confident, settled aur excited, kyunki pregnancy ab dikhne lag rahi hai.

whatYouCanDo.en: Support healthy routines and encourage moments of rest when needed.
whatYouCanDo.hi: Healthy routines support karein aur zaroorat padne par rest ke moments ke liye protsahit karein.

oneMission.en: Go for a walk together and spend time talking about your future as parents.
oneMission.hi: Saath mein walk par jaayein aur parents ke roop mein apne future ke baare mein baat karein.

shareMessage.en: Our little one is growing stronger every day ❤
shareMessage.hi: Hamara nanha sa har din aur mazboot ho raha hai ❤

weekHeadline.en: Your baby's skeleton is becoming stronger, body fat is slowly developing, and movements are becoming more coordinated.
weekHeadline.hi: Tumhare baby ka skeleton mazboot ho raha hai, body fat dheere-dheere ban raha hai, aur movements zyada coordinated ho rahi hain.

reveal.en: Maa, I am stretching, kicking and growing stronger every single day.
reveal.hi: Maa, main har ek din stretch kar raha hoon, kick maar raha hoon aur mazboot ho raha hoon.

whatImDoing.en: My skeleton is changing from soft cartilage into stronger bone. My muscles are becoming more powerful and I am practicing movements that will help me grow and develop.
whatImDoing.hi: Mera skeleton naram cartilage se mazboot haddi mein badal raha hai. Meri muscles aur powerful ho rahi hain aur main aisi movements practice kar raha hoon jo mujhe badhne mein madad karengi.

funFact.en: Although you may not feel me yet, I am already moving, stretching and practicing tiny kicks throughout the day.
funFact.hi: Bhale tum mujhe abhi mehsoos na kar pao, par main din bhar move, stretch aur nanhi kicks practice kar raha hoon.

physicalChanges.en: Your bump is becoming more noticeable and your uterus continues expanding upward. Your blood volume is increasing significantly to support your growing baby.
physicalChanges.hi: Tumhara bump ab zyada saaf dikhne laga hai aur tumhara uterus upar ki taraf phailta ja raha hai. Tumhare baby ko support karne ke liye tumhara blood volume kaafi badh raha hai.

emotionalState.en: Excitement often increases around this time as mothers begin anticipating the first noticeable baby movements.
emotionalState.hi: Is samay aksar excitement badh jaati hai kyunki maaein baby ki pehli mehsoos hone wali movements ka intezaar karne lagti hain.

commonSymptoms.hi: Jaldi khade hone par kabhi-kabhi chakkar

selfCareTip.en: Change positions slowly and stay hydrated throughout the day.
selfCareTip.hi: Position dheere se badlo aur din bhar paani peeti raho.

reassurance.en: Not feeling movement yet is completely normal. Many first-time mothers won't feel kicks for a few more weeks.
reassurance.hi: Abhi movement mehsoos na hona bilkul normal hai. Kai pehli baar maa banne wali aurton ko kuch aur hafton tak kicks mehsoos nahi hoti.

whyNow.en: Your baby's muscles are growing rapidly and need a steady supply of protein and key minerals.
whyNow.hi: Tumhare baby ki muscles tezi se badh rahi hain aur unhe protein aur khaas minerals ki steady supply chahiye.

benefit.en: Provides high-quality plant protein and important minerals that support muscle growth.
benefit.hi: High-quality plant protein aur important minerals deta hai jo muscle growth ko support karte hain.

howToConsume.en: Moong dal khichdi, dal soup or moong chilla.
howToConsume.hi: Moong dal khichdi, dal soup ya moong chilla.

mealIdea.en: Moong dal chilla stuffed with paneer and vegetables.
mealIdea.hi: Paneer aur sabziyon se bhara moong dal chilla.

tip.en: Aim to include a protein source at breakfast, lunch and dinner.
tip.hi: Koshish karo ki breakfast, lunch aur dinner mein ek protein source zaroor ho.

doThisWeek.en: Pay attention to new sensations in your abdomen and continue building healthy daily routines.
doThisWeek.hi: Apne pet mein nayi sensations par dhyan do aur healthy daily routines banate raho.

skipThisWeek.en: Worrying if you haven't felt the baby move yet.
skipThisWeek.hi: Fikr karna agar abhi tak baby ki movement mehsoos nahi hui.

redFlags.en: Contact your doctor if you experience heavy bleeding, severe abdominal pain, fluid leakage, severe headaches, fever or significant swelling.
redFlags.hi: Apne doctor se sampark karo agar zyada bleeding, pet mein tez dard, fluid leakage, tez sir dard, bukhar ya kaafi sujan ho.

myth.en: Every mother feels baby movements by Week 17.
myth.hi: Har maa Week 17 tak baby ki movements mehsoos kar leti hai.

truth.en: Movement timing varies widely, especially in first pregnancies.
truth.hi: Movement ka samay kaafi alag-alag hota hai, khaaskar pehli pregnancy mein.

affirmation.en: I nurture my baby with calm thoughts and loving intentions.
affirmation.hi: Main apne baby ko shaant vichaaron aur pyaar bhare iraadon se palti hoon.

reflectionPrompt.en: What quality would you most like your child to have?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Kaunsi quality tum apne bachhe mein sabse zyada chahogi?

spokenLine.hi: Maa, main roz aur mazboot ho raha hoon.
spokenLine.en: Maa, I am becoming stronger every day.

reflectionPrompt.en: What quality would you most love your child to have?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Kaunsi quality tum apne bachhe mein sabse zyada pasand karogi?

journalPrompt.en: Write about the kind of person you hope your child becomes and why those qualities matter to you.
journalPrompt.hi: Likho ki tum apne bachhe ko kaisa insaan banana chahti ho aur woh qualities tumhare liye kyun maayne rakhti hain.

photoPrompt.en: Capture something that represents your hopes and dreams for your child's future.
photoPrompt.hi: Kisi aisi cheez ko capture karo jo tumhare bachhe ke future ke liye tumhari umeedon aur sapno ko darshati ho.

whatSheMayFeel.en: Excited about the possibility of feeling the baby's first movements soon.
whatSheMayFeel.hi: Jaldi hi baby ki pehli movements mehsoos hone ki ummeed se excited.

whatYouCanDo.en: Share in her excitement and remind her that every pregnancy follows its own timeline.
whatYouCanDo.hi: Uski khushi mein shaamil ho jao aur use yaad dilao ki har pregnancy apne hisaab se chalti hai.

oneMission.en: Ask her what she imagines your baby will be like and spend time dreaming together.
oneMission.hi: Usse poochho ki woh sochti hai tumhara baby kaisa hoga aur saath mein sapne dekho.

shareMessage.en: Big moments are getting closer ❤
shareMessage.hi: Bade pal ab kareeb aate ja rahe hain ❤

weekHeadline.en: Your baby's ears are becoming more developed, and the brain is rapidly building connections that support learning and memory.
weekHeadline.hi: Tumhare baby ke kaan aur develop ho rahe hain, aur brain tezi se aise connections bana raha hai jo seekhne aur memory mein madad karte hain.

reveal.en: Maa, I am preparing to hear your voice and learn from the world around me.
reveal.hi: Maa, main tumhari aawaaz sunne aur apne aas-paas ki duniya se seekhne ki taiyari kar raha hoon.

whatImDoing.en: My ears are developing rapidly and my brain is creating millions of new neural connections. I can move my arms and legs with greater control and my nervous system is becoming more sophisticated.
whatImDoing.hi: Mere kaan tezi se develop ho rahe hain aur mera brain laakhon naye neural connections bana raha hai. Main apne haath-pair zyada control ke saath hila sakta hoon aur mera nervous system aur advanced ho raha hai.

funFact.en: The pathways that help me hear, learn and remember are developing quickly right now.
funFact.hi: Jo rastey mujhe sunne, seekhne aur yaad rakhne mein madad karte hain, woh abhi tezi se develop ho rahe hain.

physicalChanges.en: Your uterus continues expanding and your center of gravity is gradually shifting. Many mothers begin noticing changes in posture and balance.
physicalChanges.hi: Tumhara uterus phailta ja raha hai aur tumhara center of gravity dheere-dheere shift ho raha hai. Kayi maaon ko apne posture aur balance mein badlav dikhne lagta hai.

emotionalState.en: Excitement often builds as the anomaly scan approaches and the baby begins to feel more real than ever.
emotionalState.hi: Anomaly scan paas aate hi excitement aksar badhne lagti hai aur baby pehle se kahin zyada real lagne lagta hai.

selfCareTip.en: Pay attention to posture and avoid standing in one position for too long.
selfCareTip.hi: Posture par dhyaan do aur ek hi position mein bahut der tak khade rehne se bacho.
