reassurance.en: Feeling excited and nervous before the anomaly scan is completely normal.
reassurance.hi: Anomaly scan se pehle excited aur nervous feel karna bilkul normal hai.

whyNow.en: Your baby's brain and nervous system are developing rapidly and benefit from healthy fats.
whyNow.hi: Tumhare baby ka brain aur nervous system tezi se develop ho rahe hain aur unhe healthy fats se fayda hota hai.

benefit.en: One of the best vegetarian sources of Omega-3 fats that support brain development.
benefit.hi: Omega-3 fats ke sabse acche vegetarian sources mein se ek, jo brain development mein madad karte hain.

howToConsume.en: Use ground flaxseed in atta, curd or smoothies.
howToConsume.hi: Pisi hui alsi ko atte, dahi ya smoothies mein use karo.

mealIdea.en: Curd bowl with flaxseed powder, walnuts and seasonal fruit.
mealIdea.hi: Dahi ka bowl alsi ke powder, akhrot aur seasonal fruit ke saath.

tip.en: Ground flaxseed is absorbed much better than whole flaxseed.
tip.hi: Pisi hui alsi sabit alsi ke mukable kahin behtar absorb hoti hai.

doThisWeek.en: Prepare your questions for the anomaly scan and continue talking or reading to your baby.
doThisWeek.hi: Anomaly scan ke liye apne sawaal taiyaar karo aur apne baby se baat karte ya padhte raho.

skipThisWeek.en: Spending hours searching online for worst-case pregnancy stories.
skipThisWeek.hi: Ghanton online sabse buri pregnancy stories dhoondhna.

redFlags.en: Contact your doctor if you experience heavy bleeding, severe abdominal pain, fluid leakage, fever, severe headaches or sudden swelling.
redFlags.hi: Agar heavy bleeding, tez pet dard, fluid leakage, bukhaar, tez sar dard ya achaanak soojan ho to apne doctor se contact karo.

myth.en: The anomaly scan is mainly about finding out the baby's gender.
myth.hi: Anomaly scan mukhya roop se baby ka gender pata karne ke liye hota hai.

truth.en: The anomaly scan is primarily performed to assess your baby's growth and development.
truth.hi: Anomaly scan mukhya roop se tumhare baby ki growth aur development jaanchne ke liye kiya jaata hai.

affirmation.en: Love is already flowing between my baby and me.
affirmation.hi: Mere aur mere baby ke beech pyaar pehle se beh raha hai.

reflectionPrompt.en: What song, story or tradition would you love to share with your child?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Kaunsa gaana, kahani ya parampara tum apne bachche ke saath share karna chahogi?

spokenLine.hi: Maa, main tumhari awaaz sunne ki taiyaari kar raha hoon.
spokenLine.en: Maa, I am preparing to hear your voice.

reflectionPrompt.en: What song, book or story would you love your child to grow up with?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Kaunsa gaana, book ya kahani tum chahogi ki tumhara bachcha uske saath bada ho?

journalPrompt.en: Record a favorite childhood memory and why you hope your child experiences something similar.
journalPrompt.hi: Apne bachpan ki ek favorite memory record karo aur kyun tum chahti ho ki tumhara bachcha bhi waisa kuch experience kare.

photoPrompt.en: Take a photo of a favorite childhood book, toy, song collection or family tradition you hope to share one day.
photoPrompt.hi: Apni favorite bachpan ki book, toy, gaano ka collection ya family tradition ki photo lo jise tum ek din share karna chahti ho.

whatSheMayFeel.en: Focused on the upcoming anomaly scan and eager to learn more about the baby's development.
whatSheMayFeel.hi: Aane wale anomaly scan par dhyaan aur baby ki development ke baare mein aur jaanne ke liye utsuk.

whatYouCanDo.en: Help her prepare questions and provide reassurance if she feels anxious.
whatYouCanDo.hi: Use sawaal taiyaar karne mein madad karo aur agar woh anxious feel kare to use bharosa dilao.

oneMission.en: Attend the anomaly scan if possible and celebrate the milestone together afterward.
oneMission.hi: Ho sake to anomaly scan mein saath jao aur baad mein milestone saath mein celebrate karo.

shareMessage.en: We can't wait to learn more about our little one ❤
shareMessage.hi: Hum apne nanhe ke baare mein aur jaanne ke liye bechain hain ❤

weekHeadline.en: Your baby's senses are becoming more refined, and the protective coating that will help safeguard their skin is beginning to develop.
weekHeadline.hi: Tumhare baby ke senses ab aur refined ho rahe hain, aur uski skin ko protect karne wali coating bhi banne lagi hai.

reveal.en: Maa, I am growing stronger every day and becoming more ready for the world outside.
reveal.hi: Maa, main har din mazboot ho raha hoon aur bahar ki duniya ke liye aur tayyar hota ja raha hoon.

whatImDoing.en: My brain is continuing to develop rapidly, my senses are becoming more sophisticated, and a protective coating called vernix is beginning to form on my skin. My arms and legs are stronger, and I am becoming more active.
whatImDoing.hi: Mera brain tezi se develop ho raha hai, mere senses aur sophisticated ho rahe hain, aur meri skin par vernix naam ki ek protective coating banne lagi hai. Mere haath-pair mazboot ho rahe hain aur main aur active hota ja raha hoon.

funFact.en: I spend much of my day moving, stretching and practicing skills that will help me after birth.
funFact.hi: Main apna jyada samay hilne-dulne, stretch karne aur woh skills practice karne mein bitata hoon jo birth ke baad mere kaam aayengi.

physicalChanges.en: Your uterus is now approaching the level of your belly button. Many mothers notice more stretching sensations as the baby and uterus continue growing.
physicalChanges.hi: Tumhara uterus ab tumhare belly button ke level tak pahunch raha hai. Kai mothers ko jyada stretching ki feeling hoti hai kyunki baby aur uterus badhte rehte hain.

emotionalState.en: You may be feeling excited about the anomaly scan while also wondering what the next half of pregnancy will bring.
emotionalState.hi: Tum anomaly scan ko lekar excited feel kar sakti ho, saath hi soch sakti ho ki pregnancy ka agla aadha hissa kya laayega.

selfCareTip.en: Take short breaks throughout the day to stretch and change positions, especially if you sit for long periods.
selfCareTip.hi: Din bhar mein chhote breaks lekar stretch karo aur position badlo, khaaskar agar tum lambe samay tak baithi rehti ho.

reassurance.en: Every day your baby is becoming stronger and more developed. Growth during this phase is remarkable.
reassurance.hi: Har din tumhara baby aur mazboot aur develop ho raha hai. Is phase mein growth kamaal ki hoti hai.

whyNow.en: Your baby's skin, nervous system and overall growth benefit from healthy fats and antioxidant-rich foods.
whyNow.hi: Tumhare baby ki skin, nervous system aur overall growth ke liye healthy fats aur antioxidant-rich foods faydemand hain.

benefit.en: Provide Vitamin E, healthy fats and antioxidants that support skin and nervous system development.
benefit.hi: Vitamin E, healthy fats aur antioxidants dete hain jo skin aur nervous system ke development mein madad karte hain.

howToConsume.en: Consume 5–6 soaked almonds daily.
howToConsume.hi: Roz 5-6 bheege hue badaam khao.

mealIdea.en: A bowl of curd topped with chopped almonds, walnuts and seasonal fruit.
mealIdea.hi: Ek bowl dahi mein kate hue badaam, akhrot aur seasonal fruit daalkar.

tip.en: Choose healthy fats from whole foods instead of processed snacks.
tip.hi: Processed snacks ke bajaye whole foods se healthy fats chuno.

doThisWeek.en: Prepare emotionally for your anomaly scan and continue building your connection with your baby.
doThisWeek.hi: Apne anomaly scan ke liye emotionally tayyar raho aur apne baby ke saath apna connection banate raho.

skipThisWeek.en: Reading alarming online stories before or after your scan.
skipThisWeek.hi: Apne scan se pehle ya baad mein darawni online stories padhna.

redFlags.en: Contact your doctor if you experience heavy bleeding, severe abdominal pain, fluid leakage, fever, severe headaches or sudden swelling.
redFlags.hi: Agar zyada bleeding, tez pet dard, fluid leakage, bukhaar, tez sir dard ya achanak soojan ho to apne doctor se sampark karo.

myth.en: Every scan finds problems.
myth.hi: Har scan mein koi na koi problem nikalti hai.

truth.en: Most scans are routine and provide reassurance that babies are developing normally.
truth.hi: Jyadatar scans routine hote hain aur yeh reassurance dete hain ki babies normal develop ho rahe hain.

affirmation.en: I trust this beautiful journey and the life growing within me.
affirmation.hi: Main is khoobsurat safar par aur apne andar pal rahi zindagi par bharosa karti hoon.

reflectionPrompt.en: What has been your happiest pregnancy moment so far?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Ab tak ka tumhara sabse khushnuma pregnancy moment kaunsa raha hai?

spokenLine.hi: Maa, main surakshit hoon aur badh raha hoon.
spokenLine.en: Maa, I am safe and growing.

reflectionPrompt.en: What has been your happiest pregnancy moment so far?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Ab tak ka tumhara sabse khushnuma pregnancy moment kaunsa raha hai?

journalPrompt.en: Describe a moment during pregnancy that you never want to forget.
journalPrompt.hi: Pregnancy ka aisa koi pal describe karein jise aap kabhi nahi bhoolna chahti.

photoPrompt.en: Capture a joyful moment from this week that represents your pregnancy journey.
photoPrompt.hi: Is hafte ka koi khushi wala pal capture karein jo aapke pregnancy safar ko darshaye.

whatSheMayFeel.en: Excited but slightly anxious as the anomaly scan approaches.
whatSheMayFeel.hi: Excited par anomaly scan paas aate hi thodi anxious bhi.

whatYouCanDo.en: Stay calm, supportive and give her space to share her thoughts and concerns.
whatYouCanDo.hi: Shaant raho, support karo aur usse apne vichaar aur chintaayein share karne ke liye space do.

oneMission.en: Ask her what she is most excited to learn about the baby and listen without distractions.
oneMission.hi: Usse poochho ki baby ke baare mein woh sabse jyada kya jaanne ke liye excited hai, aur bina kisi distraction ke suno.

shareMessage.en: One more step closer to meeting our little one ❤
shareMessage.hi: Hamare nanhe se milne ki taraf ek aur kadam ❤

weekHeadline.en: Halfway through your pregnancy journey. This is one of the most important weeks of pregnancy — the anatomy scan week.
weekHeadline.hi: Aapki pregnancy ka aadha safar poora. Yeh pregnancy ke sabse important hafton mein se ek hai — anatomy scan ka hafta.

reveal.en: Maa, we are halfway there. This is one of the biggest milestones of our journey together.
reveal.hi: Maa, hum aadha safar tay kar chuke hain. Yeh hamare saath ke safar ka sabse bada milestone hai.

whatImDoing.en: I can hear sounds now, swallow amniotic fluid and move my arms and legs with purpose. During the anomaly scan, doctors will carefully assess how I am growing and developing.
whatImDoing.hi: Main ab aawazein sun sakta hoon, amniotic fluid nigal sakta hoon aur apne haath-pair soch-samajhkar hila sakta hoon. Anomaly scan ke dauraan, doctors dhyan se dekhenge ki main kaise badh aur develop ho raha hoon.

funFact.en: I am becoming more responsive to sounds and movement, and my daily activity is increasing.
funFact.hi: Main aawazon aur movement ke prati zyada responsive ho raha hoon, aur meri rozana activity badh rahi hai.

physicalChanges.en: Your uterus is now close to the level of your belly button. Many mothers notice stronger kicks, stretching sensations and occasional round ligament discomfort.
physicalChanges.hi: Tumhara uterus ab tumhari naabhi ke level ke kareeb pohanch gaya hai. Bahut si mothers ko ab zyada mazboot kicks, khinchaav ka ehsaas aur kabhi-kabhi round ligament mein takleef mehsoos hoti hai.

emotionalState.en: Excitement and nervousness often arrive together this week. The anomaly scan feels important because it provides a detailed look at your baby's development.
emotionalState.hi: Is hafte excitement aur nervousness aksar saath aate hain. Anomaly scan important lagta hai kyunki yeh tumhare baby ki development par ek detailed nazar deta hai.

selfCareTip.en: If your anomaly scan is scheduled this week, keep the rest of the day light. Give yourself time to process the experience and celebrate the milestone.
selfCareTip.hi: Agar tumhara anomaly scan is hafte schedule hai, to baaki din halka rakho. Apne aap ko us experience ko samajhne ka time do aur is milestone ko celebrate karo.

reassurance.en: Feeling anxious before the anomaly scan is completely normal. Most scans are routine and provide reassurance that your baby is growing well.
reassurance.hi: Anomaly scan se pehle anxious feel karna bilkul normal hai. Zyadatar scans routine hote hain aur yeh yakeen dilaate hain ki tumhara baby achhe se badh raha hai.

nutritionTheme.hi: Doosre Aadhe Safar Ke Liye Energy

whyNow.en: Your baby is building muscles, organs and tissues rapidly as growth accelerates during the second half of pregnancy.
whyNow.hi: Tumhara baby muscles, organs aur tissues tezi se bana raha hai kyunki pregnancy ke doosre aadhe hisse mein growth tez ho jaati hai.

benefit.en: Provides both protein and iron to support rapid growth during the second half of pregnancy.
benefit.hi: Pregnancy ke doosre aadhe hisse ki tez growth ke liye protein aur iron dono deta hai.

howToConsume.en: Kala chana curry, boiled chana chaat or sprouts.
howToConsume.hi: Kala chana curry, ublे chane ki chaat ya sprouts.

mealIdea.en: Palak paneer with roti and a bowl of curd.
mealIdea.hi: Roti aur ek katori dahi ke saath palak paneer.

tip.en: From now on, focus less on eating more and more on eating nutrient-dense foods.
tip.hi: Ab se kam khaane par nahi, balki nutrient-dense foods khaane par zyada dhyan do.

doThisWeek.en: Celebrate your halfway milestone, attend your anomaly scan and save the memory.
doThisWeek.hi: Apne aadhe safar ke milestone ko celebrate karo, apna anomaly scan karwao aur yeh yaad sambhal lo.

skipThisWeek.en: Spending hours reading worst-case pregnancy stories online before or after your scan.
skipThisWeek.hi: Scan se pehle ya baad mein online ghanton tak worst-case pregnancy kahaaniyan padhna.

redFlags.en: Call your doctor if you have heavy bleeding, severe abdominal pain, persistent fluid leakage, severe headache with visual disturbances or a sudden reduction in movements after a regular pattern has already been established.
redFlags.hi: Apne doctor ko call karo agar tumhe heavy bleeding, tez pet dard, lagatar fluid leakage, nazar mein gadbadi ke saath tez sar dard, ya regular pattern ban jaane ke baad achaanak movements kam ho jaayein.

myth.en: The anomaly scan is only for finding problems.
myth.hi: Anomaly scan sirf problems dhoondhne ke liye hota hai.

truth.en: The anomaly scan is a routine assessment performed for every pregnancy and most often provides reassurance about your baby's development.
truth.hi: Anomaly scan ek routine assessment hai jo har pregnancy mein kiya jaata hai aur zyadatar yeh tumhare baby ki development ke baare mein yakeen dilaata hai.

affirmation.en: My baby is growing beautifully and I trust this journey.
affirmation.hi: Mera baby khoobsurati se badh raha hai aur main is safar par bharosa karti hoon.

reflectionPrompt.en: What was the most beautiful thing you learned about your baby today?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Aaj aapne apne baby ke baare mein sabse khoobsurat kya seekha?

spokenLine.hi: Maa, main tumhari awaaz pehchaanne laga hoon.
spokenLine.en: Maa, I am beginning to recognize your voice.

reflectionPrompt.en: What was the most beautiful thing you learned about your baby today?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Aaj aapne apne baby ke baare mein sabse khoobsurat kya seekha?

journalPrompt.en: When you imagine meeting your baby for the first time, what do you picture?
journalPrompt.hi: Jab aap apne baby se pehli baar milne ki kalpana karti hain, to aap kya tasveer dekhti hain?

photoPrompt.en: Take a photo holding your scan report or with your hand gently resting on your bump.
photoPrompt.hi: Apni scan report haath mein pakad ke, ya bump par halke se haath rakh ke ek photo lein.

whatSheMayFeel.en: Excited, emotional, nervous and eager to hear that everything is progressing well.
whatSheMayFeel.hi: Excited, emotional, nervous aur yeh sunne ke liye beqaraar ki sab kuchh achhe se aage badh raha hai.

whatYouCanDo.en: Attend the anomaly scan if possible. Listen more than you speak and help her celebrate this milestone.
whatYouCanDo.hi: Ho sake to anomaly scan par saath jaayein. Bolne se zyada sunein aur is milestone ko celebrate karne mein unki madad karein.

oneMission.en: Ask her what she felt when she first saw the baby on the screen and listen without distractions.
oneMission.hi: Unse poochho ki screen par baby ko pehli baar dekhkar unhe kaisa laga, aur bina kisi distraction ke sunein.

shareMessage.en: Halfway there ❤ Our little one is now as big as a banana and growing beautifully.
shareMessage.hi: Aadha safar tay ❤ Hamara nanha ab ek kele jitna bada hai aur khoobsurati se badh raha hai.

weekHeadline.en: Your baby is becoming more aware of the world inside the womb and is beginning to experience taste and touch in new ways.
weekHeadline.hi: Aapka baby womb ke andar ki duniya ke prati zyada aware ho raha hai aur naye tareeke se taste aur touch ka anubhav karne laga hai.

reveal.en: Maa, I am discovering new sensations every day and learning more about the world around me.
reveal.hi: Maa, main har din naye sensations discover kar raha hoon aur aaspaas ki duniya ke baare mein zyada seekh raha hoon.

whatImDoing.en: My taste buds are developing, I can swallow more amniotic fluid and my movements are becoming stronger and more coordinated. My brain continues creating millions of new neural connections.
whatImDoing.hi: Mere taste buds develop ho rahe hain, main zyada amniotic fluid nigal sakta hoon aur meri harkatein mazboot aur zyada coordinated ho rahi hain. Mera brain lagatar laakhon naye neural connections bana raha hai.

funFact.en: The flavors from foods you eat can subtly influence the taste of amniotic fluid, giving me my first introduction to different tastes.
funFact.hi: Aap jo khaana khaati hain uska flavour amniotic fluid ke taste ko halke se influence karta hai, jo mujhe alag alag swaad se mera pehla parichay deta hai.

physicalChanges.en: Your baby bump is becoming more noticeable and movements may feel stronger and more regular. Your body is continuing to adapt to your baby's rapid growth.
physicalChanges.hi: Aapka baby bump zyada dikhne lag raha hai aur movements zyada mazboot aur regular feel ho sakti hain. Aapka body baby ki tezi se ho rahi growth ke saath adjust karta ja raha hai.

emotionalState.en: Many mothers feel increasingly connected to their baby as movements become more frequent and noticeable.
emotionalState.hi: Jaise jaise movements zyada frequent aur noticeable hoti hain, bahut si maaein apne baby se aur juda hua mehsoos karti hain.

commonSymptoms.hi: Saaf mehsoos hone wali baby movements

selfCareTip.en: Pause during the day to notice your baby's movements and enjoy these bonding moments.
selfCareTip.hi: Din mein thoda ruk kar apne baby ki movements ko mehsoos karein aur in bonding moments ka aanand lein.

reassurance.en: Movement patterns are still developing. Some days may feel more active than others.
reassurance.hi: Movement patterns abhi develop ho rahe hain. Kuch din zyada active feel ho sakte hain to kuch kam.

nutritionTheme.hi: Brain Growth Ke Liye Healthy Fats

whyNow.en: Your baby's brain continues developing rapidly and benefits from a steady supply of healthy fats.
whyNow.hi: Aapke baby ka brain tezi se develop hota rehta hai aur use healthy fats ki steady supply se faayda hota hai.

benefit.en: Provide Omega-3 fats that support healthy brain development.
benefit.hi: Omega-3 fats dete hain jo healthy brain development mein madad karte hain.

howToConsume.en: 2–4 walnut halves daily as a snack.
howToConsume.hi: Roz snack ke roop mein 2-4 akhrot ke tukde.

mealIdea.en: Curd bowl topped with walnuts, flaxseed powder and seasonal fruit.
mealIdea.hi: Dahi ka bowl, upar akhrot, alsi powder aur seasonal fruit ke saath.

tip.en: Include a source of healthy fat every day to support your baby's growing brain.
tip.hi: Apne baby ke badhte brain ko support karne ke liye roz ek healthy fat ka source shamil karein.

doThisWeek.en: Spend a few minutes each day talking, singing or reading to your baby.
doThisWeek.hi: Har din kuch minute apne baby se baat karne, gaana gaane ya padhne mein bitayein.

skipThisWeek.en: Ignoring persistent leg cramps or dehydration.
skipThisWeek.hi: Lagatar leg cramps ya dehydration ko nazarandaaz karna.

redFlags.en: Contact your doctor if you experience heavy bleeding, fluid leakage, severe abdominal pain, severe headaches or sudden swelling.
redFlags.hi: Agar aapko zyada bleeding, fluid leakage, tez pet dard, tez sir dard ya achanak sujan ho to apne doctor se contact karein.

myth.en: Babies in the womb are unaware of their surroundings.
myth.hi: Womb mein babies apne aaspaas se anjaan hote hain.

truth.en: Your baby is already developing the ability to hear, move, taste and respond to the environment.
truth.hi: Aapka baby pehle se hi sunne, hilne, taste karne aur environment ka jawab dene ki ability develop kar raha hai.

affirmation.en: My baby and I are learning to communicate in our own special way.
affirmation.hi: Mera baby aur main apne khaas tareeke se communicate karna seekh rahe hain.

reflectionPrompt.en: What is one thing you are most excited to show your baby about the world?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Apne baby ko duniya ke baare mein dikhane ke liye aap sabse zyada kis ek cheez ko lekar excited hain?

spokenLine.hi: Maa, main tumhari duniya ke swaad mehsoos kar raha hoon.
spokenLine.en: Maa, I am beginning to experience the flavors of your world.

reflectionPrompt.en: What is one thing you are most excited to show your baby about the world?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Apne baby ko duniya ke baare mein dikhane ke liye aap sabse zyada kis ek cheez ko lekar excited hain?

journalPrompt.en: Describe your perfect day with your baby one year from now.
journalPrompt.hi: Ab se ek saal baad apne baby ke saath apne perfect din ka varnan karein.

photoPrompt.en: Take a photo of a place you would love to visit with your child someday.
photoPrompt.hi: Kisi aisi jagah ki photo lein jahan aap kabhi apne bachche ke saath jaana chahengi.

whatSheMayFeel.en: More connected to the baby and excited by stronger movements.
whatSheMayFeel.hi: Baby se zyada juda hua aur mazboot movements se excited.

whatYouCanDo.en: Pause and share moments when the baby is active.
whatYouCanDo.hi: Ruk kar woh pal share karein jab baby active ho.

oneMission.en: Place your hand on her bump and wait patiently for a kick.
oneMission.hi: Apna haath uske bump par rakhein aur ek kick ke liye sabr se intezaar karein.

shareMessage.en: I love every little kick that reminds us you're growing ❤
shareMessage.hi: Mujhe har woh choti kick pasand hai jo yaad dilati hai ki tum badh rahe ho ❤

weekHeadline.en: Your baby can now hear sounds from inside and outside the womb, including your voice.
weekHeadline.hi: Aapka baby ab womb ke andar aur bahar ki aawaazein sun sakta hai, aapki awaaz bhi.

reveal.en: Maa, I can hear you now. Your voice is becoming one of my favorite sounds.
reveal.hi: Maa, main ab tumhe sun sakta hoon. Tumhari awaaz meri sabse pasandeeda aawaazon mein se ek banti ja rahi hai.

whatImDoing.en: My hearing is developing rapidly and I can now detect sounds such as your heartbeat, your voice and even some noises from outside the womb. My brain is continuing to process and learn from these experiences.
whatImDoing.hi: Meri hearing tezi se develop ho rahi hai aur main ab tumhari dil ki dhadkan, tumhari awaaz aur womb ke bahar ki kuch aawaazein bhi sun sakta hoon. Mera brain in experiences ko samajhta aur seekhta ja raha hai.

funFact.en: After birth, babies often recognize and feel comforted by their mother's voice because they've been listening to it in the womb.
funFact.hi: Janm ke baad, babies aksar apni maa ki awaaz pehchaante hain aur use sun kar shaant ho jaate hain, kyunki woh womb mein hi use sunte aaye hain.

physicalChanges.en: Your baby is growing steadily and movements may become more noticeable throughout the day. Your center of gravity continues shifting as your bump grows.
physicalChanges.hi: Aapka baby steadily badh raha hai aur movements din bhar mein zyada mehsoos ho sakti hain. Aapka center of gravity bump ke badhne ke saath shift hota ja raha hai.

emotionalState.en: Many mothers feel a stronger emotional bond when they learn their baby can hear their voice.
emotionalState.hi: Bahut si mothers ko ek gehra emotional bond mehsoos hota hai jab unhe pata chalta hai ki unka baby unki awaaz sun sakta hai.

selfCareTip.en: Spend a few quiet minutes each day talking, reading or singing to your baby.
selfCareTip.hi: Har din kuch shaant minute apne baby se baat karne, padhne ya gaane mein bitayein.

reassurance.en: There is no perfect way to bond with your baby. Small daily moments matter most.
reassurance.hi: Apne baby se bond banane ka koi perfect tareeka nahi hota. Roz ke chhote chhote moments sabse zyada maayne rakhte hain.

whyNow.en: Your baby's brain continues growing rapidly and needs nutrients that support memory, learning and nervous system development.
whyNow.hi: Aapke baby ka brain tezi se badh raha hai aur use aise nutrients chahiye jo memory, learning aur nervous system development mein madad karein.

benefit.en: Provide protein and choline that support healthy brain development.
benefit.hi: Protein aur choline dete hain, jo healthy brain development mein madad karte hain.

howToConsume.en: Soy chunks curry, soybean pulao or roasted soy snacks.
howToConsume.hi: Soy chunks curry, soybean pulao ya roasted soy snacks.

mealIdea.en: Soybean pulao with curd and vegetable salad.
mealIdea.hi: Soybean pulao, dahi aur vegetable salad ke saath.

tip.en: Try including a protein source in every meal to support your baby's growing brain.
tip.hi: Har meal mein ek protein source shaamil karne ki koshish karein, taaki aapke baby ke badhte brain ko madad mile.

doThisWeek.en: Create a daily bonding ritual such as reading a short story, singing or talking to your baby.
doThisWeek.hi: Ek daily bonding ritual banayein, jaise ek chhoti kahani padhna, gaana ya apne baby se baat karna.

skipThisWeek.en: Assuming bonding only happens after birth.
skipThisWeek.hi: Yeh maan lena ki bonding sirf janm ke baad hi hota hai.

redFlags.en: Contact your doctor if you experience heavy bleeding, fluid leakage, severe abdominal pain, severe headaches, vision changes or sudden swelling.
redFlags.hi: Apne doctor se sampark karein agar heavy bleeding, fluid leakage, severe pet dard, severe sir dard, vision changes ya achanak sujan ho.

myth.en: Babies cannot hear clearly until late pregnancy.
myth.hi: Babies pregnancy ke aakhir tak saaf nahi sun paate.

truth.en: By this stage, your baby can already hear and respond to sounds.
truth.hi: Is stage tak, aapka baby pehle se hi sun sakta hai aur aawaazon par react kar sakta hai.

affirmation.en: My voice is a source of comfort and connection for my baby.
affirmation.hi: Meri awaaz mere baby ke liye sukoon aur connection ka zariya hai.

reflectionPrompt.en: What words would you like your baby to hear most often while growing up?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Aap apne baby ko bade hote hue sabse zyada kaun se shabd sunana chahengi?

spokenLine.hi: Maa, main tumhari awaaz sun sakta hoon.
spokenLine.en: Maa, I can hear your voice now.

reflectionPrompt.en: What words would you like your child to hear most often while growing up?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Aap apne bachche ko bade hote hue sabse zyada kaun se shabd sunana chahengi?

journalPrompt.en: Write a message your child can read on their 18th birthday.
journalPrompt.hi: Ek message likhein jise aapka bachcha apne 18ve birthday par padh sake.

photoPrompt.en: Capture a family moment that reflects love, connection and belonging.
photoPrompt.hi: Ek family moment capture karein jo pyaar, connection aur apnepan ko darshata ho.

whatSheMayFeel.en: More emotionally attached to the baby as the pregnancy feels increasingly real.
whatSheMayFeel.hi: Baby se emotionally zyada juda hui, kyunki pregnancy ab aur real lag rahi hai.

whatYouCanDo.en: Talk to the baby regularly and encourage shared bonding moments.
whatYouCanDo.hi: Baby se regular baat karein aur saath mein bonding moments ke liye protsahit karein.

oneMission.en: Share one thing you are excited to teach your child someday.
oneMission.hi: Ek cheez share karein jo aap kabhi apne bachche ko sikhane ke liye excited hain.

shareMessage.en: Our little one can hear us now ❤
shareMessage.hi: Hamara nanha sa ab hume sun sakta hai ❤

weekHeadline.en: Your baby's brain is building millions of new neural connections and learning is already beginning.
weekHeadline.hi: Tumhare baby ka brain laakhon naye neural connections bana raha hai aur seekhna abhi se shuru ho chuka hai.

reveal.en: Maa, my brain is growing rapidly and helping me understand the world around me.
reveal.hi: Maa, mera brain tezi se badh raha hai aur mujhe apne aas-paas ki duniya samajhne mein madad kar raha hai.

whatImDoing.en: My brain is developing at an incredible pace. New neural connections are forming every second, helping build the foundation for learning, memory and movement. My hearing continues improving and I can recognize familiar sounds.
whatImDoing.hi: Mera brain ek zabardast raftaar se develop ho raha hai. Har second naye neural connections ban rahe hain, jo seekhne, yaad rakhne aur movement ki neenv banate hain. Meri hearing behtar ho rahi hai aur main jaani-pehchaani aawazein pehchaan sakta hoon.

funFact.en: The voice I hear most often now may become one of the voices I recognize after birth.
funFact.hi: Jo aawaz main ab sabse zyada sunta hoon, woh shayad un aawazon mein se ho jinhe main janam ke baad pehchaanunga.

physicalChanges.en: Your baby is becoming stronger and more active. Kicks and movements may feel more noticeable and sometimes even visible from the outside.
physicalChanges.hi: Tumhara baby mazboot aur zyada active ho raha hai. Kicks aur movements ab zyada mehsoos ho sakti hain aur kabhi-kabhi bahar se dikh bhi sakti hain.

emotionalState.en: Many mothers feel deeply connected during this phase as movement patterns become more familiar.
emotionalState.hi: Kai maaein is phase mein gehraai se juda mehsoos karti hain kyunki movement patterns zyada jaane-pehchaane lagte hain.

selfCareTip.en: Take a few quiet moments every day to notice your baby's movements and enjoy the connection.
selfCareTip.hi: Har din kuch shaant pal nikaalo apne baby ki movements ko mehsoos karne aur is jud-aav ka aanand lene ke liye.

reassurance.en: Movement patterns are still developing. Some active days and quieter days are normal.
reassurance.hi: Movement patterns abhi ban hi rahe hain. Kuch active din aur kuch shaant din hona normal hai.

whyNow.en: Your baby's brain is undergoing one of the fastest periods of growth during the entire pregnancy.
whyNow.hi: Tumhare baby ka brain poori pregnancy ke sabse tez growth daur se guzar raha hai.

benefit.en: Provides plant-based Omega-3 fats that support healthy brain development.
benefit.hi: Plant-based Omega-3 fats deta hai jo healthy brain development ko support karte hain.

howToConsume.en: Mix ground flaxseed into curd, atta or smoothies.
howToConsume.hi: Pisi hui alsi ko dahi, atta ya smoothies mein milao.

mealIdea.en: Curd bowl with flaxseed powder, walnuts and fresh fruit.
mealIdea.hi: Dahi ka bowl alsi powder, akhrot aur taaze fruit ke saath.

tip.en: Small nutritional improvements repeated daily have a big impact over time.
tip.hi: Roz dohraye gaye chhote nutritional sudhaar samay ke saath bada asar daalte hain.

doThisWeek.en: Continue talking, singing and reading to your baby every day.
doThisWeek.hi: Apne baby se har din baat karte raho, gaate raho aur padhte raho.

skipThisWeek.en: Assuming your baby is unaware of what happens outside the womb.
skipThisWeek.hi: Yeh maan lena ki tumhara baby womb ke bahar ki cheezon se anjaan hai.

redFlags.en: Contact your doctor if you experience bleeding, fluid leakage, severe abdominal pain, severe headache, vision changes or sudden swelling.
redFlags.hi: Apne doctor se sampark karo agar bleeding, fluid leakage, pet mein tez dard, tez sir dard, nazar mein badlav ya achanak sujan ho.

myth.en: Learning starts only after birth.
myth.hi: Seekhna sirf janam ke baad shuru hota hai.

truth.en: Your baby's brain is already developing the foundations for learning, memory and recognition.
truth.hi: Tumhare baby ka brain abhi se seekhne, yaad rakhne aur pehchaanne ki neenv bana raha hai.

affirmation.en: Every loving thought I send reaches my baby.
affirmation.hi: Har pyaar bhara khayal jo main bhejti hoon, woh mere baby tak pahunchta hai.

reflectionPrompt.en: What values matter most to you as a parent?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Ek parent ke roop mein tumhare liye kaunse values sabse zyada maayne rakhte hain?

spokenLine.hi: Maa, mera dimag roz naye connections bana raha hai.
spokenLine.en: Maa, my brain is building new connections every day.

reflectionPrompt.en: What values matter most in your family?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Tumhare parivaar mein kaunse values sabse zyada maayne rakhte hain?

journalPrompt.en: Write about the kind of home and family culture you want your child to grow up in.
journalPrompt.hi: Likho ki tum apne bachhe ko kaise ghar aur family culture mein bade hote dekhna chahti ho.

photoPrompt.en: Take a photo of something that represents family, love or belonging to you.
photoPrompt.hi: Kisi aisi cheez ki photo lo jo tumhare liye family, pyaar ya apnepan ko darshati ho.

whatSheMayFeel.en: Excited but occasionally overwhelmed by everything that lies ahead.
whatSheMayFeel.hi: Excited par kabhi-kabhi aage aane wali har cheez se thoda overwhelmed.

whatYouCanDo.en: Help her focus on one step at a time instead of thinking about everything at once.
whatYouCanDo.hi: Use ek baar mein sab kuch sochne ke bajaye ek-ek step par dhyan dene mein madad karo.

oneMission.en: Ask her what she is most looking forward to after the baby arrives.
oneMission.hi: Usse poochho ki baby ke aane ke baad woh kis cheez ka sabse zyada intezaar kar rahi hai.

shareMessage.en: We're building a beautiful future together ❤
shareMessage.hi: Hum saath mein ek khoobsurat future bana rahe hain ❤

weekHeadline.en: Your baby's senses are becoming more refined, and sleep-wake cycles are beginning to develop.
weekHeadline.hi: Tumhare baby ki senses aur sharp ho rahi hain, aur sleep-wake cycles ban-ne lage hain.

reveal.en: Maa, I am becoming stronger, more aware and more responsive every day.
reveal.hi: Maa, main har din aur strong, aur aware aur zyada responsive ban raha hoon.

whatImDoing.en: My hearing is becoming sharper, my brain continues building new pathways and I am beginning to develop regular periods of sleep and activity. My lungs are also continuing their important development journey.
whatImDoing.hi: Meri hearing aur sharp ho rahi hai, mera brain naye rastey banata ja raha hai aur main regular sone aur jaagne ke periods develop karne laga hoon. Mere lungs bhi apna important development safar jaari rakhe hue hain.

funFact.en: I may already have favorite times of day when I am most active.
funFact.hi: Mere paas pehle se hi din ke favorite time ho sakte hain jab main sabse zyada active rehta hoon.

physicalChanges.en: Your bump is becoming more prominent and your baby's movements may feel stronger and more predictable.
physicalChanges.hi: Tumhara bump aur prominent ho raha hai aur tumhare baby ke movements zyada strong aur predictable mehsoos ho sakte hain.

emotionalState.en: Many mothers begin feeling a deeper emotional connection as movement patterns become familiar.
emotionalState.hi: Jaise-jaise movement ke patterns familiar hote hain, kayi maaon ko ek gehra emotional connection feel hone lagta hai.

selfCareTip.en: Try to notice your baby's active periods. These moments can become special daily bonding rituals.
selfCareTip.hi: Apne baby ke active periods ko notice karne ki koshish karo. Yeh pal ek special daily bonding ritual ban sakte hain.

reassurance.en: Every baby develops their own movement pattern and personality inside the womb.
reassurance.hi: Har baby pet ke andar apna khud ka movement pattern aur personality develop karta hai.

whyNow.en: Your baby's lungs and other organs continue maturing and need steady nutritional support.
whyNow.hi: Tumhare baby ke lungs aur baaki organs mature hote ja rahe hain aur unhe steady nutritional support chahiye.

benefit.en: Provides protein, iron and fiber to support healthy growth and blood formation.
benefit.hi: Healthy growth aur blood formation ke liye protein, iron aur fiber deta hai.

howToConsume.en: Rajma curry with brown rice or roti.
howToConsume.hi: Rajma curry brown rice ya roti ke saath.

mealIdea.en: Rajma rice with cucumber salad and curd.
mealIdea.hi: Rajma chawal kheere ke salad aur dahi ke saath.

tip.en: Pair iron-rich foods with Vitamin C-rich fruits for better absorption.
tip.hi: Iron-rich foods ko Vitamin C-rich fruits ke saath khao taaki absorption behtar ho.

doThisWeek.en: Spend a few minutes each day noticing your baby's movement patterns.
doThisWeek.hi: Har din kuch minute apne baby ke movement patterns ko notice karne mein bitao.

skipThisWeek.en: Worrying if your baby's activity varies slightly from day to day.
skipThisWeek.hi: Agar tumhare baby ki activity din-bdin thodi alag ho to chinta karna.

redFlags.en: Contact your doctor if you experience bleeding, fluid leakage, severe abdominal pain, severe headaches, vision changes or sudden swelling.
redFlags.hi: Agar bleeding, fluid leakage, tez pet dard, tez sar dard, vision mein badlav ya achaanak soojan ho to apne doctor se contact karo.

myth.en: Babies sleep all the time inside the womb.
myth.hi: Babies pet ke andar hamesha sote rehte hain.

truth.en: Babies develop sleep and activity cycles and may have surprisingly active periods.
truth.hi: Babies sone aur activity ke cycles develop karte hain aur hairan kar dene wale active periods ho sakte hain.

affirmation.en: I trust the beautiful process unfolding within me.
affirmation.hi: Mere andar jo khoobsurat process chal raha hai, mujhe us par bharosa hai.

reflectionPrompt.en: What strength has pregnancy revealed in you?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Pregnancy ne tumhare andar kaunsi taakat dikhayi hai?

spokenLine.hi: Maa, main roz aur taiyaar ho raha hoon.
spokenLine.en: Maa, every day I am becoming more ready.

reflectionPrompt.en: What strength has pregnancy revealed in you?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Pregnancy ne tumhare andar kaunsi taakat dikhayi hai?

journalPrompt.en: Describe a challenge you have overcome during pregnancy and what it taught you about yourself.
journalPrompt.hi: Pregnancy ke dauraan tumne jo ek challenge paar kiya aur usne tumhe apne baare mein kya sikhaya, woh batao.

photoPrompt.en: Capture a moment where you felt proud of yourself during this journey.
photoPrompt.hi: Ek aisa pal capture karo jab is safar mein tumhe apne aap par garv hua.

whatSheMayFeel.en: More confident but still seeking reassurance occasionally.
whatSheMayFeel.hi: Zyada confident, par abhi bhi kabhi-kabhi bharosa chahti hui.

whatYouCanDo.en: Notice and appreciate the effort she puts into caring for herself and the baby every day.
whatYouCanDo.hi: Woh har din apna aur baby ka khayal rakhne mein jo mehnat karti hai, use notice karo aur sarahau.

oneMission.en: Thank her for one specific thing she has done for your growing family.
oneMission.hi: Use ek specific cheez ke liye thank you kaho jo usne tumhare badhte parivaar ke liye ki hai.

shareMessage.en: You are already an incredible mother ❤
shareMessage.hi: Tum pehle se hi ek incredible maa ho ❤

weekHeadline.en: Your baby is becoming more responsive to sound and may already recognize familiar voices and rhythms.
weekHeadline.hi: Tumhara baby ab aawaaz par jyada respond karne laga hai aur shayad jaani-pehchaani awaazon aur rhythms ko pehchaanne bhi laga hai.

reveal.en: Maa, your voice is becoming familiar to me, and every day I learn a little more about the world around me.
reveal.hi: Maa, tumhari awaaz mere liye jaani-pehchaani hoti ja rahi hai, aur main har din apne aas-paas ki duniya ke baare mein thoda aur seekhta hoon.

whatImDoing.en: My hearing is becoming more refined and I am responding to sounds around me. My brain continues developing rapidly, and my movements are becoming stronger and more coordinated.
whatImDoing.hi: Meri sunne ki shakti aur refined ho rahi hai aur main aas-paas ki aawaazon par respond kar raha hoon. Mera brain tezi se develop ho raha hai, aur mere movements aur mazboot aur coordinated ho rahe hain.

funFact.en: Research suggests babies may recognize familiar voices and sounds after birth if they hear them regularly during pregnancy.
funFact.hi: Research kehti hai ki agar babies pregnancy ke dauraan regularly jaani-pehchaani awaazein sunte hain to woh birth ke baad unhe pehchaan sakte hain.

physicalChanges.en: Your baby is growing quickly and your bump is becoming more prominent. You may notice stronger kicks and stretches, especially during quiet moments.
physicalChanges.hi: Tumhara baby tezi se badh raha hai aur tumhara bump aur prominent ho raha hai. Tum jyada mazboot kicks aur stretches mehsoos kar sakti ho, khaaskar shaant pal mein.

emotionalState.en: Many mothers feel a deeper sense of connection as they begin recognizing their baby's unique movement patterns.
emotionalState.hi: Kai mothers ko gehra connection feel hota hai jab woh apne baby ke khaas movement patterns pehchaanne lagti hain.

selfCareTip.en: Use your baby's active moments as opportunities to pause, connect and enjoy the journey.
selfCareTip.hi: Apne baby ke active pal ko ruk kar, connect karne aur safar ka maza lene ke mauke ki tarah istemaal karo.

reassurance.en: As your baby grows, stronger movements are a healthy sign of development.
reassurance.hi: Jaise-jaise tumhara baby badhta hai, mazboot movements development ka ek healthy sign hain.

whyNow.en: Your baby is gaining weight steadily and needs nutrients that support muscle, blood and organ development.
whyNow.hi: Tumhara baby steadily weight badha raha hai aur use aise nutrients chahiye jo muscle, blood aur organs ke development mein madad karein.

benefit.en: Provides protein, iron and fiber that support healthy growth.
benefit.hi: Protein, Iron aur fiber deta hai jo healthy growth mein madad karte hain.

howToConsume.en: Chole curry with roti or rice.
howToConsume.hi: Chole ki sabzi roti ya chawal ke saath.

mealIdea.en: Chole with roti, cucumber salad and curd.
mealIdea.hi: Chole roti, kheere ke salad aur dahi ke saath.

tip.en: Try to include a source of protein every 3–4 hours throughout the day.
tip.hi: Din bhar har 3-4 ghante mein protein ka koi source shaamil karne ki koshish karo.

doThisWeek.en: Talk, sing or read to your baby daily and begin noticing movement patterns.
doThisWeek.hi: Apne baby se roz baat karo, gao ya padho aur uske movement patterns notice karna shuru karo.

skipThisWeek.en: Ignoring persistent heartburn or dehydration.
skipThisWeek.hi: Lagataar seene ki jalan ya dehydration ko nazarandaaz karna.

redFlags.en: Contact your doctor if you experience bleeding, fluid leakage, severe abdominal pain, severe headaches, vision changes or sudden swelling.
redFlags.hi: Agar bleeding, fluid leakage, tez pet dard, tez sir dard, vision mein badlaav ya achanak soojan ho to apne doctor se sampark karo.

myth.en: Babies only begin recognizing their parents after birth.
myth.hi: Babies apne parents ko sirf birth ke baad hi pehchaanne lagte hain.

truth.en: Babies can become familiar with voices they hear repeatedly during pregnancy.
truth.hi: Babies pregnancy ke dauraan baar-baar suni awaazon se familiar ho sakte hain.

affirmation.en: Love grows stronger through small daily moments.
affirmation.hi: Pyaar chhote-chhote rozana ke palon se aur gehra hota hai.

reflectionPrompt.en: What has been your favorite memory from pregnancy so far?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Ab tak ki tumhari sabse pasandida pregnancy yaad kaunsi rahi hai?

spokenLine.hi: Maa, mujhe tumhari awaaz pehchaan aane lagi hai.
spokenLine.en: Maa, your voice is becoming familiar to me.

reflectionPrompt.en: What has been your favorite memory from pregnancy so far?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Ab tak ki tumhari sabse pasandida pregnancy yaad kaunsi rahi hai?

journalPrompt.en: Describe a moment that made you feel deeply connected to your baby.
journalPrompt.hi: Aisa koi pal describe karein jisne aapko apne baby se gehra juda hua mehsoos karaya ho.

photoPrompt.en: Take a photo of something that reminds you of your baby or your growing bond.
photoPrompt.hi: Aisi kisi cheez ki photo lein jo aapko aapke baby ya aapke badhte bond ki yaad dilaye.

whatSheMayFeel.en: Increasingly connected to the baby and excited about each new movement and milestone.
whatSheMayFeel.hi: Baby se badhte hue jude hue, aur har naye movement aur milestone ko lekar excited.

whatYouCanDo.en: Join her in noticing the baby's activity and celebrate small moments together.
whatYouCanDo.hi: Uske saath milkar baby ki activity notice karo aur chhote palon ka jashn saath mein manao.

oneMission.en: Spend 10 quiet minutes talking to the baby together today.
oneMission.hi: Aaj saath mein 10 shaant minute baby se baat karte hue bitao.

shareMessage.en: Every kick reminds us that our little one is growing stronger ❤
shareMessage.hi: Har kick yaad dilaati hai ki hamara nanha aur mazboot ho raha hai ❤

weekHeadline.en: Your baby's eyes are beginning to open, and the brain continues making extraordinary progress.
weekHeadline.hi: Tumhare baby ki aankhein khulna shuru ho rahi hain, aur brain lagatar kamaal ki progress kar raha hai.

reveal.en: Maa, my eyes are beginning to open and I am becoming more aware of my surroundings.
reveal.hi: Maa, meri aankhein khulna shuru ho rahi hain aur main apne aas-paas ke baare mein zyada aware ho raha hoon.

whatImDoing.en: My eyes are starting to open, my hearing continues improving and my brain is developing rapidly. I can respond to sounds, movement and changes in my environment.
whatImDoing.hi: Meri aankhein khulna shuru ho rahi hain, meri sunne ki shakti behtar ho rahi hai aur mera brain tezi se develop ho raha hai. Main aawazon, movement aur apne maahaul ke badlaav par react kar sakta hoon.

funFact.en: Although the womb is dark, I can already detect certain changes in light and shadow.
funFact.hi: Bhale hi womb andheri hai, par main ab roshni aur parchhaai ke kuchh badlaav mehsoos kar sakta hoon.

physicalChanges.en: Your baby is becoming larger and stronger, which can make movements feel more powerful. Your body is working harder to support the growing demands of pregnancy.
physicalChanges.hi: Tumhara baby ab bada aur mazboot ho raha hai, jisse movements zyada zordaar lag sakti hain. Tumhara body pregnancy ki badhti zarooraton ko sambhalne ke liye zyada mehnat kar raha hai.

emotionalState.en: Many mothers feel grateful, connected and increasingly aware that the third trimester is approaching.
emotionalState.hi: Bahut si mothers grateful, juda hua aur yeh ehsaas mehsoos karti hain ki teesra trimester kareeb aa raha hai.

selfCareTip.en: Stay hydrated and stretch gently before bedtime to help reduce nighttime cramps.
selfCareTip.hi: Hydrated raho aur sone se pehle halka stretch karo taaki raat ke cramps kam ho sakein.

reassurance.en: As your baby grows, stronger movements and increased physical discomfort are often normal signs of progress.
reassurance.hi: Jaise-jaise tumhara baby badhta hai, mazboot movements aur badhti physical takleef aksar progress ke normal ishaare hote hain.

whyNow.en: Your baby's growth is accelerating and your body is producing significantly more blood to support pregnancy.
whyNow.hi: Tumhare baby ki growth tez ho rahi hai aur tumhara body pregnancy ko support karne ke liye kaafi zyada blood bana raha hai.

benefit.en: Provides iron, protein and fiber to support healthy blood production and growth.
benefit.hi: Healthy blood production aur growth ke liye iron, protein aur fiber deta hai.

howToConsume.en: Boiled chana chaat, curry or sprouts.
howToConsume.hi: Uble chane ki chaat, curry ya sprouts.

mealIdea.en: Kala chana curry with roti and fresh salad.
mealIdea.hi: Roti aur fresh salad ke saath kala chana curry.

tip.en: Combine iron-rich foods with Vitamin C-rich foods to improve absorption.
tip.hi: Behtar absorption ke liye iron-rich foods ko Vitamin C-rich foods ke saath milao.

doThisWeek.en: Review your upcoming appointments and begin thinking about third-trimester preparations.
doThisWeek.hi: Apni aane wali appointments review karo aur teesre trimester ki taiyaari ke baare mein sochna shuru karo.

skipThisWeek.en: Ignoring persistent fatigue or assuming it is always normal.
skipThisWeek.hi: Lagatar thakaan ko nazarandaaz karna ya yeh maan lena ki yeh hamesha normal hai.

redFlags.en: Contact your doctor if you experience bleeding, fluid leakage, severe abdominal pain, severe headaches, vision changes, reduced fetal movement or sudden swelling.
redFlags.hi: Apne doctor se sampark karo agar tumhe bleeding, fluid leakage, tez pet dard, tez sar dard, nazar mein badlaav, fetal movement kam hona ya achaanak soojan ho.

myth.en: The baby spends all day sleeping.
myth.hi: Baby poora din sota rehta hai.

truth.en: Your baby alternates between periods of sleep and activity and may already have recognizable patterns.
truth.hi: Tumhara baby neend aur activity ke beech badalta rehta hai aur uske ab pehchaane jaane wale patterns bhi ho sakte hain.

affirmation.en: I welcome each stage of this journey with gratitude.
affirmation.hi: Main is safar ke har stage ka gratitude ke saath swagat karti hoon.

reflectionPrompt.en: What are you most grateful for this week?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Is hafte aap sabse zyada kis cheez ke liye grateful hain?

spokenLine.hi: Maa, meri aankhen duniya dekhne ki taiyaari kar rahi hain.
spokenLine.en: Maa, my eyes are preparing to see the world.

reflectionPrompt.en: What are you most grateful for this week?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Is hafte aap sabse zyada kis cheez ke liye grateful hain?

journalPrompt.en: List five things that have made this pregnancy journey easier, more meaningful or more beautiful.
journalPrompt.hi: Paanch aisi cheezein likho jinhone is pregnancy safar ko aasaan, zyada meaningful ya zyada khoobsurat banaya.

photoPrompt.en: Capture something that brought you peace, comfort or gratitude this week.
photoPrompt.hi: Is hafte jo cheez aapko sukoon, aaram ya gratitude de gayi, use capture karo.

whatSheMayFeel.en: A mix of gratitude, excitement and uncertainty as the third trimester approaches.
whatSheMayFeel.hi: Teesra trimester kareeb aate hue gratitude, excitement aur thodi uncertainty ka mixture.

whatYouCanDo.en: Help organize practical plans while continuing to celebrate the present moment.
whatYouCanDo.hi: Practical plans organize karne mein madad karein aur saath hi is pal ko bhi celebrate karte rahein.

oneMission.en: Review important medical, insurance and maternity-related documents together.
oneMission.hi: Saath mein zaroori medical, insurance aur maternity se judе documents review karein.

shareMessage.en: One team. One journey. One growing family ❤
shareMessage.hi: Ek team. Ek safar. Ek badhta parivar ❤

weekHeadline.en: You've reached the third trimester. Your baby is growing rapidly and preparing for life outside the womb.
weekHeadline.hi: Aap third trimester mein pahunch gayi hain. Aapka baby tezi se badh raha hai aur womb ke bahar ki life ki taiyaari kar raha hai.

reveal.en: Maa, we've entered our final trimester together. The day we meet is getting closer.
reveal.hi: Maa, hum saath mein apne aakhri trimester mein aa gaye hain. Hamare milne ka din ab kareeb aa raha hai.

whatImDoing.en: My brain, lungs and nervous system continue maturing rapidly. I am practicing breathing movements, opening and closing my eyes, and becoming stronger every day.
whatImDoing.hi: Mera brain, lungs aur nervous system tezi se mature ho rahe hain. Main breathing movements practice kar raha hoon, aankhein khol-band kar raha hoon, aur har din mazboot ho raha hoon.

funFact.en: If I were born now, modern medical care would give me a very good chance of survival, although I still need more time to grow.
funFact.hi: Agar main abhi paida ho jaaun, to modern medical care mujhe survive karne ka bahut achha chance degi, halaanki mujhe abhi aur badhne ke liye samay chahiye.

physicalChanges.en: Your baby is now taking up much more space. You may notice stronger kicks, stretching sensations and increased pressure in your abdomen.
physicalChanges.hi: Aapka baby ab bahut zyada jagah le raha hai. Aapko mazboot kicks, stretching feel aur pet mein badha hua pressure mehsoos ho sakta hai.

emotionalState.en: Many mothers feel proud, excited and slightly overwhelmed as they enter the final trimester.
emotionalState.hi: Final trimester mein aate hue bahut si maaein proud, excited aur thoda overwhelmed feel karti hain.

commonSymptoms.hi: Comfortable sleeping position dhoondhne mein dikkat

selfCareTip.en: Try sleeping on your left side with a pillow between your knees and another supporting your bump.
selfCareTip.hi: Apni left side par sona try karein, ghutno ke beech ek takiya aur ek aur bump ko support karne ke liye.

reassurance.en: Feeling both excited and nervous about the third trimester is completely normal.
reassurance.hi: Third trimester ko lekar excited aur nervous dono feel hona bilkul normal hai.

nutritionTheme.hi: Tezi Se Weight Gain Ke Liye

whyNow.en: Your baby is entering one of the fastest periods of weight gain during pregnancy.
whyNow.hi: Aapka baby pregnancy ke sabse tez weight gain wale daur mein pravesh kar raha hai.

benefit.en: Provides high-quality protein and calcium to support rapid growth during the third trimester.
benefit.hi: High-quality protein aur calcium deta hai jo third trimester mein tezi se ho rahi growth ko support karta hai.

howToConsume.en: Paneer bhurji, paneer curry or grilled paneer snacks.
howToConsume.hi: Paneer bhurji, paneer curry ya grilled paneer snacks.

mealIdea.en: Paneer bhurji with roti and a bowl of curd.
mealIdea.hi: Paneer bhurji roti ke saath aur ek bowl dahi.

tip.en: Aim to include a protein source with every major meal.
tip.hi: Har major meal mein ek protein source shamil karne ka target rakhein.

doThisWeek.en: Celebrate reaching the third trimester and begin creating a simple birth preparation checklist.
doThisWeek.hi: Third trimester mein pahunchne ka jashn manayein aur ek simple birth preparation checklist banana shuru karein.

skipThisWeek.en: Feeling pressured to buy everything for the baby immediately.
skipThisWeek.hi: Baby ke liye sab kuch turant khareedne ka pressure feel karna.

redFlags.en: Contact your doctor if you experience bleeding, fluid leakage, painful contractions, severe headache, vision changes, reduced fetal movement or sudden swelling.
redFlags.hi: Agar aapko bleeding, fluid leakage, dardnaak contractions, tez sir dard, vision changes, kam fetal movement ya achanak sujan ho to apne doctor se contact karein.

myth.en: The third trimester is only about waiting for the baby.
myth.hi: Third trimester sirf baby ka intezaar karne ke baare mein hai.

truth.en: The third trimester is one of the most important periods of growth and brain development.
truth.hi: Third trimester growth aur brain development ke sabse important daur mein se ek hai.

affirmation.en: Together we are entering a powerful new phase.
affirmation.hi: Saath milkar hum ek powerful naye phase mein pravesh kar rahe hain.

reflectionPrompt.en: What dream do you have for your child?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Apne bachche ke liye aapka kya sapna hai?

spokenLine.hi: Maa, hum teesre trimester mein aa gaye hain.
spokenLine.en: Maa, we have entered the third trimester.

reflectionPrompt.en: What dream do you have for your child?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Apne bachche ke liye aapka kya sapna hai?

journalPrompt.en: Write a letter describing the future you hope your child creates for themselves.
journalPrompt.hi: Ek letter likhein jismein aap apne bachche ke liye jo future chahti hain use varnan karein.

photoPrompt.en: Take a photo that symbolizes hope, possibility or the future you imagine for your child.
photoPrompt.hi: Ek aisi photo lein jo umeed, possibility ya us future ko darshati ho jo aap apne bachche ke liye imagine karti hain.

whatSheMayFeel.en: Proud to reach the third-trimester milestone while also realizing how quickly the due date is approaching.
whatSheMayFeel.hi: Third-trimester milestone par pahunchne ki proud feeling, saath hi yeh ehsaas ki due date kitni tezi se kareeb aa rahi hai.

whatYouCanDo.en: Celebrate this achievement and remind her how far she has already come.
whatYouCanDo.hi: Is achievement ka jashn manayein aur use yaad dilayein ki woh kitni door aa chuki hai.

oneMission.en: Plan a simple third-trimester celebration or special memory together.
oneMission.hi: Saath milkar ek simple third-trimester celebration ya koi khaas yaad plan karein.

shareMessage.en: Third trimester already ❤ Look how far we've come together.
shareMessage.hi: Third trimester bhi aa gaya ❤ Dekho hum saath mein kitni door aa gaye hain.

weekHeadline.en: Your baby can now open and close their eyes, and brain development is accelerating rapidly.
weekHeadline.hi: Aapka baby ab apni aankhein khol aur band kar sakta hai, aur brain development tezi se badh rahi hai.

reveal.en: Maa, my eyes are open now and I am becoming more aware of the world around me.
reveal.hi: Maa, meri aankhein ab khul gayi hain aur main apne aas-paas ki duniya ko zyada samajhne laga hoon.

whatImDoing.en: I can open and close my eyes, blink and respond to light. My brain is developing rapidly and my lungs continue preparing for life outside the womb.
whatImDoing.hi: Main apni aankhein khol aur band kar sakta hoon, blink kar sakta hoon aur roshni par react kar sakta hoon. Mera brain tezi se develop ho raha hai aur mere lungs womb ke bahar ki zindagi ke liye taiyaar ho rahe hain.

funFact.en: If a bright light shines on your belly, I may actually turn toward it.
funFact.hi: Agar tumhare pet par tej roshni padti hai, to main sach mein uski taraf mud sakta hoon.

physicalChanges.en: Your baby is growing quickly and taking up more space. You may notice stronger kicks, increased pressure in your abdomen and more difficulty sleeping comfortably.
physicalChanges.hi: Aapka baby tezi se badh raha hai aur zyada jagah le raha hai. Aapko mazboot kicks, pet mein zyada pressure aur aaram se sone mein zyada dikkat mehsoos ho sakti hai.

emotionalState.en: Many mothers begin balancing excitement about meeting their baby with thoughts about labor and birth.
emotionalState.hi: Bahut si mothers baby se milne ki excitement ke saath labour aur birth ke khayaalon ko balance karna shuru karti hain.

selfCareTip.en: Prioritize sleep and create a calming bedtime routine to support your changing body.
selfCareTip.hi: Neend ko priority dein aur apni badalti body ke liye ek shaant bedtime routine banayein.

reassurance.en: Sleep challenges become increasingly common during the third trimester and are usually a normal part of pregnancy.
reassurance.hi: Neend ki dikkatein third trimester mein aam ho jaati hain aur aksar pregnancy ka ek normal hissa hain.

whyNow.en: Your baby's brain is undergoing one of its most important periods of development.
whyNow.hi: Aapke baby ka brain apne sabse important development periods mein se ek se guzar raha hai.

benefit.en: Provide healthy fats that support rapid brain development.
benefit.hi: Healthy fats dete hain, jo tezi se brain development mein madad karte hain.

howToConsume.en: 2–4 walnut halves daily as a snack.
howToConsume.hi: Roz 2-4 akhrot ke tukde snack ki tarah.

mealIdea.en: Curd bowl with walnuts, flaxseed powder and fruit.
mealIdea.hi: Dahi ka bowl, akhrot, alsi powder aur fruit ke saath.

tip.en: Consistency matters more than perfection. Small healthy choices every day add up.
tip.hi: Perfection se zyada consistency maayne rakhti hai. Roz ke chhote healthy choices jud kar bade ban jaate hain.

doThisWeek.en: Begin learning about kick awareness and continue talking to your baby every day.
doThisWeek.hi: Kick awareness ke baare mein seekhna shuru karein aur har din apne baby se baat karte rahein.

skipThisWeek.en: Ignoring persistent sleep problems or severe fatigue.
skipThisWeek.hi: Lagataar neend ki problem ya severe thakaan ko ignore karna.

redFlags.en: Contact your doctor if you experience bleeding, fluid leakage, painful contractions, severe headache, vision changes, sudden swelling or reduced fetal movement.
redFlags.hi: Apne doctor se sampark karein agar bleeding, fluid leakage, painful contractions, severe sir dard, vision changes, achanak sujan ya kam fetal movement ho.

myth.en: Babies keep their eyes closed until birth.
myth.hi: Babies janm tak apni aankhein band rakhte hain.

truth.en: By this stage, babies can open and close their eyes and may respond to light.
truth.hi: Is stage tak, babies apni aankhein khol aur band kar sakte hain aur roshni par react kar sakte hain.

affirmation.en: I am preparing myself with calmness, confidence and love.
affirmation.hi: Main khud ko shaanti, confidence aur pyaar ke saath taiyaar kar rahi hoon.

reflectionPrompt.en: What kind of parent do you hope to become?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Aap kaisi parent banne ki umeed rakhti hain?

spokenLine.hi: Maa, meri aankhen khul gayi hain.
spokenLine.en: Maa, my eyes are open now.

reflectionPrompt.en: What kind of parent do you hope to become?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Aap kaisi parent banne ki umeed rakhti hain?

journalPrompt.en: Describe the parent you aspire to be and the values you want to embody every day.
journalPrompt.hi: Us parent ke baare mein likhein jo aap banna chahti hain aur woh values jo aap har din jeena chahti hain.

photoPrompt.en: Capture your growing bump and write one thing you are proud of as a future parent.
photoPrompt.hi: Apne badhte bump ko capture karein aur ek cheez likhein jiske liye aap ek future parent ke roop mein proud hain.

whatSheMayFeel.en: More aware that birth is approaching and increasingly focused on preparing for the baby's arrival.
whatSheMayFeel.hi: Zyada aware ki birth kareeb aa rahi hai aur baby ke aane ki taiyaari par zyada focused.

whatYouCanDo.en: Learn about kick awareness and support her daily routines.
whatYouCanDo.hi: Kick awareness ke baare mein seekhein aur uske daily routines mein madad karein.

oneMission.en: Spend 10 minutes together noticing and celebrating your baby's movements.
oneMission.hi: Saath mein 10 minute bita kar apne baby ki movements ko notice karein aur celebrate karein.

shareMessage.en: Those little kicks are our baby's way of saying hello ❤
shareMessage.hi: Woh nanhi kicks hamare baby ka hello kehne ka tareeka hain ❤

weekHeadline.en: Your baby is gaining weight rapidly, building muscle and preparing for life outside the womb.
weekHeadline.hi: Tumhara baby tezi se weight badha raha hai, muscle bana raha hai aur womb ke bahar ki zindagi ke liye tayyari kar raha hai.

reveal.en: Maa, I am growing stronger, rounder and more ready for the world every day.
reveal.hi: Maa, main har din zyada mazboot, gol-matol aur duniya ke liye zyada tayyar hota ja raha hoon.

whatImDoing.en: I am building fat under my skin, strengthening my muscles and continuing to mature my lungs and brain. My movements are becoming more powerful as I grow.
whatImDoing.hi: Main apni skin ke neeche fat bana raha hoon, apni muscles mazboot kar raha hoon aur apne lungs aur brain ko aur mature kar raha hoon. Jaise-jaise main badhta hoon, meri movements aur powerful hoti ja rahi hain.

funFact.en: My brain is developing grooves and folds that will help support learning, memory and thinking after birth.
funFact.hi: Mere brain mein aisi grooves aur folds ban rahi hain jo janam ke baad seekhne, yaad rakhne aur sochne mein madad karengi.

physicalChanges.en: Your baby is taking up more space, which may lead to increased pressure on your ribs, bladder and digestive system.
physicalChanges.hi: Tumhara baby ab zyada jagah le raha hai, jiski wajah se tumhari ribs, bladder aur digestive system par zyada pressure pad sakta hai.

emotionalState.en: You may find yourself thinking more about labor, delivery and life with your newborn.
emotionalState.hi: Tum khud ko labor, delivery aur apne newborn ke saath zindagi ke baare mein zyada sochte hue paa sakti ho.

selfCareTip.en: Take smaller meals more frequently if heartburn is becoming a challenge.
selfCareTip.hi: Agar heartburn pareshaani ban rahi hai to chhote meals zyada baar khao.

reassurance.en: Feeling physically uncomfortable does not mean something is wrong. Your baby is simply growing rapidly now.
reassurance.hi: Sharirik roop se uncomfortable mehsoos hona iska matlab nahi ki kuch galat hai. Tumhara baby bas ab tezi se badh raha hai.

nutritionTheme.hi: Healthy Weight Gain ko Support Karna

whyNow.en: Your baby is entering a period of rapid weight gain and body fat development.
whyNow.hi: Tumhara baby tez weight gain aur body fat banne ke daur mein aa raha hai.

benefit.en: Provide protein, healthy fats and energy to support growth.
benefit.hi: Protein, healthy fats aur energy deti hai jo growth ko support karti hai.

howToConsume.en: Roasted peanuts as a snack or mixed into chaat.
howToConsume.hi: Bhuni hui moongfali snack ki tarah ya chaat mein milakar.

mealIdea.en: Paneer bhurji with roti and a small bowl of peanut chaat.
mealIdea.hi: Paneer bhurji roti ke saath aur ek chhota bowl peanut chaat.

tip.en: Choose nutrient-dense snacks rather than highly processed foods.
tip.hi: Highly processed foods ke bajaye nutrient-dense snacks chuno.

doThisWeek.en: Start creating a simple baby essentials checklist and discuss birth preferences with your healthcare provider.
doThisWeek.hi: Ek simple baby essentials checklist banana shuru karo aur apne healthcare provider se birth preferences discuss karo.

skipThisWeek.en: Buying every baby product you see on social media.
skipThisWeek.hi: Social media par dikhne wala har baby product khareedna.

redFlags.en: Contact your doctor if you experience bleeding, fluid leakage, painful contractions, severe headache, vision changes, sudden swelling or reduced fetal movement.
redFlags.hi: Apne doctor se sampark karo agar bleeding, fluid leakage, dard wali contractions, tez sir dard, nazar mein badlav, achanak sujan ya baby ki movement kam ho.

myth.en: A bigger baby bump means an easier delivery.
myth.hi: Bada baby bump matlab aasaan delivery.

truth.en: Bump size does not reliably predict delivery experience or baby size.
truth.hi: Bump ka size bharose se delivery ka experience ya baby ka size nahi bata sakta.

affirmation.en: I trust my instincts and my journey.
affirmation.hi: Main apne instincts aur apne safar par bharosa karti hoon.

reflectionPrompt.en: What lesson from your childhood would you most like to pass on?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Apne bachpan se kaunsa sabak tum sabse zyada aage le jaana chahogi?

spokenLine.hi: Maa, main tumhari duniya ko mehsoos kar raha hoon.
spokenLine.en: Maa, I am experiencing your world in my own way.

reflectionPrompt.en: What lesson from your childhood would you most like to pass on?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Apne bachpan se kaunsa sabak tum sabse zyada aage le jaana chahogi?

journalPrompt.en: Tell your baby about a lesson that shaped your life and why it matters.
journalPrompt.hi: Apne baby ko kisi aise sabak ke baare mein batao jisne tumhari zindagi banayi aur woh kyun maayne rakhta hai.

photoPrompt.en: Take a photo of an object, place or memory connected to your childhood.
photoPrompt.hi: Kisi aisi cheez, jagah ya yaad ki photo lo jo tumhare bachpan se judi ho.

whatSheMayFeel.en: More focused on baby preparations and increasingly aware that birth is approaching.
whatSheMayFeel.hi: Baby ki tayyariyon par zyada dhyan aur is baat se zyada wakif ki birth paas aa raha hai.

whatYouCanDo.en: Help separate essentials from unnecessary purchases and reduce decision fatigue.
whatYouCanDo.hi: Zaroori aur gair-zaroori kharidari ko alag karne mein madad karo aur decision fatigue kam karo.

oneMission.en: Create a realistic baby essentials checklist together.
oneMission.hi: Saath mein ek realistic baby essentials checklist banao.

shareMessage.en: We're preparing our home for someone very special ❤
shareMessage.hi: Hum apne ghar ko kisi bahut khaas mehmaan ke liye tayyar kar rahe hain ❤

weekHeadline.en: Your baby's brain is developing at an incredible pace and important neural pathways are being strengthened every day.
weekHeadline.hi: Tumhare baby ka brain incredible speed se develop ho raha hai aur har din important neural pathways mazboot ho rahe hain.

reveal.en: Maa, my brain is growing rapidly and helping me prepare for life outside your womb.
reveal.hi: Maa, mera brain tezi se badh raha hai aur mujhe tumhare pet ke baahar ki zindagi ke liye taiyar kar raha hai.

whatImDoing.en: My brain is developing new folds and connections, my lungs continue maturing and I am gaining body fat that helps regulate temperature after birth.
whatImDoing.hi: Mere brain mein naye folds aur connections ban rahe hain, mere lungs mature hote ja rahe hain aur mujh par body fat aa raha hai jo birth ke baad temperature control mein madad karta hai.

funFact.en: My brain now looks much more like a newborn's brain than it did just a few weeks ago.
funFact.hi: Kuch hafte pehle ke mukable mera brain ab kaafi zyada ek newborn ke brain jaisa dikhta hai.

physicalChanges.en: Your growing uterus may press upward on your diaphragm, making it easier to become breathless during normal activities.
physicalChanges.hi: Tumhara badhta uterus tumhare diaphragm par upar ki taraf dabaav daal sakta hai, jisse normal kaam karte hue saans phoolna aasaan ho jaata hai.

emotionalState.en: Many mothers begin thinking seriously about labor, delivery and postpartum recovery.
emotionalState.hi: Kayi maayein ab labor, delivery aur postpartum recovery ke baare mein gambhirta se sochne lagti hain.

selfCareTip.en: Slow down when needed and give yourself permission to rest without guilt.
selfCareTip.hi: Zaroorat padne par dheema ho jao aur bina guilt ke aaram karne ki ijaazat khud ko do.

reassurance.en: Feeling physically slower during the third trimester is expected and often a sign that your body is adapting to your baby's growth.
reassurance.hi: Teesre trimester mein physically dheema feel karna normal hai aur aksar yeh nishani hai ki tumhara body baby ki growth ke hisaab se adjust kar raha hai.

whyNow.en: Your baby's brain is undergoing one of the most significant periods of growth during pregnancy.
whyNow.hi: Tumhare baby ka brain pregnancy ke sabse important growth periods mein se ek se guzar raha hai.

benefit.en: Provides plant-based Omega-3 fats that support healthy brain development.
benefit.hi: Plant-based Omega-3 fats deta hai jo healthy brain development mein madad karte hain.

howToConsume.en: Add ground flaxseed to atta, curd or smoothies.
howToConsume.hi: Pisi hui alsi ko atte, dahi ya smoothies mein milao.

mealIdea.en: Vegetable paratha with curd and a tablespoon of ground flaxseed mixed into yogurt.
mealIdea.hi: Vegetable paratha dahi ke saath aur ek tablespoon pisi hui alsi dahi mein milakar.

tip.en: Brain growth requires consistent nutrition, not occasional healthy meals.
tip.hi: Brain growth ke liye lagatar nutrition chahiye, kabhi-kabhi ka healthy meal nahi.

doThisWeek.en: Begin learning about labor stages and discuss any birth-related questions with your healthcare provider.
doThisWeek.hi: Labor ke stages ke baare mein seekhna shuru karo aur birth se judi koi bhi baat apne healthcare provider se discuss karo.

skipThisWeek.en: Assuming labor preparation can wait until the last few weeks.
skipThisWeek.hi: Yeh maan lena ki labor ki taiyari aakhri kuch hafton tak ruk sakti hai.

redFlags.en: Contact your doctor if you experience bleeding, fluid leakage, painful contractions, severe headache, vision changes, sudden swelling or reduced fetal movement.
redFlags.hi: Agar bleeding, fluid leakage, dard wale contractions, tez sar dard, vision mein badlav, achaanak soojan ya baby ki movement kam ho to apne doctor se contact karo.

myth.en: Labor always starts dramatically with water breaking.
myth.hi: Labor hamesha paani ke phootne ke saath dramatic tareeke se shuru hota hai.

truth.en: Labor can begin in many different ways, including gradual contractions.
truth.hi: Labor kayi alag tareeko se shuru ho sakta hai, jaise dheere-dheere badhte contractions.

affirmation.en: I choose peace over worry.
affirmation.hi: Main chinta ke bajaye shaanti chunti hoon.

reflectionPrompt.en: What helps you stay calm during uncertain moments?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Unsure pal mein tumhe shaant rehne mein kaunsi cheez madad karti hai?

spokenLine.hi: Maa, mera dimag bahut tezi se vikas kar raha hai.
spokenLine.en: Maa, my brain is growing rapidly.

reflectionPrompt.en: What helps you stay calm during uncertain moments?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Unsure pal mein tumhe shaant rehne mein kaunsi cheez madad karti hai?

journalPrompt.en: Write a list of the people, habits and thoughts that help you feel safe and supported.
journalPrompt.hi: Un logon, aadaton aur vichaaron ki list banao jo tumhe safe aur supported feel karne mein madad karte hain.

photoPrompt.en: Capture your favorite comfort space, cozy corner or place where you feel most at peace.
photoPrompt.hi: Apni favorite comfort space, cozy corner ya woh jagah capture karo jahan tum sabse zyada shaant feel karti ho.

whatSheMayFeel.en: Beginning to think seriously about labor and delivery while balancing excitement and uncertainty.
whatSheMayFeel.hi: Excitement aur uncertainty ke beech labor aur delivery ke baare mein gambhirta se sochne lagi.

whatYouCanDo.en: Learn about labor alongside her and become an informed support person.
whatYouCanDo.hi: Uske saath labor ke baare mein seekho aur ek informed support person bano.

oneMission.en: Watch one childbirth education video or read one labor-preparation article together.
oneMission.hi: Saath mein ek childbirth education video dekho ya ek labor-preparation article padho.

shareMessage.en: Every week brings us closer to meeting our baby ❤
shareMessage.hi: Har hafta hamein hamare baby se milne ke aur kareeb le aata hai ❤

weekHeadline.en: Your baby is gaining fat, building strength and looking more and more like the newborn you'll soon meet.
weekHeadline.hi: Tumhara baby fat badha raha hai, taakat bana raha hai aur dheere-dheere us newborn jaisa dikhne laga hai jisse tum jald milogi.

reveal.en: Maa, I am becoming stronger, rounder and more ready to meet you every day.
reveal.hi: Maa, main har din mazboot, gol-mol aur tumse milne ke liye aur tayyar hota ja raha hoon.

whatImDoing.en: I am gaining body fat, strengthening my muscles and continuing to mature my lungs and brain. My movements are becoming more powerful even though space is starting to feel tighter.
whatImDoing.hi: Main body fat badha raha hoon, apne muscles mazboot kar raha hoon aur apne lungs aur brain ko mature kar raha hoon. Jagah thodi tang hone lagi hai, phir bhi mere movements aur powerful ho rahe hain.

funFact.en: Many babies now have regular sleep and wake cycles, which may explain why I seem active at certain times of the day.
funFact.hi: Kai babies ab regular sleep aur wake cycles follow karte hain, shayad isiliye main din ke kuch khaas samay active lagta hoon.

physicalChanges.en: As your baby grows, you may feel stronger stretches, kicks and pressure on your ribs. Sleep can become more challenging as finding a comfortable position gets harder.
physicalChanges.hi: Jaise-jaise tumhara baby badhta hai, tum jyada mazboot stretches, kicks aur ribs par pressure feel kar sakti ho. Comfortable position dhoondhna mushkil hone se neend bhi challenging ho sakti hai.

emotionalState.en: You may find yourself alternating between excitement about meeting your baby and feeling overwhelmed by everything still to prepare.
emotionalState.hi: Tum kabhi baby se milne ke excitement aur kabhi abhi tak tayyar karne wali har cheez se overwhelmed feel kar sakti ho.

selfCareTip.en: Create a relaxing evening routine and use pillows to support your back, bump and legs.
selfCareTip.hi: Ek relaxing evening routine banao aur apni kamar, bump aur pairon ko support dene ke liye takiyon ka istemaal karo.

reassurance.en: Feeling physically uncomfortable does not mean something is wrong. Your baby is simply growing rapidly now.
reassurance.hi: Physically uncomfortable feel karne ka matlab yeh nahi ki kuch galat hai. Tumhara baby bas ab tezi se badh raha hai.

whyNow.en: Your baby is building muscle, storing nutrients and preparing for the final weeks of development.
whyNow.hi: Tumhara baby muscle bana raha hai, nutrients store kar raha hai aur development ke aakhri hafton ke liye tayyari kar raha hai.

benefit.en: Provides high-quality protein and calcium to support muscle and bone development.
benefit.hi: High-quality protein aur Calcium deta hai jo muscle aur haddiyon ke development mein madad karte hain.

howToConsume.en: Paneer bhurji, grilled paneer or paneer curry.
howToConsume.hi: Paneer bhurji, grilled paneer ya paneer curry.

mealIdea.en: Paneer bhurji with multigrain roti and curd.
mealIdea.hi: Paneer bhurji multigrain roti aur dahi ke saath.

tip.en: Spread protein intake across the day rather than consuming most of it in one meal.
tip.hi: Jyadatar protein ek hi meal mein lene ke bajaye use poore din mein baant lo.

doThisWeek.en: Start discussing postpartum support and recovery plans with your family and partner.
doThisWeek.hi: Apne family aur partner ke saath postpartum support aur recovery plans par baat karna shuru karo.

skipThisWeek.en: Trying to do everything yourself.
skipThisWeek.hi: Har cheez khud hi karne ki koshish karna.

redFlags.en: Contact your doctor if you experience bleeding, fluid leakage, painful contractions, severe headache, vision changes, sudden swelling or reduced fetal movement.
redFlags.hi: Agar bleeding, fluid leakage, dardnaak contractions, tez sir dard, vision mein badlaav, achanak soojan ya baby ki kam movement ho to apne doctor se sampark karo.

myth.en: The baby is fully developed now and just gaining weight.
myth.hi: Baby ab poori tarah develop ho chuka hai aur bas weight badha raha hai.

truth.en: Important brain, lung and nervous system development continues throughout the third trimester.
truth.hi: Brain, lungs aur nervous system ka zaroori development poore third trimester mein chalta rehta hai.

affirmation.en: My body and baby are working together beautifully.
affirmation.hi: Meri body aur mera baby khoobsurati se saath mein kaam kar rahe hain.

reflectionPrompt.en: What has pregnancy taught you about patience?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Pregnancy ne aapko sabr ke baare mein kya sikhaya?

spokenLine.hi: Maa, main aur mazboot aur gol-matol ho raha hoon.
spokenLine.en: Maa, I am becoming stronger and rounder.

reflectionPrompt.en: What has pregnancy taught you about patience?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Pregnancy ne aapko sabr ke baare mein kya sikhaya?

journalPrompt.en: Describe a situation during pregnancy that taught you to slow down, trust the process or be patient with yourself.
journalPrompt.hi: Pregnancy ki aisi koi situation describe karein jisne aapko thamna, process par bharosa karna ya khud ke saath sabr rakhna sikhaya.

photoPrompt.en: Capture a quiet everyday moment that reflects this stage of your journey.
photoPrompt.hi: Apne safar ke is phase ko darshaata koi shaant rozana ka pal capture karein.

whatSheMayFeel.en: Physically tired and mentally stretched as sleep becomes more difficult.
whatSheMayFeel.hi: Physically thaki hui aur mentally khinchaav mein kyunki neend aur mushkil ho rahi hai.
