whatYouCanDo.en: Protect her rest and reduce unnecessary responsibilities whenever possible.
whatYouCanDo.hi: Uska rest protect karo aur jab bhi ho sake gairzaroori zimmedariyan kam karo.

oneMission.en: Take ownership of one recurring household responsibility for the rest of the pregnancy.
oneMission.hi: Baaki pregnancy ke liye ghar ki ek regular zimmedari poori tarah apne upar le lo.

shareMessage.en: Rest today is an investment in tomorrow ❤
shareMessage.hi: Aaj ka rest kal ke liye ek investment hai ❤

weekHeadline.en: Your baby is practicing breathing, sleeping and preparing for life outside the womb.
weekHeadline.hi: Tumhara baby saans lene, sone aur womb ke bahar ki zindagi ke liye taiyaari kar raha hai.

reveal.en: Maa, I am practicing the skills I will need when we finally meet.
reveal.hi: Maa, main un cheezon ki practice kar raha hoon jo mujhe tab chahiye hongi jab hum aakhirkaar milenge.

whatImDoing.en: I am practicing breathing movements, sleeping in cycles and continuing to mature my lungs and nervous system. My body is storing important nutrients and energy for life after birth.
whatImDoing.hi: Main saans lene ki movements ki practice kar raha hoon, cycles mein so raha hoon aur apne lungs aur nervous system ko mature kar raha hoon. Mera body janam ke baad ki zindagi ke liye zaroori nutrients aur energy store kar raha hai.

funFact.en: Although I am not breathing air yet, I regularly practice breathing movements using amniotic fluid.
funFact.hi: Bhale hi main abhi hawa mein saans nahi le raha, par main amniotic fluid se regular saans lene ki movements ki practice karta hoon.

physicalChanges.en: Your baby is taking up more room than ever before. You may notice increased pressure on your ribs, bladder and pelvis.
physicalChanges.hi: Tumhara baby ab pehle se zyada jagah le raha hai. Tumhe apni pasliyon, bladder aur pelvis par zyada dabaav mehsoos ho sakta hai.

emotionalState.en: Many mothers begin mentally preparing for labor while imagining life with their newborn.
emotionalState.hi: Bahut si mothers apne newborn ke saath zindagi ki kalpana karte hue labor ke liye mansik taur par taiyaari shuru kar deti hain.

selfCareTip.en: Take breaks throughout the day and prioritize comfortable resting positions.
selfCareTip.hi: Din bhar mein break lo aur aaramdaayak resting positions ko priority do.

reassurance.en: Many third-trimester symptoms are simply signs that your baby is growing and preparing for birth.
reassurance.hi: Teesre trimester ke bahut se symptoms bas is baat ke ishaare hain ki tumhara baby badh raha hai aur janam ke liye taiyaari kar raha hai.

whyNow.en: Your baby is storing iron and nutrients that will support growth during the first months after birth.
whyNow.hi: Tumhara baby iron aur nutrients store kar raha hai jo janam ke baad pehle kuchh mahinon mein growth ko support karenge.

benefit.en: Provides iron, folate and antioxidants that support healthy blood production.
benefit.hi: Healthy blood production ko support karne wale iron, folate aur antioxidants deti hai.

howToConsume.en: Palak dal, palak paneer or spinach soup.
howToConsume.hi: Palak dal, palak paneer ya palak soup.

mealIdea.en: Palak paneer with roti and fresh salad.
mealIdea.hi: Roti aur fresh salad ke saath palak paneer.

tip.en: Pair iron-rich foods with lemon, amla or oranges to improve absorption.
tip.hi: Behtar absorption ke liye iron-rich foods ko nimbu, amla ya santare ke saath khao.

doThisWeek.en: Start packing your hospital bag and ensure important documents are easily accessible.
doThisWeek.hi: Apna hospital bag pack karna shuru karo aur dhyan rakho ki zaroori documents aasaani se mil jaayein.

skipThisWeek.en: Waiting until labor begins to organize hospital essentials.
skipThisWeek.hi: Hospital ki zaroori cheezein organize karne ke liye labor shuru hone ka intezaar karna.

redFlags.en: Contact your doctor if you experience bleeding, fluid leakage, painful contractions, severe headache, vision changes, sudden swelling or reduced fetal movement.
redFlags.hi: Apne doctor se sampark karo agar tumhe bleeding, fluid leakage, dardnaak contractions, tez sar dard, nazar mein badlaav, achaanak soojan ya fetal movement kam ho.

myth.en: Babies only start preparing for birth during labor.
myth.hi: Babies sirf labor ke dauraan janam ki taiyaari shuru karte hain.

truth.en: Your baby has been preparing for birth for months through breathing practice, growth and organ development.
truth.hi: Tumhara baby mahinon se saans ki practice, growth aur organ development ke zariye janam ki taiyaari kar raha hai.

affirmation.en: I am preparing for birth one day at a time.
affirmation.hi: Main ek-ek din karke janam ke liye taiyaari kar rahi hoon.

reflectionPrompt.en: What are you most looking forward to after your baby arrives?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Aapke baby ke aane ke baad aap sabse zyada kis cheez ka intezaar kar rahi hain?

spokenLine.hi: Maa, main saans lene ki practice kar raha hoon.
spokenLine.en: Maa, I am practicing breathing.

reflectionPrompt.en: What are you most looking forward to after your baby arrives?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Aapke baby ke aane ke baad aap sabse zyada kis cheez ka intezaar kar rahi hain?

journalPrompt.en: Describe your first day at home with your newborn. What do you imagine it will feel like?
journalPrompt.hi: Apne newborn ke saath ghar par pehle din ke baare mein likho. Aapko lagta hai woh kaisa mehsoos hoga?

photoPrompt.en: Capture something you have prepared for your baby — clothes, nursery, books or a special keepsake.
photoPrompt.hi: Apne baby ke liye tayyar ki gayi koi cheez capture karo — kapde, nursery, books ya koi khaas keepsake.

whatSheMayFeel.en: Focused on preparing for birth while balancing excitement and nervous anticipation.
whatSheMayFeel.hi: Janam ki taiyaari par focused, excitement aur thodi nervous beqarari ke beech balance banate hue.

whatYouCanDo.en: Help organize hospital bag essentials and practical preparations.
whatYouCanDo.hi: Hospital bag ki zaroori cheezein aur practical taiyaariyon ko organize karne mein madad karein.

oneMission.en: Pack your own hospital-day essentials and review the route to the hospital together.
oneMission.hi: Apni hospital-day ki zaroori cheezein pack karein aur saath mein hospital ka rasta review karein.

shareMessage.en: We're getting ready for the biggest day of our lives ❤
shareMessage.hi: Hum apni zindagi ke sabse bade din ki taiyaari kar rahe hain ❤

weekHeadline.en: Your baby is gaining weight steadily and receiving important immune protection from you.
weekHeadline.hi: Aapka baby steadily weight gain kar raha hai aur aapse zaroori immune protection paa raha hai.

reveal.en: Maa, you are already helping protect me, even before I am born.
reveal.hi: Maa, tum mere paida hone se pehle hi mujhe protect karne mein madad kar rahi ho.

whatImDoing.en: My brain and lungs continue maturing, and I am receiving antibodies from you that will help protect me after birth. I am gaining fat and becoming stronger every day.
whatImDoing.hi: Mera brain aur lungs mature hote ja rahe hain, aur main tumse antibodies paa raha hoon jo birth ke baad mujhe protect karne mein madad karenge. Main fat badha raha hoon aur har din mazboot ho raha hoon.

funFact.en: Many of the antibodies that help protect newborns from illness come from their mothers during the final weeks of pregnancy.
funFact.hi: Naye babies ko bimari se bachane wali bahut si antibodies unhe pregnancy ke aakhri hafton mein apni maaon se milti hain.

physicalChanges.en: Your baby's growth may make movements feel stronger but less acrobatic because there is less room inside the uterus.
physicalChanges.hi: Aapke baby ki growth ki wajah se movements mazboot lekin kam acrobatic feel ho sakti hain kyunki uterus ke andar ab kam jagah hai.

emotionalState.en: You may be feeling excited, protective and increasingly focused on preparing for your baby's arrival.
emotionalState.hi: Aap excited, protective aur baby ke aane ki taiyaari par zyada focused mehsoos kar sakti hain.

selfCareTip.en: Rest whenever your body asks for it. Energy levels often fluctuate during the final weeks.
selfCareTip.hi: Jab bhi aapka body kahe tab aaram karein. Aakhri hafton mein energy levels aksar upar-neeche hote rehte hain.

reassurance.en: Slower, rolling movements can be normal now as your baby has less space to move freely.
reassurance.hi: Dheemi, ludhakti hui movements ab normal ho sakti hain kyunki aapke baby ke paas freely hilne ke liye kam jagah hai.

whyNow.en: Your baby is receiving important immune support and continuing rapid growth.
whyNow.hi: Aapka baby zaroori immune support paa raha hai aur tezi se badhta ja raha hai.

benefit.en: Rich in Vitamin C, supporting immunity and helping improve iron absorption.
benefit.hi: Vitamin C se bharpoor, jo immunity ko support karta hai aur iron absorption behtar karne mein madad karta hai.

howToConsume.en: Fresh, as juice or in homemade chutneys.
howToConsume.hi: Taaza, juice ke roop mein ya homemade chutney mein.

mealIdea.en: Moong dal khichdi with salad and fresh amla.
mealIdea.hi: Moong dal khichdi salad aur taaze amla ke saath.

tip.en: Vitamin C-rich foods help your body absorb iron more effectively.
tip.hi: Vitamin C se bharpoor foods aapke body ko iron zyada effectively absorb karne mein madad karte hain.

doThisWeek.en: Finalize your hospital bag and review your birth plan if you have one.
doThisWeek.hi: Apna hospital bag finalize karein aur agar aapke paas birth plan hai to use review karein.

skipThisWeek.en: Assuming every baby item must be purchased before birth.
skipThisWeek.hi: Yeh maan lena ki har baby item birth se pehle khareedna zaroori hai.

redFlags.en: Contact your doctor if you experience bleeding, fluid leakage, painful contractions, severe headache, vision changes, sudden swelling or reduced fetal movement.
redFlags.hi: Agar aapko bleeding, fluid leakage, dardnaak contractions, tez sir dard, vision changes, achanak sujan ya kam fetal movement ho to apne doctor se contact karein.

myth.en: The baby's immune system only develops after birth.
myth.hi: Baby ka immune system sirf birth ke baad develop hota hai.

truth.en: Important immune protection begins during pregnancy through antibody transfer from mother to baby.
truth.hi: Zaroori immune protection pregnancy ke dauran hi maa se baby tak antibody transfer ke through shuru ho jaati hai.

affirmation.en: I receive strength from generations of mothers before me.
affirmation.hi: Mujhe apne se pehle ki peedhiyon ki maaon se taakat milti hai.

reflectionPrompt.en: Which family tradition would you like your child to experience?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Kaunsi family tradition aap chahti hain ki aapka bachcha anubhav kare?

spokenLine.hi: Maa, tum mujhe janm se pehle hi suraksha de rahi ho.
spokenLine.en: Maa, you are protecting me even before birth.

reflectionPrompt.en: Which family tradition would you like your child to experience?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Kaunsi family tradition aap chahti hain ki aapka bachcha anubhav kare?

journalPrompt.en: Write about a family memory, celebration or tradition you hope to share with your child.
journalPrompt.hi: Koi family memory, celebration ya tradition likhein jo aap apne bachche ke saath share karna chahti hain.

photoPrompt.en: Take a photo of a family keepsake, recipe, tradition or object that holds special meaning.
photoPrompt.hi: Kisi family keepsake, recipe, tradition ya aisi cheez ki photo lein jiska khaas matlab ho.

whatSheMayFeel.en: Excited about meeting the baby but occasionally nervous about parenting and the responsibilities ahead.
whatSheMayFeel.hi: Baby se milne ko lekar excited lekin kabhi-kabhi parenting aur aage ki responsibilities ko lekar nervous.

whatYouCanDo.en: Remind her that great parents learn as they go and that nobody has all the answers from day one.
whatYouCanDo.hi: Use yaad dilayein ki achhe parents karte-karte seekhte hain aur pehle din se kisi ke paas saare jawab nahi hote.

oneMission.en: Discuss one parenting value that both of you want your child to grow up with.
oneMission.hi: Ek parenting value par baat karein jo aap dono chahte hain ki aapka bachcha lekar bade ho.

shareMessage.en: Our baby doesn't need perfect parents, only loving ones ❤
shareMessage.hi: Hamare baby ko perfect parents nahi, sirf pyaar karne wale parents chahiye ❤

weekHeadline.en: Your baby is entering the final stage of preparation for birth and most major organs are now well developed.
weekHeadline.hi: Aapka baby birth ki final taiyaari ke stage mein aa raha hai aur zyadatar major organs ab achhe se develop ho chuke hain.

reveal.en: Maa, I am almost ready. Every day brings us closer to meeting each other.
reveal.hi: Maa, main lagbhag taiyaar hoon. Har din hume ek doosre se milne ke aur kareeb laata hai.

whatImDoing.en: My lungs continue maturing, my brain is developing rapidly and I am gaining body fat that helps regulate my temperature after birth. Most of my systems are now preparing for life outside the womb.
whatImDoing.hi: Mere lungs mature ho rahe hain, mera brain tezi se develop ho raha hai aur main body fat badha raha hoon, jo janm ke baad mera temperature regulate karne mein madad karega. Mere zyadatar systems ab womb ke bahar ki zindagi ke liye taiyaar ho rahe hain.

funFact.en: My fingernails have grown to the tips of my fingers and I may already have a full head of hair.
funFact.hi: Mere fingernails meri ungliyon ke top tak badh gaye hain aur mere sir par poore baal bhi ho sakte hain.

physicalChanges.en: Your baby is taking up a significant amount of space now. You may notice increased pelvic pressure, stronger movements and greater physical fatigue.
physicalChanges.hi: Aapka baby ab kaafi jagah le raha hai. Aapko pelvic pressure badhta hua, mazboot movements aur zyada physical thakaan mehsoos ho sakti hai.

emotionalState.en: Many mothers feel a mixture of excitement, anticipation and occasional nervousness about labor and delivery.
emotionalState.hi: Bahut si mothers labour aur delivery ko le kar excitement, intezaar aur kabhi kabhi nervousness ka mishran mehsoos karti hain.

selfCareTip.en: Listen to your body's signals and don't hesitate to slow down when needed.
selfCareTip.hi: Apni body ke signals sunein aur zaroorat padne par dheere hone mein hichkichayein nahi.

reassurance.en: Feeling physically tired at this stage is normal. Your body is doing an extraordinary amount of work.
reassurance.hi: Is stage par physically thaka mehsoos karna normal hai. Aapki body bahut zyada kaam kar rahi hai.

whyNow.en: Your baby continues gaining weight and storing nutrients needed for the first months after birth.
whyNow.hi: Aapka baby vajan badhata ja raha hai aur janm ke baad ke pehle mahinon ke liye zaroori nutrients store kar raha hai.

benefit.en: Provides protein, iron and fiber to support healthy growth during the final weeks.
benefit.hi: Protein, iron aur fiber deta hai, jo aakhri hafton mein healthy growth mein madad karta hai.

howToConsume.en: Rajma curry with rice or roti.
howToConsume.hi: Rajma curry, chawal ya roti ke saath.

mealIdea.en: Rajma rice with cucumber salad and curd.
mealIdea.hi: Rajma rice, kheere ke salad aur dahi ke saath.

tip.en: Continue prioritizing nutrient-rich foods rather than increasing portions unnecessarily.
tip.hi: Portion bewajah badhane ke bajaye nutrient-rich foods ko priority dete rahein.

doThisWeek.en: Complete your hospital bag, organize important documents and review labor signs.
doThisWeek.hi: Apna hospital bag poora karein, important documents organize karein aur labour ke signs review karein.

skipThisWeek.en: Taking on major new commitments or physically exhausting tasks.
skipThisWeek.hi: Koi bada naya commitment ya physically thakane wala kaam apne sir lena.

redFlags.en: Contact your doctor if you experience bleeding, fluid leakage, painful contractions, severe headache, vision changes, sudden swelling or reduced fetal movement.
redFlags.hi: Apne doctor se sampark karein agar bleeding, fluid leakage, painful contractions, severe sir dard, vision changes, achanak sujan ya kam fetal movement ho.

myth.en: Once the baby is head-down, there is nothing left to develop.
myth.hi: Jab baby head-down ho jaye, to develop hone ke liye kuch nahi bachta.

truth.en: Important brain, lung and immune system development continues until birth.
truth.hi: Important brain, lung aur immune system development janm tak jaari rehti hai.

affirmation.en: I trust that my baby knows how to grow and my body knows how to nurture.
affirmation.hi: Mujhe bharosa hai ki mera baby badhna jaanta hai aur meri body nurture karna jaanti hai.

reflectionPrompt.en: What are three things you already love about yourself as a mother?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Ek maa ke roop mein woh teen cheezein kya hain jo aap apne baare mein pehle se pasand karti hain?

spokenLine.hi: Maa, main lagbhag taiyaar hoon.
spokenLine.en: Maa, I am almost ready.

reflectionPrompt.en: What are three things you already love about yourself as a mother?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Ek maa ke roop mein woh teen cheezein kya hain jo aap apne baare mein pehle se pasand karti hain?

journalPrompt.en: Write a compassionate letter to yourself about the mother you are becoming and everything you have already accomplished.
journalPrompt.hi: Khud ko ek pyaar bhara khat likhein, us maa ke baare mein jo aap ban rahi hain aur sab kuch jo aap pehle se haasil kar chuki hain.

photoPrompt.en: Capture yourself doing something that makes you feel strong, capable or proud.
photoPrompt.hi: Khud ko kuch aisa karte hue capture karein jisse aap strong, capable ya proud mehsoos karein.

whatSheMayFeel.en: Protective of her energy, increasingly focused on birth and wanting a sense of calm and control.
whatSheMayFeel.hi: Apni energy ko le kar protective, birth par zyada focused aur sukoon aur control chahti hui.

whatYouCanDo.en: Help manage expectations, reduce stress and protect her physical and emotional space.
whatYouCanDo.hi: Expectations manage karne, stress kam karne aur uske physical aur emotional space ko protect karne mein madad karein.

oneMission.en: Discuss postpartum visitor expectations and agree on boundaries that support recovery.
oneMission.hi: Postpartum visitor expectations par baat karein aur aise boundaries par sehmat hon jo recovery mein madad karein.

shareMessage.en: Your comfort and well-being matter just as much as every other preparation ❤
shareMessage.hi: Aapka comfort aur well-being har doosri taiyaari jitne hi maayne rakhte hain ❤

weekHeadline.en: Your baby is likely moving into a head-down position and making final preparations for birth.
weekHeadline.hi: Tumhara baby shayad head-down position mein aa raha hai aur birth ki aakhri tayyariyaan kar raha hai.

reveal.en: Maa, I'm finding my best position for the big day. We're getting very close now.
reveal.hi: Maa, main bade din ke liye apni sabse achhi position dhoondh raha hoon. Hum ab bahut kareeb aa gaye hain.

whatImDoing.en: My lungs are nearly mature, my brain continues developing rapidly and I am gaining body fat every day. Many babies begin settling into a head-down position around this stage.
whatImDoing.hi: Mere lungs lagbhag mature ho chuke hain, mera brain tezi se develop hota ja raha hai aur main har din body fat badha raha hoon. Kai babies is stage ke aas-paas head-down position mein settle hone lagte hain.

funFact.en: Even after birth, my brain will continue growing rapidly, but many important foundations are being built right now.
funFact.hi: Janam ke baad bhi mera brain tezi se badhta rahega, par kai important neenvein abhi ban rahi hain.

physicalChanges.en: You may notice increased pelvic pressure, more frequent trips to the bathroom and stronger stretching sensations as your baby grows.
physicalChanges.hi: Jaise-jaise tumhara baby badhta hai, tum pelvic pressure badhna, baar-baar bathroom jaana aur zyada stretching wali sensations mehsoos kar sakti ho.

emotionalState.en: Excitement and anticipation are often mixed with curiosity about when labor will begin.
emotionalState.hi: Excitement aur intezaar ke saath aksar yeh curiosity bhi milti hai ki labor kab shuru hoga.

selfCareTip.en: Stay hydrated and rest whenever your body asks for it. Energy conservation is important now.
selfCareTip.hi: Paani peeti raho aur jab bhi tumhara body kahe tab aaram karo. Ab energy bachana zaroori hai.

reassurance.en: Braxton Hicks contractions are common during this stage and are often your body's way of preparing for labor.
reassurance.hi: Braxton Hicks contractions is stage mein aam hote hain aur aksar yeh tumhare body ka labor ke liye tayyari karne ka tareeka hota hai.

whyNow.en: Your body is working hard and needs steady energy to support both you and your growing baby.
whyNow.hi: Tumhara body khoob mehnat kar raha hai aur use tum dono ko support karne ke liye steady energy chahiye.

benefit.en: Provide slow-release energy and fiber that help support digestion and stable energy levels.
benefit.hi: Slow-release energy aur fiber dete hain jo digestion aur stable energy levels ko support karte hain.

howToConsume.en: Oats porridge, vegetable oats upma or overnight oats.
howToConsume.hi: Oats porridge, vegetable oats upma ya overnight oats.

mealIdea.en: Vegetable oats upma with curd and roasted peanuts.
mealIdea.hi: Vegetable oats upma dahi aur bhuni moongfali ke saath.

tip.en: Choose smaller frequent meals if large meals are becoming uncomfortable.
tip.hi: Agar bade meals uncomfortable ho rahe hain to chhote aur baar-baar wale meals chuno.

doThisWeek.en: Learn the difference between Braxton Hicks contractions and true labor contractions.
doThisWeek.hi: Braxton Hicks contractions aur asli labor contractions ke beech ka fark samjho.

skipThisWeek.en: Panicking every time you feel tightening in your abdomen.
skipThisWeek.hi: Jab bhi pet mein kasaav mehsoos ho tab har baar ghabra jaana.

redFlags.en: Contact your doctor if you experience fluid leakage, regular painful contractions, bleeding, severe headache, vision changes, sudden swelling or reduced fetal movement.
redFlags.hi: Apne doctor se sampark karo agar fluid leakage, regular dard wali contractions, bleeding, tez sir dard, nazar mein badlav, achanak sujan ya baby ki movement kam ho.

myth.en: Every contraction means labor has started.
myth.hi: Har contraction ka matlab labor shuru ho gaya.

truth.en: Braxton Hicks contractions are common and often differ from true labor contractions.
truth.hi: Braxton Hicks contractions aam hote hain aur aksar asli labor contractions se alag hote hain.

affirmation.en: My body is preparing wisely for birth.
affirmation.hi: Mera body birth ke liye samajhdaari se tayyari kar raha hai.

reflectionPrompt.en: What are you most proud of from your pregnancy journey?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Apni pregnancy ke safar mein tumhe kis baat par sabse zyada garv hai?

spokenLine.hi: Maa, main tumse milne ki taiyaari kar raha hoon.
spokenLine.en: Maa, I am preparing to meet you.

reflectionPrompt.en: What are you most proud of from your pregnancy journey?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Apni pregnancy ke safar mein tumhe kis baat par sabse zyada garv hai?

journalPrompt.en: Write about the strongest version of yourself that has emerged during pregnancy.
journalPrompt.hi: Pregnancy ke dauraan jo sabse mazboot tum saamne aayi, uske baare mein likho.

photoPrompt.en: Capture a photo that shows how far you've come since the beginning of your pregnancy.
photoPrompt.hi: Ek aisi photo lo jo dikhaye ki apni pregnancy ki shuruaat se ab tak tum kitni door aa gayi ho.

whatSheMayFeel.en: Excited, impatient and increasingly aware that labor could begin in the coming weeks.
whatSheMayFeel.hi: Excited, beysabri se bhari aur is baat se zyada wakif ki aane wale hafton mein labor shuru ho sakta hai.

whatYouCanDo.en: Stay calm, organized and reassuring. Help reduce unnecessary stress.
whatYouCanDo.hi: Shaant, organized aur reassuring raho. Gair-zaroori stress kam karne mein madad karo.

oneMission.en: Review labor signs together and ensure emergency contacts are easily accessible.
oneMission.hi: Saath mein labor ke signs review karo aur ensure karo ki emergency contacts aasaani se mil jayein.

shareMessage.en: We're almost there ❤
shareMessage.hi: Hum lagbhag pahunch hi gaye hain ❤

weekHeadline.en: Your baby is putting the finishing touches on growth and development. The journey is entering its final stretch.
weekHeadline.hi: Tumhara baby apni growth aur development par aakhri touch de raha hai. Safar ab apne aakhri padav mein pahunch raha hai.

reveal.en: Maa, I am getting ready. Soon we won't need imagination to meet each other.
reveal.hi: Maa, main taiyar ho raha hoon. Jald hi ek-dusre se milne ke liye humein kalpana ki zaroorat nahi padegi.

whatImDoing.en: My lungs are almost fully mature, my brain continues developing rapidly and I am practicing the reflexes I will use after birth, including sucking and grasping.
whatImDoing.hi: Mere lungs lagbhag poori tarah mature ho chuke hain, mera brain tezi se develop hota ja raha hai aur main woh reflexes practice kar raha hoon jo main birth ke baad use karunga, jaise chusna aur pakadna.

funFact.en: I may already recognize familiar voices, songs and sounds that I've heard repeatedly during pregnancy.
funFact.hi: Pregnancy ke dauraan main jo aawazein, gaane aur sounds baar-baar sunta aaya hoon, unhe shayad ab pehchaan sakta hoon.

physicalChanges.en: Your baby may begin moving lower into your pelvis, increasing pelvic pressure while sometimes making breathing slightly easier.
physicalChanges.hi: Tumhara baby tumhare pelvis mein neeche aana shuru kar sakta hai, jisse pelvic pressure badhta hai par kabhi-kabhi saans lena thoda aasaan ho jaata hai.

emotionalState.en: Excitement, impatience and anticipation often become stronger as your due date approaches.
emotionalState.hi: Jaise-jaise tumhari due date paas aati hai, excitement, besabri aur intezaar aksar aur badh jaate hain.

selfCareTip.en: Keep your hospital bag ready and try to simplify your daily schedule.
selfCareTip.hi: Apna hospital bag taiyar rakho aur apne rozana ke schedule ko simple rakhne ki koshish karo.

reassurance.en: Many women wonder if every sensation means labor is beginning. This uncertainty is completely normal.
reassurance.hi: Kayi maayein sochti hain ki kya har ehsaas ka matlab labor shuru hona hai. Yeh uncertainty bilkul normal hai.

whyNow.en: Your baby continues gaining weight and storing nutrients needed for the first weeks after birth.
whyNow.hi: Tumhara baby weight badhata ja raha hai aur birth ke baad ke pehle hafton ke liye zaroori nutrients store kar raha hai.

benefit.en: Provides protein and calcium needed during the final stage of growth.
benefit.hi: Growth ke aakhri stage mein zaroori protein aur calcium deta hai.

howToConsume.en: Paneer bhurji, paneer tikka or paneer curry.
howToConsume.hi: Paneer bhurji, paneer tikka ya paneer curry.

mealIdea.en: Paneer bhurji with multigrain roti and salad.
mealIdea.hi: Paneer bhurji multigrain roti aur salad ke saath.

tip.en: Focus on consistent nourishment rather than eating larger portions.
tip.hi: Bade portions khaane ke bajaye lagatar nourishment par dhyaan do.

doThisWeek.en: Finalize your hospital bag, transport plans and important contact list.
doThisWeek.hi: Apna hospital bag, transport plans aur important contact list final kar lo.

skipThisWeek.en: Traveling far from your healthcare provider without medical advice.
skipThisWeek.hi: Bina medical advice ke apne healthcare provider se door travel karna.

redFlags.en: Contact your doctor if you experience fluid leakage, bleeding, regular painful contractions, severe headache, vision changes, sudden swelling or reduced fetal movement.
redFlags.hi: Agar fluid leakage, bleeding, regular dard wale contractions, tez sar dard, vision mein badlav, achaanak soojan ya baby ki movement kam ho to apne doctor se contact karo.

myth.en: Once labor starts, you'll always know immediately.
myth.hi: Jab labor shuru hoga, tumhe hamesha turant pata chal jayega.

truth.en: Early labor can begin gradually and sometimes feels different than expected.
truth.hi: Early labor dheere-dheere shuru ho sakta hai aur kabhi-kabhi umeed se alag mehsoos hota hai.

affirmation.en: I trust my body and my baby.
affirmation.hi: Mujhe apne body aur apne baby par bharosa hai.

reflectionPrompt.en: What are you most excited to experience in the first week after birth?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Birth ke baad ke pehle hafte mein tum kya experience karne ke liye sabse zyada excited ho?

spokenLine.hi: Maa, main tumse milne ke bahut kareeb hoon.
spokenLine.en: Maa, I am very close to meeting you.

reflectionPrompt.en: What are you most excited to experience in the first week after birth?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Birth ke baad ke pehle hafte mein tum kya experience karne ke liye sabse zyada excited ho?

journalPrompt.en: Describe the first moment you imagine holding your baby in your arms.
journalPrompt.hi: Apne baby ko pehli baar apni baahon mein pakadne ke pal ka jo tum imagine karti ho use describe karo.

photoPrompt.en: Take a photo of your packed hospital bag or a special item waiting for your baby.
photoPrompt.hi: Apne packed hospital bag ya apne baby ke liye rakhi kisi special cheez ki photo lo.

whatSheMayFeel.en: Ready to meet the baby while also wondering when labor will begin.
whatSheMayFeel.hi: Baby se milne ke liye taiyar, saath hi soch rahi hai ki labor kab shuru hoga.

whatYouCanDo.en: Help create a calm environment and take care of last-minute logistics.
whatYouCanDo.hi: Ek shaant maahaul banane mein madad karo aur last-minute logistics ka khayal rakho.

oneMission.en: Do a complete hospital readiness check together.
oneMission.hi: Saath mein ek poora hospital readiness check karo.

shareMessage.en: The countdown is getting real ❤
shareMessage.hi: Countdown ab sach mein real ho raha hai ❤

weekHeadline.en: Congratulations. Your baby is now considered full term and could arrive any day.
weekHeadline.hi: Mubarak ho. Tumhara baby ab full term maana jaata hai aur kisi bhi din aa sakta hai.

reveal.en: Maa, I am officially full term now. Whenever the time is right, I'll be ready to meet you.
reveal.hi: Maa, main ab officially full term hoon. Jab bhi sahi samay aayega, main tumse milne ke liye tayyar rahunga.

whatImDoing.en: My lungs are ready for life outside the womb, my brain continues developing and I am practicing the reflexes I will need after birth. Most of my growth now focuses on gaining strength and storing energy.
whatImDoing.hi: Mere lungs womb ke bahar ki zindagi ke liye tayyar hain, mera brain develop hota rehta hai aur main woh reflexes practice kar raha hoon jo birth ke baad mere kaam aayenge. Ab meri jyadatar growth taakat banane aur energy store karne par hai.

funFact.en: Even though I am considered full term, my brain will continue developing rapidly throughout the final weeks and after birth.
funFact.hi: Bhale hi main full term maana jaata hoon, mera brain aakhri hafton mein aur birth ke baad bhi tezi se develop hota rahega.

physicalChanges.en: You may feel increased pelvic pressure, frequent urination and occasional contractions as your body prepares for labor.
physicalChanges.hi: Tum jyada pelvic pressure, baar-baar urination aur kabhi-kabhi contractions feel kar sakti ho kyunki tumhari body labor ke liye tayyari kar rahi hai.

emotionalState.en: Excitement, impatience and anticipation are very common. You may find yourself wondering every day whether labor will begin.
emotionalState.hi: Excitement, besabri aur intezaar bahut aam hain. Tum har din soch sakti ho ki labor kab shuru hoga.

selfCareTip.en: Focus on rest, hydration and conserving energy. Labor may begin at any time.
selfCareTip.hi: Rest, hydration aur energy bachane par dhyaan do. Labor kisi bhi samay shuru ho sakta hai.

reassurance.en: It is completely normal to feel ready for pregnancy to be over while also feeling nervous about labor.
reassurance.hi: Pregnancy ke khatam hone ke liye tayyar feel karna aur saath hi labor ko lekar nervous feel karna bilkul normal hai.

whyNow.en: Your body needs sustained energy as it prepares for labor and birth.
whyNow.hi: Labor aur birth ki tayyari ke liye tumhari body ko lagataar energy ki zaroorat hai.

benefit.en: Provides quick energy, potassium and easy-to-digest nutrition.
benefit.hi: Turant energy, potassium aur aasaani se pachne wala nutrition deta hai.

howToConsume.en: As a snack, smoothie or with peanut butter.
howToConsume.hi: Snack ke roop mein, smoothie mein ya peanut butter ke saath.

mealIdea.en: Vegetable dal khichdi with curd and banana.
mealIdea.hi: Vegetable dal khichdi dahi aur kele ke saath.

tip.en: Avoid skipping meals. Your body needs consistent fuel during these final days.
tip.hi: Meals skip mat karo. In aakhri dino mein tumhari body ko lagataar fuel chahiye.

doThisWeek.en: Keep your phone charged, hospital bag ready and transportation plan finalized.
doThisWeek.hi: Apna phone charged rakho, hospital bag tayyar rakho aur transportation plan pakka kar lo.

skipThisWeek.en: Obsessing over every tiny symptom or comparing your labor timeline with others.
skipThisWeek.hi: Har chhote symptom ko lekar pareshaan hona ya apni labor timeline doosron se compare karna.

redFlags.en: Contact your doctor immediately if you experience bleeding, fluid leakage, painful regular contractions, reduced fetal movement, severe headache or vision changes.
redFlags.hi: Agar bleeding, fluid leakage, dardnaak regular contractions, baby ki kam movement, tez sir dard ya vision mein badlaav ho to turant apne doctor se sampark karo.

myth.en: The due date is the exact day the baby will arrive.
myth.hi: Due date woh theek din hai jis din baby aayega.

truth.en: Most babies arrive within a range of days before or after the due date.
truth.hi: Jyadatar babies due date se kuch din pehle ya baad ke beech mein aate hain.

affirmation.en: My baby and I are ready for this beautiful transition.
affirmation.hi: Mera baby aur main is khoobsurat transition ke liye tayyar hain.

reflectionPrompt.en: What are you most excited to see when you meet your baby?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Apne baby se milte waqt aap sabse jyada kya dekhne ke liye excited hain?

spokenLine.hi: Maa, ab hum kabhi bhi mil sakte hain.
spokenLine.en: Maa, we could meet any day now.

reflectionPrompt.en: What are you most excited to see when you meet your baby?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Apne baby se milte waqt aap sabse jyada kya dekhne ke liye excited hain?

journalPrompt.en: Describe the very first thing you hope to do after meeting your baby.
journalPrompt.hi: Apne baby se milne ke baad jo sabse pehli cheez aap karna chahti hain use describe karein.

photoPrompt.en: Take a final bump photo and capture this once-in-a-lifetime moment.
photoPrompt.hi: Ek aakhri bump photo lein aur is zindagi mein ek baar aane wale pal ko capture karein.

whatSheMayFeel.en: Excited, impatient, emotional and constantly wondering when labor will begin.
whatSheMayFeel.hi: Excited, besabr, emotional aur baar-baar sochti rehti hain ki labor kab shuru hoga.

whatYouCanDo.en: Stay calm, available and reassuring. Help create a peaceful environment.
whatYouCanDo.hi: Shaant raho, available raho aur reassure karo. Ek shaant mahaul banane mein madad karo.

oneMission.en: Review the hospital plan one final time and make sure everything is ready.
oneMission.hi: Hospital plan ek aakhri baar review karo aur sunishchit karo ki sab kuch tayyar hai.

shareMessage.en: Full term ❤ We could meet our baby any day now.
shareMessage.hi: Full term ❤ Hum kisi bhi din apne baby se mil sakte hain.

weekHeadline.en: Your baby is continuing to fine-tune important systems while preparing for birth. The wait is almost over.
weekHeadline.hi: Tumhara baby janam ki taiyaari karte hue zaroori systems ko aur fine-tune kar raha hai. Intezaar ab lagbhag khatam.

reveal.en: Maa, I am ready for the greatest journey of my life — coming into your arms.
reveal.hi: Maa, main apni zindagi ke sabse bade safar ke liye taiyaar hoon — tumhari baahon mein aane ke liye.

whatImDoing.en: My lungs are ready, my brain is still developing rapidly and I continue building strength and energy reserves. Most of my work now is preparing for birth and life outside the womb.
whatImDoing.hi: Mere lungs taiyaar hain, mera brain abhi bhi tezi se develop ho raha hai aur main lagatar takat aur energy reserves bana raha hoon. Mera zyadatar kaam ab janam aur womb ke bahar ki zindagi ki taiyaari karna hai.

funFact.en: My brain will grow dramatically during my first year of life, but many of its foundations have already been built.
funFact.hi: Mera brain meri zindagi ke pehle saal mein zabardast badhega, par uski bahut si neev pehle hi ban chuki hai.

physicalChanges.en: Your baby may have dropped lower into your pelvis, increasing pressure below while sometimes making breathing easier.
physicalChanges.hi: Tumhara baby tumhare pelvis mein neeche aa gaya ho sakta hai, jisse neeche dabaav badhta hai par kabhi-kabhi saans lena aasaan ho jaata hai.

emotionalState.en: You may feel excited, impatient, emotional or deeply reflective as you approach the end of pregnancy.
emotionalState.hi: Pregnancy ke ant ke kareeb aate hue tum excited, beqaraar, emotional ya gehraai se vichaarsheel mehsoos kar sakti ho.

selfCareTip.en: Rest whenever possible. Your body is preparing for one of the most demanding and beautiful experiences of your life.
selfCareTip.hi: Jab bhi mauka mile aaram karo. Tumhara body apni zindagi ke sabse mushkil aur khoobsurat experiences mein se ek ke liye taiyaari kar raha hai.

reassurance.en: Every day your baby remains inside continues supporting development and preparation for birth.
reassurance.hi: Tumhara baby jitne din andar rehta hai, utna hi uski development aur janam ki taiyaari ko support milta rehta hai.

whyNow.en: Your body needs steady energy stores as labor could begin at any time.
whyNow.hi: Tumhare body ko lagatar energy stores ki zaroorat hai kyunki labor kabhi bhi shuru ho sakta hai.

benefit.en: Provides easily digestible protein and energy during the final weeks of pregnancy.
benefit.hi: Pregnancy ke aakhri hafton mein aasaani se hazam hone wala protein aur energy deti hai.

howToConsume.en: Moong dal khichdi, soup or chilla.
howToConsume.hi: Moong dal khichdi, soup ya chilla.

mealIdea.en: Moong dal khichdi with curd and vegetables.
mealIdea.hi: Dahi aur sabziyon ke saath moong dal khichdi.

tip.en: Choose nourishing foods that are easy to digest and provide lasting energy.
tip.hi: Aise poshak foods chuno jo aasaani se hazam hon aur lambe samay tak energy dein.

doThisWeek.en: Keep your hospital bag, medical documents and transportation plan ready at all times.
doThisWeek.hi: Apna hospital bag, medical documents aur transportation plan hamesha taiyaar rakho.

skipThisWeek.en: Starting major home projects or exhausting yourself physically.
skipThisWeek.hi: Bade home projects shuru karna ya khud ko physically thaka dena.

redFlags.en: Contact your doctor immediately if you experience fluid leakage, bleeding, painful regular contractions, reduced fetal movement, severe headache or vision changes.
redFlags.hi: Apne doctor se turant sampark karo agar tumhe fluid leakage, bleeding, dardnaak regular contractions, fetal movement kam hona, tez sar dard ya nazar mein badlaav ho.

myth.en: Walking can force labor to start.
myth.hi: Chalne se labor zabardasti shuru ho sakta hai.

truth.en: Gentle activity may support comfort and positioning, but labor begins when your body and baby are ready.
truth.hi: Halki activity aaram aur positioning mein madad kar sakti hai, par labor tab shuru hota hai jab tumhara body aur baby taiyaar hote hain.

affirmation.en: I trust the timing of my body and my baby.
affirmation.hi: Main apne body aur apne baby ke samay par bharosa karti hoon.

reflectionPrompt.en: What has been the most beautiful part of this pregnancy journey?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Is pregnancy safar ka sabse khoobsurat hissa kya raha hai?

spokenLine.hi: Maa, meri yatra shuru hone wali hai.
spokenLine.en: Maa, my journey is about to begin.

reflectionPrompt.en: What has been the most beautiful part of this pregnancy journey?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Is pregnancy safar ka sabse khoobsurat hissa kya raha hai?

journalPrompt.en: Write about your favorite pregnancy memory and why you never want to forget it.
journalPrompt.hi: Apni favorite pregnancy yaad ke baare mein likho aur ki aap use kabhi kyun nahi bhoolna chahti.

photoPrompt.en: Take a photo of yourself, your partner or your family as you wait for your baby's arrival.
photoPrompt.hi: Apne baby ke aane ka intezaar karte hue apni, apne partner ya apne parivar ki ek photo lein.

whatSheMayFeel.en: Excited, emotional and ready to meet the baby, while also wondering when labor will start.
whatSheMayFeel.hi: Excited, emotional aur baby se milne ke liye taiyaar, par saath hi yeh sochte hue ki labor kab shuru hoga.

whatYouCanDo.en: Stay flexible, supportive and prepared. This is a time for reassurance, not problem-solving.
whatYouCanDo.hi: Flexible, supportive aur taiyaar rahein. Yeh hosla dene ka samay hai, problem-solving ka nahi.

oneMission.en: Check hospital routes, emergency contacts and logistics one final time.
oneMission.hi: Hospital ke raste, emergency contacts aur logistics ek aakhri baar check kar lein.

shareMessage.en: Every day brings us closer to holding our baby ❤
shareMessage.hi: Har din hum apne baby ko god mein lene ke aur kareeb aate ja rahe hain ❤

weekHeadline.en: Your baby is fully developed and simply waiting for the perfect moment to begin the journey into your arms.
weekHeadline.hi: Aapka baby poori tarah develop ho chuka hai aur bas aapki baahon mein aane ka safar shuru karne ke perfect moment ka intezaar kar raha hai.

reveal.en: Maa, I am ready. Soon I won't be listening to your heartbeat from inside — I'll be resting on your chest.
reveal.hi: Maa, main taiyaar hoon. Jald hi main andar se tumhari dhadkan nahi sun raha hoonga — main tumhare seene par aaram kar raha hoonga.

whatImDoing.en: My lungs are ready for my first breath, my reflexes are developed and I continue building small reserves of fat and energy. Most of my work now is waiting for labor to begin.
whatImDoing.hi: Mere lungs meri pehli saans ke liye taiyaar hain, mere reflexes develop ho chuke hain aur main fat aur energy ke chote reserves banata ja raha hoon. Ab mera zyadatar kaam labor shuru hone ka intezaar karna hai.

funFact.en: My brain is still growing rapidly and will continue developing faster than almost any other time in my life after birth.
funFact.hi: Mera brain abhi bhi tezi se badh raha hai aur birth ke baad meri zindagi ke lagbhag har dusre samay se tez develop hota rahega.

physicalChanges.en: Your body is making final preparations for labor. You may notice increased pelvic pressure, irregular contractions and changes in energy levels.
physicalChanges.hi: Aapka body labor ke liye aakhri taiyaariyaan kar raha hai. Aapko badha hua pelvic pressure, irregular contractions aur energy levels mein badlaav mehsoos ho sakta hai.

emotionalState.en: You may feel excited, impatient, emotional, nervous or all of them in the same day. Every feeling is normal.
emotionalState.hi: Aap excited, besabr, emotional, nervous ya ek hi din mein yeh sab feel kar sakti hain. Har feeling normal hai.

selfCareTip.en: Rest whenever possible. Labor is an endurance event and conserving energy now is valuable.
selfCareTip.hi: Jab bhi mumkin ho aaram karein. Labor ek endurance event hai aur abhi energy bachana valuable hai.

reassurance.en: It is normal to feel emotionally overwhelmed as you approach one of the biggest moments of your life.
reassurance.hi: Apni zindagi ke sabse bade moments mein se ek ke kareeb aate hue emotionally overwhelmed feel hona normal hai.

whyNow.en: Your body needs stable energy and hydration as labor could begin at any time.
whyNow.hi: Aapke body ko stable energy aur hydration chahiye kyunki labor kabhi bhi shuru ho sakta hai.

benefit.en: Supports hydration and provides natural electrolytes.
benefit.hi: Hydration ko support karta hai aur natural electrolytes deta hai.

howToConsume.en: One fresh glass during the day if advised by your healthcare provider.
howToConsume.hi: Din mein ek taaza glass agar aapke healthcare provider salaah dein.

mealIdea.en: Moong dal khichdi with curd and coconut water.
mealIdea.hi: Moong dal khichdi dahi aur nariyal paani ke saath.

tip.en: Choose simple, nourishing foods that support energy and digestion.
tip.hi: Aise simple, nourishing foods chunein jo energy aur digestion ko support karein.

doThisWeek.en: Focus on rest, hydration, movement and staying mentally calm.
doThisWeek.hi: Aaram, hydration, movement aur mentally calm rehne par dhyan dein.

skipThisWeek.en: Constantly searching for signs that labor is about to begin.
skipThisWeek.hi: Lagatar in signs ko dhoondhte rehna ki labor shuru hone wala hai.

redFlags.en: Contact your doctor immediately if you experience fluid leakage, bleeding, painful regular contractions, reduced fetal movement, severe headache or vision changes.
redFlags.hi: Agar aapko fluid leakage, bleeding, dardnaak regular contractions, kam fetal movement, tez sir dard ya vision changes ho to turant apne doctor se contact karein.

myth.en: If labor hasn't started yet, something is wrong.
myth.hi: Agar labor abhi tak shuru nahi hua to kuch gadbad hai.

truth.en: Many healthy pregnancies continue into Week 40 and beyond under medical supervision.
truth.hi: Bahut si healthy pregnancies medical supervision mein Week 40 aur uske aage tak jaari rehti hain.

affirmation.en: My baby and I trust the timing of this birth.
affirmation.hi: Mera baby aur main is birth ki timing par bharosa karte hain.

reflectionPrompt.en: What would you like to say to your baby before meeting them?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Apne baby se milne se pehle aap unhe kya kehna chahengi?

spokenLine.hi: Maa, bas thoda sa intezaar aur.
spokenLine.en: Maa, just a little more waiting.

reflectionPrompt.en: What would you like to say to your baby before meeting them?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Apne baby se milne se pehle aap unhe kya kehna chahengi?

journalPrompt.en: Write a final letter to your baby before birth. Tell them what awaits them, how loved they are and how excited you are to meet them.
journalPrompt.hi: Birth se pehle apne baby ko ek aakhri letter likhein. Unhe batayein ki unka kya intezaar kar raha hai, woh kitne loved hain aur aap unse milne ke liye kitni excited hain.

photoPrompt.en: Take a final pregnancy photo that captures your anticipation and excitement before birth.
photoPrompt.hi: Birth se pehle ek aakhri pregnancy photo lein jo aapke intezaar aur excitement ko capture kare.

whatSheMayFeel.en: Ready, emotional, impatient and deeply focused on meeting the baby.
whatSheMayFeel.hi: Taiyaar, emotional, besabr aur baby se milne par gehraai se focused.

whatYouCanDo.en: Stay present, calm and supportive. Your confidence can be incredibly reassuring.
whatYouCanDo.hi: Present, calm aur supportive rahein. Aapka confidence behad reassuring ho sakta hai.

oneMission.en: Ask her what kind of support she wants during labor and listen carefully.
oneMission.hi: Use poochein ki labor ke dauran woh kis tarah ka support chahti hai aur dhyaan se sunein.

shareMessage.en: Soon we'll finally meet the little person we've been dreaming about ❤
shareMessage.hi: Jald hi hum us nanhe se aakhirkaar milenge jise hum sapno mein dekhte aaye hain ❤

weekHeadline.en: This is your due week. Whether your baby arrives today, tomorrow or a few days later, the journey that began 40 weeks ago is about to transform forever.
weekHeadline.hi: Yeh aapka due week hai. Chahe aapka baby aaj aaye, kal aaye ya kuch din baad, woh safar jo 40 hafte pehle shuru hua tha, ab hamesha ke liye badalne wala hai.

reveal.en: Maa, our longest journey together is almost complete. The next time we meet, it may be face to face.
reveal.hi: Maa, hamara sabse lamba safar lagbhag poora ho gaya hai. Agli baar jab hum milenge, to shayad aamne-saamne.

whatImDoing.en: My lungs are ready for my first breath. My heart, brain and body are prepared for life outside the womb. Right now, I am waiting for the perfect moment to begin my journey into your arms.
whatImDoing.hi: Mere lungs meri pehli saans ke liye taiyaar hain. Mera dil, brain aur body womb ke bahar ki zindagi ke liye taiyaar hain. Abhi, main tumhari baahon mein apna safar shuru karne ke liye perfect pal ka intezaar kar raha hoon.

funFact.en: Although I am ready to be born, my brain will continue growing faster during my first year than at almost any other time in life.
funFact.hi: Bhale hi main paida hone ke liye taiyaar hoon, mera brain mere pehle saal mein zindagi ke lagbhag kisi bhi aur samay se tezi se badhta rahega.

physicalChanges.en: Your body is doing incredible work preparing for labor. Contractions may come and go, sleep may be difficult and every sensation can feel meaningful.
physicalChanges.hi: Aapki body labour ki taiyaari mein zabardast kaam kar rahi hai. Contractions aate-jaate reh sakte hain, sona mushkil ho sakta hai aur har ehsaas meaningful lag sakta hai.

emotionalState.en: You may feel excited, impatient, emotional, nervous, peaceful or all of these within the same day. Every feeling is valid.
emotionalState.hi: Aap excited, besabra, emotional, nervous, peaceful ya yeh sab ek hi din mein mehsoos kar sakti hain. Har feeling valid hai.

selfCareTip.en: Focus only on today. Rest, hydrate, nourish yourself and trust your medical team.
selfCareTip.hi: Sirf aaj par dhyaan dein. Rest karein, hydrate rahein, khud ko nourish karein aur apni medical team par bharosa rakhein.

reassurance.en: Most babies arrive in their own time. A due date is a guide, not a deadline.
reassurance.hi: Zyadatar babies apne samay par aate hain. Due date ek guide hai, deadline nahi.

whyNow.en: Your body needs energy, hydration and strength as labor may begin at any time.
whyNow.hi: Aapki body ko energy, hydration aur strength chahiye, kyunki labour kabhi bhi shuru ho sakta hai.

benefit.en: Supports hydration and replenishes electrolytes during the final days of pregnancy.
benefit.hi: Hydration mein madad karta hai aur pregnancy ke aakhri dinon mein electrolytes replenish karta hai.

howToConsume.en: One fresh serving during the day if approved by your healthcare provider.
howToConsume.hi: Din mein ek fresh serving, agar aapke healthcare provider approve karein.

mealIdea.en: Moong dal khichdi with curd, banana and coconut water.
mealIdea.hi: Moong dal khichdi, dahi, kele aur nariyal pani ke saath.

tip.en: Choose simple, familiar foods that provide steady energy and are easy to digest.
tip.hi: Simple, jaane-pehchaane foods chunein jo steady energy dein aur aasaani se digest hon.

doThisWeek.en: Rest, stay hydrated, remain in touch with your healthcare provider and trust your body.
doThisWeek.hi: Rest karein, hydrate rahein, apne healthcare provider ke sampark mein rahein aur apni body par bharosa rakhein.

skipThisWeek.en: Trying every internet trick to force labor to begin.
skipThisWeek.hi: Labour shuru karwane ke liye internet ka har trick aazmana.

redFlags.en: Contact your doctor immediately if you experience bleeding, fluid leakage, painful regular contractions, reduced fetal movement, severe headache, vision changes or anything that concerns you.
redFlags.hi: Apne doctor se turant sampark karein agar bleeding, fluid leakage, painful regular contractions, kam fetal movement, severe sir dard, vision changes ya koi bhi cheez jo aapko pareshan kare ho.

myth.en: If labor hasn't started by the due date, something is wrong.
myth.hi: Agar due date tak labour shuru nahi hua, to kuch gadbad hai.

truth.en: Many healthy pregnancies continue beyond the due date under appropriate medical supervision.
truth.hi: Bahut si healthy pregnancies sahi medical supervision mein due date ke baad bhi jaari rehti hain.

affirmation.en: I trust the timing of birth and the wisdom of my body.
affirmation.hi: Mujhe birth ke samay par aur apni body ki samajh par bharosa hai.

reflectionPrompt.en: What would you like your baby to know on the day they enter the world?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Aap apne baby ko us din kya batana chahengi jis din woh duniya mein aaye?

spokenLine.hi: Maa, ab main tumhari baahon mein aane wala hoon.
spokenLine.en: Maa, now I am coming into your arms.

reflectionPrompt.en: What would you like your baby to know on the day they enter the world?
reflectionPrompt.hi: Aap apne baby ko us din kya batana chahengi jis din woh duniya mein aaye?

journalPrompt.en: Write your baby's welcome letter. Tell them about the family waiting for them, the dreams you have for them and the love that has surrounded them since before they were born.
journalPrompt.hi: Apne baby ka welcome letter likhein. Use us family ke baare mein bataayein jo uska intezaar kar rahi hai, jo sapne aap uske liye rakhti hain aur woh pyaar jo janm se pehle hi use ghere hue hai.

photoPrompt.en: Take your final pregnancy photo. This is the last chapter before your next photo includes your baby.
photoPrompt.hi: Apni aakhri pregnancy photo lein. Yeh aakhri adhyaay hai is se pehle ki aapki agli photo mein aapka baby ho.

whatSheMayFeel.en: Emotional, excited, tired, hopeful and completely focused on meeting the baby.
whatSheMayFeel.hi: Emotional, excited, thaki hui, umeed se bhari aur poori tarah baby se milne par focused.

whatYouCanDo.en: Be her calm. Protect her peace, advocate for her needs and remind her how strong she is.
whatYouCanDo.hi: Uska sukoon banein. Uski shaanti protect karein, uski zarooraton ke liye awaaz uthayein aur use yaad dilayein ki woh kitni strong hai.

oneMission.en: Tell her three things you admire about her and one reason you know she will be an amazing mother.
oneMission.hi: Use teen cheezein bataayein jo aapko uske baare mein pasand hain aur ek wajah jisse aap jaante hain ki woh ek amazing maa banegi.

shareMessage.en: Forty weeks of love. A lifetime of memories begins now ❤
shareMessage.hi: Chalis hafton ka pyaar. Ek zindagi bhar ki yaadein ab shuru hoti hain ❤

specialMessageFromBaby.title: A Letter From Me To You
specialMessageFromBaby.message: Maa, for forty weeks you carried me, protected me and loved me before even seeing my face. You listened to my tiny heartbeat, celebrated my kicks and dreamed about the day we would finally meet. Whenever that moment arrives, remember this — you were already my home long before I was born. Thank you for being my first world. I can't wait to meet you.
